body:
Stop looking at national headlines and start looking at what the Left is doing right in your backyard...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b699dc01131549b7ac5ae44609d8ef9b&_e=xh7wxkbSDCd_xaM8t0Ds_TjzZTgG9zXGrw8F2wJxif6qiDYOFTn4yyAi-cwXIjnLTzS3HgHuw9ghWjEZCr5hE0T31fXcycMx2b7Vgz_9cMFR66yWjUKUhCQaFCbvgKuskkRnieah38lUbuNqvzbAeyvhkmhlvsAVo7A7lW6It1MsiR21PTFxI6r1E3ko4AKm7no6rXUngXnZXiv_1gsbIg%3D%3D)
---
Peter, _Imagine a local prosecutor whose top priority was simply to stop prosecuting certain crimes..._
You don’t have to imagine —**it just happened in Loudoun County, Virginia.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b699dc01131549b7ac5ae44609d8ef9b&_e=xh7wxkbSDCd_xaM8t0Ds_TjzZTgG9zXGrw8F2wJxif7n-sCjnk7vP1DuFsRv16IZm2KBqy6TY8DVMSpRMeQZ8WJKzmkR6MJ-PEnxaQNC82ldrTTDjOkV5b7emoR_OntBlTJ04Qy4SrLNE1XCe4txnAGGkhDpVg9TdSAqq0It1-j5EYd_IpTkzQ8EJRsGqhUxhU8bIp2V8LnKTEFeeqfLKA%3D%3D)
---
Leftist-controlled cities like San Francisco and Chicago show the terrible, corrosive effect of radical prosecutors — and the Left’s dark money is flowing into counties across America to roll out this extreme ideology in your backyard. **_Thanks to these efforts, Soros-funded prosecutors are gaining power, and they are doing it all under the radar._** We must fight back. [_**This is why Fair Courts America exists.**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b699dc01131549b7ac5ae44609d8ef9b&_e=xh7wxkbSDCd_xaM8t0Ds_TjzZTgG9zXGrw8F2wJxif7yE9UFien6F-lcYP1Z6dlSJRNAyv7sYaHZAl0sIOBcY04jtByZc70inx69XymH1U38HeVQAckZq-tk7H7f7Nx81DkJ3B19iLPMu_YzVXjK5DdtUqR68xQlUs31JjMWVGN0C9Oz5c3Re5ymViXSDyM22HSOo3DFHji75KVl7qeZFg%3D%3D) Our mission is to fight for the integrity of our judicial system, including making sure our prosecutors _actually prosecute crime_.
Tracking these prosecutorial races across the country is a massive undertaking — which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of dark money influence... _until now._

[_**Peter, we need your help. Any amount you can give will support our efforts to defend the rule of law in our country. This is absolutely critical to protecting our republic. The woke mob is advancing on our courts right now, and only one thing can stop them from a total takeover: YOU.**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b699dc01131549b7ac5ae44609d8ef9b&_e=xh7wxkbSDCd_xaM8t0Ds_TjzZTgG9zXGrw8F2wJxif5xxE_rhXB5dtmLNC5Oo5oLzjrCaZdqB0YG-ni-DDyv37ypNx0RHDDU_NoX3GeTf14lItK0u4MgvGrfiWDkdPBwViO5jGD49sP2PYm3aDIMx6QG-eTQn_kVpVTtxFfo01vIPluEAhg6jMs3BX1T1JiyYG90LQT-8pVsVAJ8q8XsSg%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b699dc01131549b7ac5ae44609d8ef9b&_e=xh7wxkbSDCd_xaM8t0Ds_TjzZTgG9zXGrw8F2wJxif71bd9pg4-OwO-53EskjncX01sef87qDW8aJeIavcJT3GqPEGkKJk-zKr7FuVPlB50eLadQWUUALCzK1TQQGrFoJOgvmqlC17vCG1kKFYGvi5BRtX4STF7yQm0JO3KmuZopwWbVa66c8wOJthPFTCuWdKR15jMT6XxerG5-87EfoQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Andrew WynneExecutive Director | Fair Courts America

P.S. _**Remember:****Not only do radical leftist prosecutors fail to address rising crime, but they are actually causing it by abandoning their duty to prosecute criminals**_** _._ **Letting violent offenders go free, eliminating bail, and treating criminals like victims only leads to more victims of violent crime. _Help us fight back and donate at this secure, personal link today:_[https://secure.winred.com/fair-courts-america/action/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b699dc01131549b7ac5ae44609d8ef9b&_e=xh7wxkbSDCd_xaM8t0Ds_TjzZTgG9zXGrw8F2wJxif4IxKj2q6yJFUCWbg_WCFx6SXh5L2jht0PHtSDOj0dDCPHV1udhChJ7qD33uFirZHnhMQgZ6W6iyff0G2XzQfDxhG9rpdys5Z3fvvZQOh0xwMaa7Dn6NW3SF8LT5c4vDnVcSIJ9A8qodXOisr-Y6nhaNjAiRbYWBYiSiN0RRDPZTA%3D%3D)__

Peter, we’re running an on-the-ground operation to reach every last Fourth District voter.

With our special election falling just months after a national election, _we need to make sure Virginians are energized and ready to vote!_

**But it takes a lot of work to mobilize for an election like ours — knocking on doors, digital and radio ads, volunteer supplies, and even writing emails like this one.**

name: CO-08 Blue Alert
subject: The Republican agenda
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57743971/388969716/-1526739943?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.01.24_b1_co08ba_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmU5NDliZS00NDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dxl1mJJNAHR8arAO1F9GECGS62xww2L8u_-KQpy6GXw=)
**Here’s what Republicans have been up to since Kevin McCarthy became Speaker of the House, Peter–**

❌ Republicans have made it clear that **they want to slash Medicare and Medicaid** , which would deny healthcare to millions of Americans.

❌ Republicans have passed two bills that would **criminalize abortion nationwide** and put women and their doctors in jail.

❌ They’ve even threatened to shut down the government, which could **stop essential services like Social Security.**
**[Peter, we’re counting on you to keep CO-08 blue and work toward a Democratic House Majority. So please, will you chip in any amount right now to fight back against the extremist Republican agenda and keep Dr. Caraveo in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57743972/388969717/-1526739943?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.01.24_b1_co08ba_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmU5NDliZS00NDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dxl1mJJNAHR8arAO1F9GECGS62xww2L8u_-KQpy6GXw=)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: 3 mass shootings in California in 3 days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I’ve got that same sickening feeling again today. Anger. If you’ve followed the news the past few days, you probably feel it too.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH)
I’ve got that same sickening feeling again today.
_Anger._ If you’ve followed the news the past few days, you probably feel it too.
**[If you’re ready to do something about it, please join me by splitting a contribution to Giffords PAC, Everytown for Gun Safety Action Fund, and the Brady Campaign to Prevent Gun Violence to do good work on gun safety and replace cowardly Republican politicians with people who will act to save lives.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_gvp.gNHeyg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH)**
My heart grieves for the people of Monterey Park. Oakland. Half Moon Bay. And the lives lost. My prayers are with the communities, the victims, and the families whose lives have been torn asunder by yet more acts of wanton gun violence.
But not just my thoughts and prayers, my actions too. Like all of you.
California and Californians are _hurting._ We have experienced 3 mass shootings in 3 days. That’s merely a slice of the more than 300 people shot each day in this country. A country demanding action.
**I’m not going to grovel at the feet of Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell and beg them for a change of heart. They have made their political careers by standing unblinkingly by the NRA, and I don’t expect they will change now.**
**[So today, I’m asking you to make a contribution to Giffords PAC, Everytown for Gun Safety Action Fund, and the Brady Campaign to Prevent Gun Violence to put a stop to this violence. It doesn’t have to be this way. We can act. We MUST act.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_gvp.gNHeyg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Giffords PAC, Brady Campaign to Prevent Gun Violence, and Everytown for Gun Safety Action Fund will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jan2023_abs_em_gvp.1fuu7_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jan2023_abs_em_gvp.VYrowP&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2023_abs_em_gvp.kgetbe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2023_abs_em_gvp.K9fm3n&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=9&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jan2023_abs_em_gvp.eS7OTl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=10&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em_gvp.jY7mpj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=11&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH)
---
Just yesterday, I talked to you about Monterey Park — my experience representing that beautiful city in Congress and the countless hours I’ve spent at that intersection at Garfield and Garvey. I spent some time talking with community members and leaders there on Sunday, grieving with them.
I wish I had been wrong, but as long as Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell are too cowardly to act, it is a virtual guarantee that this horrific violence will continue.
It happened in my backyard this week, tomorrow or the next day it will happen someplace else. If we don’t act to stop gun violence now.
So let’s act. Let’s all do our part.
Thanks for joining me — and doing something about it.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=1618%2E5257348%2EzK7sTH)

subject: The best way to help elect state Democrats →
body:
We just checked and your name isn’t on our Official 2023 Membership list. | | |
---
| | **FIRST:** State Democrats flipped the first competitive special election of the year by just under _700_ votes in Virginia, despite massive Republican spending. **THEN:** We found out that Democrats are facing four MUST-WIN elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire this February! These chambers are so close that the winners of these specials could determine who is in the majority in the months and years to come. **NOW:** State Republicans are determined to win so they’re pouring huge amounts of money into these elections – competing in our races in Pennsylvania costs _25% more_ than it would have last year! **SO:** We need grassroots Democrats to step up and support our efforts to elect state Democrats – and the best way to do that is to become an official 2023 DLCC member. **Your membership contribution of $10 or more today will help fund our push to win special elections this year by investing in data, support staff, and campaign services in our most critical states like Pennsylvania and New Hampshire.** [Will you chip in $10 today to become an official 2023 DLCC member and receive your very own membership card in the mail? clean_body: We just checked and your name isn’t on our Official 2023 Membership list. | | | | | FIRST: State Democrats flipped the first competitive special election of the year by just under 700 votes in Virginia, despite massive Republican spending. THEN: We found out that Democrats are facing four MUST-WIN elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire this February! These chambers are so close that the winners of these specials could determine who is in the majority in the months and years to come. NOW: State Republicans are determined to win so they’re pouring huge amounts of money into these elections – competing in our races in Pennsylvania costs 25% more than it would have last year! SO: We need grassroots Democrats to step up and support our efforts to elect state Democrats – and the best way to do that is to become an official 2023 DLCC member. Your membership contribution of $10 or more today will help fund our push to win special elections this year by investing in data, support staff, and campaign services in our most critical states like Pennsylvania and New Hampshire. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We can’t rest on our laurels – our work never stops, and the GOP is working day and night to avenge their big losses. name: Adam Schiff
subject: URGENT: McCarthy just removed me from the Intelligence Committee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1614%2E5257348%2ElMfywF)
I’ve got some bad news:
Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party just did what they’ve threatened for the last two years.
**They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.**
This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters.
Derek, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people.
**[Please, contribute $10 or whatever you can spare today to help me respond to Republicans’ baseless attacks on my ability to hold them accountable. This isn’t the end of my fight for truth, accountability, and our democracy. In fact, it’s only the start:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em.lYGpWb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1614%2E5257348%2ElMfywF)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jan2023_abs_em.6K9j-B&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1614%2E5257348%2ElMfywF)
---

| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Cm-_r3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1614%2E5257348%2ElMfywF)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2023_abs_em.cg_Pq_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1614%2E5257348%2ElMfywF)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jan2023_abs_em.tb8BsE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=9&akid=1614%2E5257348%2ElMfywF)

I’ll have much more to say soon. But for now, thanks for standing with me — because it’s not just a personal attack on me. It’s an attack on accountability and effective oversight.
And it’s up to all of us to fight back.
— Adam

Friend, you can help me accomplish that by taking this 1-minute priorities survey below: Be safe, Tom Kean, Jr. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@TomKean.com.

name: Stop GOP Gerrymandering
subject: a problem and a solution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
Dallas News reported: “Razor-thin GOP majority in Congress rests on 4 ‘extra’ seats from Texas gerrymander”
|
---

| **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57744600/388988623/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=20230124.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViMzQwNzk1LTRiOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OsZLZStdeH7volJ7mrdDCrwj1MbP_LUlpzoeAvZ9U88=)**
---
**We have a problem, team: Gerrymandering in Texas helped the GOP win _four_ extra House seats.** In a year when the majority in the House of Representatives was decided by just five seats, that kind of margin is huge.

**Now, here’s the solution: Supporting the NDRC’s successful efforts to END this kind of map manipulation – state by state and across the country!**
[Donate to the NDRC’s work nationwide](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57744602/388988624/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=20230124.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViMzQwNzk1LTRiOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OsZLZStdeH7volJ7mrdDCrwj1MbP_LUlpzoeAvZ9U88=)
---
We have been working for seven years to end gerrymandering, and our strategy is _getting results_.

Our grassroots movement helped secure what _The New York Times_ called the “fairest map in 40 years” for the United States House of Representatives. As a result, Democrats were able to compete in fair races and win in states like Colorado, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and more.

**Republicans in states like Texas rely on map manipulation to win elections. But as Attorney General Eric Holder so aptly put it, our work has helped prove that, “Unlike Republicans, Democrats don’t need to gerrymander to win.”**

Instead, we need to keep on fighting for fairness, team.
[**_In 2023, we plan to replicate our proven strategy of fighting for fair maps, supporting plaintiffs in lawsuits, and protecting voting rights across the country – and we won’t rest until we’ve secured a level playing field in every single state. Will you pitch in now to help power all the NDRC’s work?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57744614/388988633/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=20230124.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViMzQwNzk1LTRiOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OsZLZStdeH7volJ7mrdDCrwj1MbP_LUlpzoeAvZ9U88=)

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: this must stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
We must take action to prevent these atrocities from happening again and again.

| Peter,

This weekend, the Monterey Park community suffered a tragic loss when an armed man shot and killed 11 people and injured more on Saturday night. 48 hours later, seven more people were shot and killed in Half Moon Bay in yet another act of senseless gun violence. My heart goes out to the victims, their families, and everyone affected by this terror and violence.

These mass shootings are the latest examples of unspeakable gun violence ripping through our communities. We cannot continue to stand idly by while innocent lives are taken by individuals with easy access to firearms. We must take action to prevent these atrocities from happening again and again.

**I’ve dedicated my time in Congress to advocating for gun control legislation that puts safety over the gun lobby.**

The Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, which enhances background checks and expands access to mental health services, is just the latest piece of legislation that I’ve been proud to support. **But it can’t be the last.**

There’s still much work to be done to ensure our children, our friends, and our loved ones can live their day-to-day lives without fear of gun violence. I am committed to making that a reality.

**My heart is with all of those suffering from unspeakable pain in California tonight. We can and must do more to protect our communities.**

Be safe,

Linda
---

* * *
| |
---

Stand with Sánchez
P.O. Box 59660
Norwalk, CA 90652
United States

clean_body: | Breaking news, Peter: The Cook Political Report just released its first 2024 Senate Ratings and made it clear— Democrats are on defense. With over 20 Democratic Senate seats on the line next year, including Tammy’s, we’re facing an uphill battle in keeping the majority out of Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s hands. And with the White House on the ballot, our race in Wisconsin is sure to be one of the most competitive (and expensive) in the nation. Last time Tammy was on the ballot during a presidential year, her race was decided by an incredibly close margin. Help us defend the Democratic Senate majority, starting with Tammy’s seat here in Wisconsin. Rush a donation today to power our work to hold onto the Senate >> If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Pundits and pollsters are zeroing in on Wisconsin as a top pick-up opportunity for Republicans in 2024. But with your support, we’re going to stop the GOP in their tracks and send Tammy back to the Senate. Thanks for your support, Team Baldwin PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Tammy Baldwin for Senate P.O. Box 696 Madison, WI 53701 United States | |

[600x300] [=] House Oversight chair says China's donations to Penn Biden Center may have influenced administration [=] Source: Just the News [=] The House Oversight and Accountability Committee demanded that the University of Pennsylvania release information about anonymous donations from China to the Penn Biden Center, where classified documents were found, over concerns the Chinese Communist Party may have influenced Biden administration policies through the contributions. [13x13x1] [=] READ MORE [=] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [=] 2022-04-14 Public College Prof. Convicted of Hiding Ties to China under Trump Initiative Nixed by Biden DOJ [=] Source: Judicial Watch [=] A Chinese public university professor has been convicted of fraud for concealing ties to China’s government thanks to a Trump initiative—recently nixed by the Biden administration—designed to crack down on the Communist nation’s pervasive theft of American-funded research. [13x13x1] [=] READ MORE [=] [180x150x2] [=] 2021-01-28 America Needs to Know the Truth About Biden Family’s Corrupt Deals [=] Source: Judicial Watch [=] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: We are already seeing China indirectly benefitting from Biden policies. Cancelling the Keystone XL pipeline will divert Canadian oil west to the petroleum-hungry People’s Republic. Re-entering the Paris Climate Agreement gives political cover to China’s excessively polluting dirty coal industry, in which Hunter Biden is heavily invested. [13x13x1] [=] READ MORE [=] [180x150x3] [==] 2023-01-12 Judicial Watch Asks Delaware Supreme Court for Limited Discovery to Depose a U Del Representative over Biden Senate Papers [==] Source: Judicial Watch [==] Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed an appeal brief with the Delaware Supreme Court on behalf of itself and the Daily Caller News Foundation, asking it to overturn a lower court’s decision blocking release of records about the U.S. Senate records of President Joe Biden housed at the University of Delaware. subject: These next four special elections are huge opportunities for Democrats
body:
We’re just two weeks away from the first of FOUR ultra-competitive special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire. | | |
---
| | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PAuvDiuBjrleVhfJBDB7p0nMRdIbxW4Q4SMzbFsTvknOXCVkENVikdl03T6F-FddNSaquBH5300jpikrqr-OIgZ61CXmfncdTJt2GPVH92fIlPXKQ4IMu3n-e4oSOjGCQ4KATJmU8xLhu6AAzyBGaGcx0lB0fyRm3Qp8_rWdgrRM8WaqjbIljVS4QbU827MB07i_NvPPWNUZNbwLJvW2lmLjG1Md8m0org89py_ArziluY9syZQQ27RyTUQuLu8-EJ_X9fngpif62SiO7ZfmccFRw4uY5rQfw2Y4K5M4ExcAUiFOhITqvtdOVNpk99D5vaccLE-j1Zq8wEPor4A45pxK9wlPOC1Lrk0BBne4M57TTGYM-qsNakuz0qSaW48nL3IvBwQVEvURpRsiQ8viRBQ/3t5/e73yBPrgSdOJlm254Vkxfw/h0/X6NVYC7GTMy_DDZ6cX6OeCAKhcMs19bGYmW1TvIsZSM) **The clock is ticking - we’re just two weeks away from the first of FOUR ultra-competitive special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire.** **These next four races are huge opportunities for Democrats:**
* Democrats are facing special elections for _three_ previously Democrat-held seats in the Pennsylvania House – these races are **MUST-WINS** for Democrats to potentially reach a majority in this chamber this year.
* A New Hampshire House race is a **TOSS-UP** after November’s election ended in a tie. Winning this seat is _critical_ to maintaining our razor-thin chamber margins.
* We only need 4 seats in the New Hampshire House to **FLIP** the chamber from red-to-blue and we already have two special elections on the books!

Our candidates are gearing up for a tough fight. Special elections are notoriously unpredictable – earlier this month, our Democrat flipped his Virginia Senate seat by just _696_ votes. **That’s why we need your help to come together so we can build campaigns strong enough to meet this critical moment.** [ Will you chip in $7 right now to help state Democrats WIN critical elections in states like Pennsylvania and New Hampshire? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PAuvDiuBjrleVhfJBDB7p0nMRdIbxW4Q4SMzbFsTvknOXCVkENVikdl03T6F-FddNSaquBH5300jpikrqr-OIgZ61CXmfncdTJt2GPVH92fIlPXKQ4IMu3n-e4oSOjGCQ1mPyiz9AGCcRiUvBU66YzPhAZg8hiaddoxZ23HXKAKQp5U5Jw4hxhAnihURyDV_pJYOFUVfw8K3EtMuYXcSB9Z-7td7cXg7TnOcxW_uYmE4t3IzXFxe6vhWP0yW81pAFJxIo4b8L63ULRNlj7j4-cKGMNVIyA7m6fMP6qBfU4nHKsUQ2Hlt4BJREZc1k7owDqNFvIAQD0vwxtUG58TwqhnXFQ6cmAz3aQE0Q6jHpawMvq3tt9cQ-rJ9C-lr0SDcxAuWEKz5a87ZKoeXGgoXmNlU8lyhORjy6gEY_0V7UJkL/3t5/e73yBPrgSdOJlm254Vkxfw/h1/X05P1xeKjWkowMQ4w1U6uUsb16bmPbNjdYE6tVINQ5o) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Republicans are in complete disarray – they’re focused on passing anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, prioritizing tax cuts for the mega-rich, and dismantling abortion access – instead of tackling _real_ issues that need _real_ solutions.
State Democrats are putting in the work to keep people safe from Republicans’ dangerous platform of abortion bans, voting restrictions, gender discrimination, and so much more. **The contrast is clear, now all that’s left to do is lend your support before voters in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire start filling out their ballots.**
**But these special elections aren’t cheap. Republicans are eying these specials just as much as we are – and they're armed with a war chest of resources ready to deploy boots on the ground, send last-minute funds, and turn out every last voter to the polls. It’s why we’re urgently asking grassroots Democrats like you to chip in whatever you can now so we can fund special elections like these. So please:**

name: Response MISSING
subject: This is SAD
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
You didn’t respond.

---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: TODAY: The pro-life trial of the century
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing bogus politically motivated felony charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, over twenty FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.**With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail in front of his wife and kids.** Now Mark is facing the possibility of eleven years in a federal prison on multiple felony charges arising out of an incident involving an abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our Thomas More Society legal team is representing him in court RIGHT NOW. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjbitsttp3h7d37q5foap9nlrt93hogac8nqtg88_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdgm2ob4cth2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, offering support to women who think they have no alternative but to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son with him.But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**.Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse.The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating life and defending his family._**We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort - who are trying to destroy Mark and his family - don't get away with this.[**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in – by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgdccvomg3lnas41jnuk09gnnej2pte98pqbkj6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdgm2ob4cth2bs) Make no mistake, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith.The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges, and when the escort filed charges himself, **his case was thrown out.** Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us.My name is Tom Brejcha, and I'm the President and Chief Counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom today, you can have an impact on the outcome by donating now to help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zou8hm6njndj0qr6f3s1buufqusb7feifcfgkt3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdgm2ob4cth2bs) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for crimes he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him, and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4rum1k1fn12etn925hgc7ch41unbp0mcro6n2hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdgm2ob4cth2bs) I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
---
President & Chief Counsel
---

**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z731kqjgo589m99r1oei3utmdujprafjjb0r4030_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdgm2ob4cth2bs)

Peter,

When my colleagues nominated me to be Speaker of the House earlier this month, the radical Left and the Fake New Media put a target on my back.

**Now, someone just mailed a copy of Harriet Beecher Stowe 's renowned book Uncle Tom's Cabin to my congressional office. **

The hateful individual who sent it was trying to depict me as a sellout because I'm a black conservative who REFUSES to tow the Democrat party line.

I need to fall in line and stop fighting for the America First agenda, or this barrage of racist attacks will continue.

Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1mcaeu36nbsbnsuh1k9it3k6uu0b1355k03p9u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdgm1o31chh2bs)

Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**

name: Shift WA
subject: Court to decide state income tax
body:
Democrats have attempted to bypass our state constitution and force a state income tax on Washingtonians for many years. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422790:scJTqoDNL:m:1:2610672541:A4371C1FA1E82772F38EA2724308EB27:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Democrats have attempted to bypass our state constitution and force a state income tax on you for decades. And now - TOMORROW - Democrats will have their day in court.

The State Supreme Court will hear Democrats argue that an income tax on capital gains is - get this, [**contrary to all established definitions**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422791:scJTqoDNL:m:1:2610672541:A4371C1FA1E82772F38EA2724308EB27:r) - an excise tax at 9 a.m. on January 26. That's right, Democrats want a state income so bad they won't even call it one, just to confuse the media and the public!

During the 2021 legislative session, Democrats realized years of their efforts to force a state income tax on Washingtonians when they passed an income tax on capital gains. Every Democrat knew they were passing state income tax on their constituents, but they would not admit it.

**The passage of the Democrat-only bill came as no surprise. After all, we here at Shift WA have covered the Democrats ' push for a state income tax since our launch in 2013. **

Back in 2015, we exposed how Democrats' biggest campaign donors - including the Washington Education Association (WEA) - [**stood to benefit the most from a state income tax**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422792:scJTqoDNL:m:1:2610672541:A4371C1FA1E82772F38EA2724308EB27:r). And - surprise, surprise - unions have organized a protest at the state capital tomorrow in an attempt to intimidate justices into supporting the illegal state income tax.

Importantly, we've covered every angle of Democrats' tactics - including their attempt to alter the meaning of words to pass a state income tax. We highlighted Jason Mercier of the Washington Policy Center's thorough investigative work. Back in 2021, Mercier contacted every state - along with federal tax and budget authorities like the IRS - to confirm reality. He found [**no agreement with the Washington Democrats**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422793:scJTqoDNL:m:1:2610672541:A4371C1FA1E82772F38EA2724308EB27:r), as every other rational body in the country considers a tax on capital gains to be a form of income tax.

As Homer Simpson would say, "Duh."

We also [**interviewed former Washington State Attorney General Rob McKenna (2005 - 2013)**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422794:scJTqoDNL:m:1:2610672541:A4371C1FA1E82772F38EA2724308EB27:r) when the lawsuit now before the Court was filed. McKenna explained why the state income tax (on capital gains) is unconstitutional.

You can count on Shift WA to continue fighting and highlighting Democrats' efforts to pass a state income tax - focusing on their unconstitutional actions and shining a light on their schemes. **[But we need your help.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422795:scJTqoDNL:m:1:2610672541:A4371C1FA1E82772F38EA2724308EB27:r)**

Our efforts depend entirely on grassroots supporters like you. [**Will you consider contributing $100, $50, or $25 to help us keep the lights on?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422795:scJTqoDNL:m:1:2610672541:A4371C1FA1E82772F38EA2724308EB27:r)

**You can count on us to continue bringing updates on Democrats ' tactics to you. But we need your help to keep going. **[**Will you consider contributing today?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422795:scJTqoDNL:m:1:2610672541:A4371C1FA1E82772F38EA2724308EB27:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61422796:scJTqoDNL:m:1:2610672541:A4371C1FA1E82772F38EA2724308EB27:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14121280&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oscJTqoDNL).
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z80hbflqfl606fcsb423aphium9852eoms16la78_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdim2pj4cjh2bs) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zum0b5roepgcpf4vbq30gf4coribima28fqpsik0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdim2pj4cjh2bs) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4aulecqm6k3olrbstthl7hak30cf8vj8b1m6q1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdim2pj4cjh2bs)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ta6ej35l0rsgnthuglsknjd1pd9ut5v4lq1ovo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdim2pj4cjh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvph6btpk2iovqr1am9ju5ptfrcnh989o5dnn1fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdim2pj4cjh2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc5v9o6tn6qr7e9bqf7cio8eq87hkvis9ge4pjko_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdim2pj4cjh2bs) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbrj7vn2q92it62vbjem2ab5kmuruin89sup3rb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdim2pj4cjh2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2znefdk3cbq6v1qimet81nq983mtqbk6vab5tk9to).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3omvocnk1aicaqqvja0vi69q3idl77l8f2mc6sg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5hmaob6chie49fg)

name: Wes Moore
subject: Highlights
body:
|
---
Friend, Last Wednesday was a day I will never forget. Thanks to the great people of Maryland and our people-powered movement, I was sworn in as your Governor and Aruna was sworn in as your Lieutenant Governor. It was a historic day in our state’s history, and I was honored to share it with 10,000 of you. For those of you who couldn’t be there, I thought I’d share some of my favorite moments from the day. |
---
We began Inauguration Day by gathering at the Kunta Kinte-Alex Haley memorial in Annapolis to lay a wreath. It is here where two centuries ago, enslaved people arrived in this country against their will. As I was inaugurated the first Black governor of Maryland on the steps of a state capitol built by their hands, this day is a testament to the fact that progress is not inevitable, but progress is possible.
---
Then, we walked hand in hand to government house to start Maryland’s next chapter. Together, we as a state march forward.
---
My son James lead us in the pledge of allegiance. Dawn and I are so proud of him and his sister Mia — all three of them are my heart, my soul, and my everything.
---
I took my oath of office on two bibles that day: the bible of Frederick Douglass and the bible of my grandfather, Rev. James Thomas. They embody what it means to be a leader and what it means to be an American. As Governor, I am committed to carrying on their legacies.
---
I want you to see what I saw as I was inaugurated: this is our state in all its beauty, and this is who I’ll fight for every single day that I have the honor of being your governor.
---
Later that evening, we got the party started in Baltimore at The People’s Ball, organized by Dawn and Aruna’s husband David. Together, they put on an amazing celebration featuring the talent, history, and creativity that every corner of our state has to offer — and a whole lot of dancing!
---
I will remember this day for the rest of my life, and I thank you once again for all you’ve done to make it happen. Now, Aruna and I are already hard at work delivering on the promises we made and creating a state where we truly leave no one behind.
Maryland’s future is so bright it is blinding. We will be intentional, inclusive, and disciplined in seizing the opportunities in front of us. Our future starts now.
Elevate,
Wes

clean_body: | Friend, Last Wednesday was a day I will never forget. Thanks to the great people of Maryland and our people-powered movement, I was sworn in as your Governor and Aruna was sworn in as your Lieutenant Governor. It was a historic day in our state’s history, and I was honored to share it with 10,000 of you. For those of you who couldn’t be there, I thought I’d share some of my favorite moments from the day. | We began Inauguration Day by gathering at the Kunta Kinte-Alex Haley memorial in Annapolis to lay a wreath. It is here where two centuries ago, enslaved people arrived in this country against their will. As I was inaugurated the first Black governor of Maryland on the steps of a state capitol built by their hands, this day is a testament to the fact that progress is not inevitable, but progress is possible. Then, we walked hand in hand to government house to start Maryland’s next chapter. Together, we as a state march forward. My son James lead us in the pledge of allegiance. Dawn and I are so proud of him and his sister Mia — all three of them are my heart, my soul, and my everything. I took my oath of office on two bibles that day: the bible of Frederick Douglass and the bible of my grandfather, Rev. James Thomas. They embody what it means to be a leader and what it means to be an American. As Governor, I am committed to carrying on their legacies. I want you to see what I saw as I was inaugurated: this is our state in all its beauty, and this is who I’ll fight for every single day that I have the honor of being your governor. Later that evening, we got the party started in Baltimore at The People’s Ball, organized by Dawn and Aruna’s husband David. Together, they put on an amazing celebration featuring the talent, history, and creativity that every corner of our state has to offer — and a whole lot of dancing! I will remember this day for the rest of my life, and I thank you once again for all you’ve done to make it happen. Now, Aruna and I are already hard at work delivering on the promises we made and creating a state where we truly leave no one behind. Maryland’s future is so bright it is blinding. We will be intentional, inclusive, and disciplined in seizing the opportunities in front of us. Our future starts now. Elevate, Wes Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

#
Friend of life,

Live Action’s research team recently shared a heartbreaking study exposing Planned Parenthood’s secret to raking billions of dollars in profit.

The study analyzed young women based on the outcomes of their first pregnancies. The mothers who aborted their first babies had **4x more abortions over their lifetimes. **

4x. That’s the secret to Planned Parenthood’s profitability. They know that if they can convince a woman to have her first baby killed, they will have her on the hook for another abortion. **This is their strategy for 2023.**

**[Give now to reach an abortion-minded mom with the truth before it’s too late.](http://trk.readactnews.-ruiX-74gI7Nw)**

The co-author of the study rightly noted, _“A woman’s first pregnancy shapes the course of her life.”_ Unless a mother and all those influencing her decision can break out of Big Abortion’s sphere of deception by learning the truth, the consequence for her and for our culture at large is devastating.

**The good news is that you can reach a young woman with the truth and save her from a life of abortions by giving right now.[ https://give.liveaction.org/save-more-children-from-abortion-in-2023/](http://trk.readactnews.)**

The reason Planned Parenthood’s sex-ed propaganda spreads so quickly is that it is more accessible than the pro-life alternatives. Unfortunately, pro-life sex ed has often been outdated, uninteresting, or unavailable, and thus unable to attract the attention of modern teens.

That’s why we will be releasing sex ed resources this year that can be used by schools, parents, churches, and community groups to empower young women and men to discover a sexual ethic that leads to more life-long marriages and zero abortions.

We reach more young people online with viral content than any other pro-life organization. That’s why we have the unique experience and expertise to craft resources that will go viral instead of sitting unused on the shelf.

Teens will want to see these videos because they will be engaging, interesting, and unforgettable. The overarching message will resonate because it will focus on love and respect, which is what every woman and man desire.

But none of this happens without you.

Your gift right now will enable us to create the first-ever pro-life sexual health curriculum designed to go _viral_ and transform young minds from pro-death to pro-life.

Every dollar reaches 34 more people, so a gift of as little as $15 reaches more than 500 young people with life-saving TRUTH.

Click this link to make your lifesaving gift: [https://give.liveaction.org/save-more-children-from-abortion-in-2023/](http://trk.readactnews.)

Planned Parenthood thinks we don’t know what they’re up to. But we do, and together we can captivate young people with the truth about love and sex and deny Big Abortion its most reliable income, saving countless babies from violent death.

For life,

**Lila Rose**
Founder and President

body:

---
Dear Fellow Conservative, The anti-critical race theory movement is gaining traction both ideologically and politically. And that has progressives both outraged and panicked. They'll do anything they can to stop this movement. Their latest strategy is to distort the truth and mislead the American people so that they can continue to push their Marxist agenda. And they are using their friends in the establishment media and Big Tech to do so. But these lies are being unmasked and exposed by The Heritage Foundation. That's why I'm sending you this email today.
---
| | I'm told that you are an American who is concerned about the levels of indoctrination we've seen from Critical Race Theory--and what that could mean for the future of our country. **So, today,[I want to send you a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation's latest eBook, ](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zk6c4bc4a17p04ab9kerlroqciisqalsps0r0neg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdimaoj0cth2bs)**[**_The 5 Lies of CRT_****.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2ksggukohrqifa4acr11s9igg1o7hcptaibpe8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdimaoj0cth2bs)
---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlhfsbsfcdqsrtpoaem63as0lf5ej6t5ebav8qj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdimaoj0cth2bs)
---
| | Inside this important resource, you'll not only learn the 5 lies Progressives have employed in their campaign to push Critical Race Theory, but you'll also discover that:
* None of CRT's policy approaches would help people of any race or national origin.
* All of the biggest names pushing CRT have affirmed that they are promoting Marxism.
* The Left is using CRT to wage a battle royal for the soul of America--and even the West itself.

**You can get instant access to your FREE eBook right now using this secure link:[ https://secured.heritage.org/5lies-of-crt-ebook/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zb0636qebutjf9s69b1296d7nok3u90ojs2gsa58_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdimaoj0cth2bs)** As the Left ramps up their campaign through the power of the media and Big Tech, it is crucial that we inform as many people as possible with the truth about what is really going on. I hope this is a helpful resource for you. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe

name: Don Huffines
subject: Securing the freedom to own your own home
body:
We can completely eliminate the school property tax burden in just five steps No images? [Click here](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-e-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-x/) [](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-r/)
# Hello, patriots!
In October, the Huffines Liberty Foundation began a 3-part research initiative, [_A Roadmap To Abolishing School Property Taxes_](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-y/).Today we are releasing the third and final research paper in this series, [_Eliminating Texas' School M &O Property Tax in 8 Years_](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-j/).This paper provides a clear and comprehensive plan to completely eliminate the largest part of Texans' property tax burden _without_ reducing any funding for government schools. The only thing our plan reduces is your property tax bill!We can completely eliminate the school property tax burden in just five steps:
1. Limit annual state spending growth to no more than 2.9%
2. Allocate 90% of surplus funds created by the spending limit to property tax relief
3. Freeze and then reduce school property revenue each year until school M&O property taxes are eliminated
4. Require local governments to get the permission of voters to raise property tax rates above the "No New Revenue" tax rate
5. Ensure a future Legislature does not backtrack on its promises by making property tax relief permanent through the passage of an amendment to the Texas Constitution

In 8 years, depending on what the Texas Legislature does this session, the school M&O property tax will either be closing in on $50 billion or $0.So what's next?Our call to action is simple: we must **constitutionally limit annual state spending increases to 2.9%** , which will be the catalyst for eliminating school property taxes.

Please take a moment to read this paper and imagine the prosperity in Texas for homeowners and businesses if we abolished school property taxes.

For Liberty,

Noah Betz
Executive Director, Huffines Liberty Foundation [Read Paper 3 - Eliminating Texas' School M&O Property Tax in 8 Years](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-t/) [Read the Property Tax Summary Sheet](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-h/) [](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-k/)[](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-u/)[](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-o/) [Donate](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-b/) | [](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-n/) | [ Share ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Tweet ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-fjuhtud-yuddtktydi-z/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-fjuhtud-l-v)

| | Dear Fellow American, Does America need a "Great Reset?" In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuc0pgifnllj0tadpln79sdhupus8mgdsetc11p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdimaoj6clh2bs)****["](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0ksr73aiiavk3utb9l6dn90n2bi9s6h57si5bo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdimaoj6clh2bs) --is now available as a free online video series.**

| | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China's perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7pksdcjstubv1n44dbvvqd1k76496cj4n0vu878_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdimaoj6clh2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. name: Texas Redistricting [AOTL]
subject: Not on our watch.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We believe Texans deserve fair representation.
|
---

Redistricting update, team! Texas lawmakers are gearing up for another round of redistricting. Unfortunately, experts predict no significant changes to the maps but we are closely monitoring the process.
**The question is whether Texas conservatives will redraw the state's map without engaging the people.**
**Not on our watch!
[Donate today to help All On The Line advocate for more fair maps redraws. >> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57755996/389033561/-1728472691?refcode=20230124_AOTL_F_Txredistricting_RedLite&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyOWViOGYwLWMwOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rKP3jSjm7RhkMtcwyoN6Fw8c0aYNa0Kdw0cnOoQfy6w=)**
---
**We believe Texans deserve fair representation.** We are prepared to advocate for stronger protections for communities of interest, barring racial, partisan, or incumbent gerrymandering.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57755997/389033562/-1728472691?refcode=20230124_AOTL_F_Txredistricting_RedLite&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyOWViOGYwLWMwOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rKP3jSjm7RhkMtcwyoN6Fw8c0aYNa0Kdw0cnOoQfy6w=)
---
According to the Texas Demographic Center, communities of color have accounted for over 95% of growth during the previous decade. A significant adjustment to reflect an inclusive, fair map must be made.
_**What would an inclusive, fair legislative map include?**_ A new state legislative map should reflect this demographic shift and allow communities of color the opportunity to vote for their candidate of choice.
All On The Line’s organizers have sprung into action, **providing training for upcoming Texas’ public input hearings that start on January 25th.** Our teams are mobilizing volunteers to take action every month in 2023 to end gerrymandering across the nation.
[**Take action today to help All On The Line continue to have the resources to advocate for fair maps and redraws in places like Texas so all communities' voices are heard at the ballot box.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57755998/389033563/-1728472691?refcode=20230124_AOTL_F_Txredistricting_RedLite&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyOWViOGYwLWMwOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rKP3jSjm7RhkMtcwyoN6Fw8c0aYNa0Kdw0cnOoQfy6w=)

\-- All On The Line

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

_Text**FAIR** to **88228** to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: Lila Rose
subject: Are you still against abortion?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [ ](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
#
Friend of life,

Are you against abortion?

Over the last few months, many pro-life people have walked away from the fight and as a result, abortion is increasing across the country and pro-abortion activists are pushing to enshrine the ability to kill in state constitutions.

Roe v. Wade may be overturned, but the fight to save preborn lives is far from over.

You know abortion cruelly ends the lives of preborn babies, and these babies in danger of death have no voice to defend themselves. They need you to act right now on their behalf. Will you recommit to this fight and boldly declare you won’t rest until every community is safe for preborn children?

Planned Parenthood and her allies are counting on you to give up and walk away. They want 2023 to be the year that abortion becomes a permanent part of America. The only way we can stop them is by raising our voices and recommitting to this fight RIGHT NOW.

Please take 30 seconds and add your name to the pledge here: [https://www.liveaction.org/pledge-to-end-abortion/](http://trk.libertyledger.)

Thank you for your unwavering defense of preborn babies. You and I are truly their only hope.

**Lila Rose**
President and Founder
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201
P.O. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Abolish the ATF. Seriously.
body:
We're putting the ATF in our crosshairs.
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d-C3MYqTZpZ20M6ZHEhSll02huCkoJ81UXUrRyC90BtjF3LArGshMRuD4XHk59LA_L0Mqvi63CYeDMXATP1VEgSxiIlRV-zlDPDSTZXmR-XKbeQ8jFT4G5hPcDi8cCg6ya2t412PYcrRztDNCiYNiQ8Mj285Lyjttybd_JFcjP46EXtoe5hBBqJrAaU4ny-QNf0g4xZNVXwcd7OXcpuEtA==&c=BdrWJAg2guIuTW0zyXyXC7B7G3GdIess5XavwMN0pgYQJOP2P5Qacw==&ch=71ZXSvgSPzxzJJB8rMpEkrZvlF1IkUJsJpRSgdkuzGYu6edryKHKqg==)
---
| Peter,
---
| In my district in Florida, "alcohol, tobacco, and firearms" is just our idea of a good Friday night.
Not so in the D.C. Swamp...
There, the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms has become nothing more than a tool of converting otherwise law-abiding citizens into FELONS!
That's right, Peter - with yet another anti-2nd Amendment regulation being rolled out by Merrick Garland and these alphabet agency authoritarians, it's clear that the days of the ATF's unconstitutional tyranny MUST be brought to a swift end.
I'm not going to sit back while the power-hungry tyrants in the Biden Regime continue their unlawful assault on lawful gun owners! Instead, our MAGA Majority is taking a different approach...
Peter, I'm calling for the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms to be ABOLISHED, and [I want you to be a part of this movement! Join me today, and let's rid ourselves of these gun-grabbing tyrants FOR GOOD! >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d-C3MYqTZpZ20M6ZHEhSll02huCkoJ81UXUrRyC90BtjF3LArGshMRuD4XHk59LA_L0Mqvi63CYeDMXATP1VEgSxiIlRV-zlDPDSTZXmR-XKbeQ8jFT4G5hPcDi8cCg6ya2t412PYcrRztDNCiYNiQ8Mj285Lyjttybd_JFcjP46EXtoe5hBBqJrAaU4ny-QNf0g4xZNVXwcd7OXcpuEtA==&c=BdrWJAg2guIuTW0zyXyXC7B7G3GdIess5XavwMN0pgYQJOP2P5Qacw==&ch=71ZXSvgSPzxzJJB8rMpEkrZvlF1IkUJsJpRSgdkuzGYu6edryKHKqg==)

clean_body: We're putting the ATF in our crosshairs. | | | | == | Peter, | In my district in Florida, "alcohol, tobacco, and firearms" is just our idea of a good Friday night. Not so in the D.C. Swamp... There, the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms has become nothing more than a tool of converting otherwise law-abiding citizens into FELONS! That's right, Peter - with yet another anti-2nd Amendment regulation being rolled out by Merrick Garland and these alphabet agency authoritarians, it's clear that the days of the ATF's unconstitutional tyranny MUST be brought to a swift end. I'm not going to sit back while the power-hungry tyrants in the Biden Regime continue their unlawful assault on lawful gun owners! Instead, our MAGA Majority is taking a different approach... Peter, I'm calling for the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms to be ABOLISHED, and == | == | | == | Peter, we need to draw a line in the sand on this one, or else we may NEVER be able to reign in the Deep State that is being weaponized against us. We know that these Swamp bureaucracies already worked with Big Tech to censor Free Speech and rig an election against Donald J. Trump. We know that they already conspired to label concerned parents as "domestic terrorists." We know that they have been arming the IRS to the gills and forming a private militia of tax collectors. But now that one of the WORST of these bureaucracies is once again targeting the rights of AMERICANS to bear arms?! == I'm doing just that by calling for the ATF to be completely abolished altogether. I'm not kidding. I also know that a big undertaking like this won't be accomplished without the full support of our movement. == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Thanks for taking a stand, | == | Matt Gaetz Republican, Florida's 1st District | | | | | | == | == == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: LindseyGraham.com
subject: Who would you vote for in 2024?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
The pathway to a Republican presidential nomination and victory in 2024 runs right through South Carolina, so we are curious to know your thoughts about the potential candidates. |
---
Fellow American,

We're at the midpoint of the Biden Administration, and while his policies continue to destroy our nation, Republicans must build our game plan now to set the U.S. back on track in 2024.

If we want to undo the damage done by Joe Biden and the Democrats, we must ensure that a conservative takes back the White House.

_**Who is your pick, Fellow American?**_

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61423607:WWc44oDNU:m:1:877327319:AB42D837C2D556651BF077C5A13CF77E:r)

**[Flash Poll: If the Republican Primary for President was held today with the following potential candidates, who would you vote for?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61423607:WWc44oDNU:m:1:877327319:AB42D837C2D556651BF077C5A13CF77E:r)**

_(In alphabetical order)_
1. Governor Ron DeSantis (FL)
2. Former U.N. Ambassador Nikki Haley
3. Former Vice President Mike Pence
4. Former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo
5. Senator Tim Scott (SC)
6. Former President Donald J. Trump

**[>> Response needed before 11:59 pm <<](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61423607:WWc44oDNU:m:1:877327319:AB42D837C2D556651BF077C5A13CF77E:r)**
The pathway to the Republican presidential nomination and victory in 2024 runs right through South Carolina's First in the South Presidential Preference Primary, so we are curious to know your thoughts about the potential candidates.

**[Will you answer this Team Graham Flash Poll and share your opinion NOW?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61423607:WWc44oDNU:m:1:877327319:AB42D837C2D556651BF077C5A13CF77E:r)**

-Team Graham Polling

| [** PRESIDENTIAL POLL -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61423607:WWc44oDNU:m:1:877327319:AB42D837C2D556651BF077C5A13CF77E:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61423608:WWc44oDNU:m:1:877327319:AB42D837C2D556651BF077C5A13CF77E:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

clean_body: The pathway to a Republican presidential nomination and victory in 2024 runs right through South Carolina, so we are curious to know your thoughts about the potential candidates. | Fellow American, We're at the midpoint of the Biden Administration, and while his policies continue to destroy our nation, Republicans must build our game plan now to set the U.S. back on track in 2024. If we want to undo the damage done by Joe Biden and the Democrats, we must ensure that a conservative takes back the White House. Who is your pick, Fellow American? (In alphabetical order) 1. Governor Ron DeSantis (FL) 2. Former U.N. Ambassador Nikki Haley 3. Former Vice President Mike Pence 4. Former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo 5. Senator Tim Scott (SC) 6. Former President Donald J. Trump The pathway to the Republican presidential nomination and victory in 2024 runs right through South Carolina's First in the South Presidential Preference Primary, so we are curious to know your thoughts about the potential candidates. -Team Graham Polling | * In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: this will only take a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, can I get just a minute of your time?
There's zero doubt in my mind that Democrats couldn't have expanded our narrow Senate majority in November without the help of this grassroots team. **So as I launch my reelection campaign to defend Senate control again in 2024, I need your help to build a winning campaign strategy.**
Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ is saying that the GOP has a clear path to flip the Senate, and Mitch McConnell only needs to flip two seats blue to retake control. After Republicans in New York secured historic victories during the midterms elections, my seat is one they're targeting heading into the new cycle.
**We have a tough fight ahead of us. That's why I asked my team to put together a Reelection Strategy Focus Group for our most dedicated supporters to share their input — and that includes you, friend.**
**[So please, before we go over everyone's responses as a team tomorrow morning, will you share your thoughts in our Reelection Strategy Focus Group to help defeat the GOP in New York and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57759527/389045927/-1745775877?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3868-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGQ4ZWRjZi1jNTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SG1zAIiok4u2ii26_Ws1LyLlBxl4iZNxbYJpffip57I=&emci=eb385c62-8c96-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=14d8edcf-c59c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
