name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z77mo8ufnespltkh8ag8dvesml98fbbrpph1q0f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm0pr0s9h2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi8smc93cqhdu90j8g6lj9mhngp2re96n49ponhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm0pr0s9h2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp2hhk4k79gc6k2i5v45i8cc8nhm3a130k6c2p9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm0pr0s9h2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zebsm27qr1peuk5c9m97v7qjidsbnoj2tmsn4bag_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm0pr0s9h2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs84tcq4up4lvlu5cmrjp4a38sr64jp4ptniegoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm0pr0s9h2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlm31v5nk282c9avu1gk3mulu4s26ug7mdbpajc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm0pr0s9h2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1ij3trvpjca1um0tt2v7ofs5k9mcbmjde7pemq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm0pr0s9h2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpmdt2q6c17i5qqiobcs45gdogkhtsaqasohivo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm0pr0s9h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5gh3dhh3tlchbs45ub80rgsuq0t30o8ncq23sk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm0pr0s9h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5b6a6v21uotk1eqvp1vtilb8f6npl8o0cfen59o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm0pr0s9h2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2z8091afq72p668b17s4abdibo0qr6peb4srhvsho).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr7k7s70vsnlhgccflmprhqv018la3q6u85cjc30_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5hm6o37c3h649fg)

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0422%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=WrzKTCuQH9nxOKKEWmQNew&sysid=1)
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LN0%2b98ewiQ2wm483eOcpGw&sysid=1)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657867%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xZ5E%2brtTflLGa01VKeJdRQ&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657867%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xZ5E%2brtTflLGa01VKeJdRQ&sysid=1)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It’s been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn’t expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it’s all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor’s office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael’s back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael’s_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657868%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=19327lAU2vM81ztD63IMqQ&sysid=1)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657869%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fIwLnVMrEWmSvj%2f3DnxU1g&sysid=1)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657860%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tvlD0nLAPqgw58K%2fRNL0qA&sysid=1)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657861%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fhAVbMx0IcOEuaYgdc9bfQ&sysid=1)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657862%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cLrSwFZUInyQi5Qkds5S9A&sysid=1)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657863%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bBh2vphx1hG6O1ic9qgFxg&sysid=1)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657864%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RffYoURUHxB%2bkW%2fG9j2HeA&sysid=1)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we’re defending, please visit**www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0422%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=WrzKTCuQH9nxOKKEWmQNew&sysid=1)
clean_body: I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas. But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck. That's Michael in the photo. In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve. I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job. Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty. It’s been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years. What I didn’t expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need. I now realize that it’s all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist. Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats. Fear of losing their jobs. I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor’s office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael’s back. But I was wrong. So now Michael’s life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car. The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. My son suffered back and leg injuries. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. And then our whole world was rocked. Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court. We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we’re defending, please visitwww.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 11 years in prison for defending his son?
body:
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate who is on trial facing bogus politically motivated felony charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, over twenty FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail in front of his wife and kids.** Now Mark is facing the possibility of eleven years in a federal prison on multiple felony charges arising out of an incident involving an abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our Thomas More Society legal team is representing him in court RIGHT NOW. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=386d6d947b9d40cf86d0ec0dd1ea77f1&_e=ViwStQyWYrOnc9R4juxxs6OJrHqyjbPHWN-kygroMFhrc0_Bym7PZMhUl8exxJqndPvJNCWoqlCfMxJBi6BM43HAcYCTp6y6E8_sCr0g5hB_fN06oYfqIBEaQBx6ODgsPwpKl61ZOosIYpUXZNRzm9dqF2gRBV7C-t5TOCngh3GOVuwm1kvCdVI31kfWrvxIRAGgkcu3TSDadjv3BfLXc4wo1W5qn0pid9FTVBKux33PYGZ2z7fjYKrr5MjMTNKo-YVEDAx6ABjBdF1h7Rvj43lmQOM30c0WRCD_YxbQ-MYc3yeUCk5wQDITEHW49PeaoxR6ETaAoLR4prwM5Ea7hiGlhOxlmMuNh6BJVtNuFFVhiE94AZA9JKXr6q55F_GR) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, offering support to women who think they have no alternative but to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son with him. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating life and defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort - who are trying to destroy Mark and his family - don't get away with this. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in – by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=386d6d947b9d40cf86d0ec0dd1ea77f1&_e=ViwStQyWYrOnc9R4juxxs6OJrHqyjbPHWN-kygroMFhrc0_Bym7PZMhUl8exxJqndPvJNCWoqlCfMxJBi6BM43HAcYCTp6y6E8_sCr0g5hB_fN06oYfqIBEaQBx6ODgsPwpKl61ZOosIYpUXZNRzm9dqF2gRBV7C-t5TOCngh3GOVuwm1kvCdVI31kfWrvxIRAGgkcu3TSDadjv3BfLXc3oepOT4vA6KdZTX2Y5-WUEosWBlA3rGCtGHiKXTHFK3B9wHtUw5h1P6R45JVMlWeN4BZdUyp4QeSgPreP-y8xQVxwgJIDiPey6hW4QLj_eRFUOBZRWdvcZ1idkQwTZGYTKgL7h77E3hz3ETZqQwC816Tn5PAIhPxtz0YDjCuVmv) Make no mistake, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges, and when the escort filed charges himself, **his case was thrown out.** Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha, and I'm the President and Chief Counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom today, you can have an impact on the outcome by donating now to help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=386d6d947b9d40cf86d0ec0dd1ea77f1&_e=ViwStQyWYrOnc9R4juxxs6OJrHqyjbPHWN-kygroMFhrc0_Bym7PZMhUl8exxJqndPvJNCWoqlCfMxJBi6BM43HAcYCTp6y6E8_sCr0g5hB_fN06oYfqIBEaQBx6ODgsPwpKl61ZOosIYpUXZNRzm9dqF2gRBV7C-t5TOCngh3GOVuwm1kvCdVI31kfWrvxIRAGgkcu3TSDadjv3BfLXc2tZPoD_ifF1H4_SMilX6lSqIFChmD1CEldn5q3-o22VeTDEtWdegenL7btpN2k_RQ43ABMKJpQNJRb5tSjcL6rWUYRZW-ucX7Gd86A3EYuExDBp65QwDn0M9AgmcjWgGp6oiC8d9bJX2IvQLUGDIWjsXJhJDCK7K7VC2f51RxjR) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for crimes he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him, and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=386d6d947b9d40cf86d0ec0dd1ea77f1&_e=ViwStQyWYrOnc9R4juxxs6OJrHqyjbPHWN-kygroMFhrc0_Bym7PZMhUl8exxJqndPvJNCWoqlCfMxJBi6BM43HAcYCTp6y6E8_sCr0g5hB_fN06oYfqIBEaQBx6ODgsPwpKl61ZOosIYpUXZNRzm9dqF2gRBV7C-t5TOCngh3GOVuwm1kvCdVI31kfWrvxIRAGgkcu3TSDadjv3BfLXc2C7zrETy2PxFa35tBK4r2Kil8chTNWZUevCdN30fOBk52bhY9Xyy1jNlpYWEPwDXQGPQAnMedxW7xoFzBVdcJ9kRKGIgYf-ETCkB-C_7Se2G6rdp0EvEpzYPHXioaY3zVfULCS1ygK3S6RyYRZEPU5uwaiG46cTmpgIXeLCJFoj) I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
---
President & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=386d6d947b9d40cf86d0ec0dd1ea77f1&_e=ViwStQyWYrOnc9R4juxxs6OJrHqyjbPHWN-kygroMFhrc0_Bym7PZMhUl8exxJqndPvJNCWoqlCfMxJBi6BM43HAcYCTp6y6E8_sCr0g5hB_fN06oYfqIBEaQBx6ODgsPwpKl61ZOosIYpUXZNRzm9dqF2gRBV7C-t5TOCngh3GOVuwm1kvCdVI31kfWrvxIRAGgkcu3TSDadjv3BfLXc3tPpdbLYSV2-JQBpGiNYyEtGf-msuK2KWzKq7xZ87NRnm8nfbcDxdgCmi9474QpEC6LNbvvFVzdM1zv5EDpy2jQTx8SIRRs7lDHxDeH5yq6hhBU9M379SndvLNkT1cUMGA8TzPJvNCFZwKBZx-_uuEEyFui0vOqhEBOqA0ld6e2)

---

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: Biden’s Crime Family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
You won’t believe what Democrats are pushing now

name: Jessica Anderson, Executive Director | Heritage Action
subject: Biden’s visit to the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
And here’s why he finally made the trip.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbkgeuvconecnu7r3f8ko9lus2grfmee5gs0btpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhmcp37c5h2bs)
---
Hey friend, after two years of avoiding the crisis and ignoring the pleas of border states, Joe Biden has _finally_ visited the southern border. **But don’t be fooled. ** Joe Biden didn’t wake up one day and suddenly want to secure our border. **This is all a cover-up. **** ** **The Biden administration's incompetence and deliberate decisions: ** **❌ Endangered** American citizens and immigrants**❌ Allowed **deadly drugs to flood into our neighborhoods**❌ Essentially Relinquished** operational control of the border to the cartels **❌ Gave taxpayer money to NGOs** to help move illegal immigrants throughout America _(The extent of this NGO operation was first uncovered by The Heritage Foundation’s government oversight project)._
---
[**DEMAND ANSWERS AND SECURE BORDERS: $10**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdld527c9t48nfq61apq3gijeenrhpfs1acm9mh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhmcp37c5h2bs)
---
While Biden plays theater at our border and makes the crisis even worse, we need our **NEW** conservative majority in the House to put forth a robust and aggressive border security agenda that includes... **➡️ Investigating** the Biden administration and the taxpayer-funded NGOs responsible for bring this crisis into every state in America **➡️ Impeaching** Secretary Mayorkas for dereliction of duty at the border. **➡️ Securing **our border with much-needed physical and technological infrastructure **[Friend, will you join Heritage Action’s effort to demand answers and secure borders by chipping in to fuel our movement?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmbchjjrpcm0qlt5va3flb28hlues5lq0b249128_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhmcp37c5h2bs)**
---

---
Thank you,Jessica AndersonExecutive Director, Heritage Action

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition to the Justice Department: Challenge all state abortion bans that violate federal law
body:
End illegal state abortion bans
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85766422-d51d-4bed-9056-f2db369312f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, The Biden administration helped expand access to medication abortion with the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) finalizing a rule to make the pills more readily available in pharmacies. This is very important as about half of the country could ultimately ban or heavily limit abortion access since the U.S. Supreme Court’s overturn of _Roe v. Wade_. Expanding the availability of abortion pills gives more Americans an opportunity to access this medical care. [**Sign the petition to the U.S. Department of Justice: Challenge all state abortion bans that violate federal law.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdabda922-a69f-4b39-b6f7-bc9f0c85f592/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Medication abortion care is a safe, effective, non-invasive option for ending an early pregnancy. But despite federal regulations and expanded access, some states are still trying to enact full dictatorship over bodily autonomy. Just days after the FDA announcement, Alabama, which has a near-total ban in place, announced the intention to criminally prosecute people who use abortion pills to terminate a pregnancy. In Florida, Gov. Ron DeSantis wasted no time in sending an ‘ignore the federal government’ note to medical providers.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68779e92-5325-44ee-8d9f-f4ac83fbcdc4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| When federal and state law is in conflict, federal law prevails. **The Department of Justice must use its power to challenge all state bans that violate federal law.** If banning abortion is no longer unconstitutional, it is imperative that we use every method at our disposal to restore abortion access. From the grassroots level, to state legislatures, to the Oval Office, we all have a part to play—and this is the DOJ’s. [**Sign the petition to the U.S. Department of Justice: Challenge all state abortion bans that violate federal law.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4997b1d0-f7c3-41af-849e-d61f641b380f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for standing up for reproductive healthcare for all, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. clean_body: End illegal state abortion bans | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, The Biden administration helped expand access to medication abortion with the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) finalizing a rule to make the pills more readily available in pharmacies. This is very important as about half of the country could ultimately ban or heavily limit abortion access since the U.S. Supreme Court’s overturn of Roe v. Wade. Expanding the availability of abortion pills gives more Americans an opportunity to access this medical care. Medication abortion care is a safe, effective, non-invasive option for ending an early pregnancy. But despite federal regulations and expanded access, some states are still trying to enact full dictatorship over bodily autonomy. Just days after the FDA announcement, Alabama, which has a near-total ban in place, announced the intention to criminally prosecute people who use abortion pills to terminate a pregnancy. In Florida, Gov. Ron DeSantis wasted no time in sending an ‘ignore the federal government’ note to medical providers. | | | | | | | | When federal and state law is in conflict, federal law prevails. The Department of Justice must use its power to challenge all state bans that violate federal law. If banning abortion is no longer unconstitutional, it is imperative that we use every method at our disposal to restore abortion access. From the grassroots level, to state legislatures, to the Oval Office, we all have a part to play—and this is the DOJ’s. body:

| | | **FOR YOUR EYES ONLY: MESSAGE FROM SPEAKER MCCARTHY**
Friend, thanks to YOUR SUPPORT, Republicans have taken back the House and are ready to get to work for Americans across the nation.

But Biden has the White House & Schumer has the Senate. We are now the ONLY thing standing between the elitist radical agenda of Biden and hardworking Americans like you.

Whether or not we reach our fundraising goal by midnight tonight will define what happens for the next two years.

**We need 100 patriots from every zip code in the nation to step up by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**

If we fail, the last two years will just look like a warmup when the devastating consequences of their radical policies hit home.
**Will you stand with us?**

---

name: Matt Gaetz, R-FL
subject: Abolish the ATF. Seriously.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62247744:JID3PdGNw:m:1:3331421248:7542CEF91CA6F5C6EE938AB7F533AEED:r)
---
| | Peter,

In my district in Florida, "alcohol, tobacco, and firearms" is just our idea of a good Friday night. _Not so in the D.C. Swamp..._ There, the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms has become nothing more than a tool for converting otherwise law-abiding citizens into FELONS! **That's right, with yet another anti-2nd Amendment regulation being rolled out by Merrick Garland and these alphabet agency authoritarians, it's clear that the days of the ATF's unconstitutional tyranny MUST be brought to a swift end.** I'm not going to sit back while the power-hungry tyrants in the Biden Regime continue their unlawful assault on lawful gun owners! Instead, our MAGA Majority is taking a different approach... **I'm calling for the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms to be ABOLISHED**, and [_**I want you to be a part of this movement! Join me today, and let's rid ourselves of these gun-grabbing tyrants FOR GOOD! >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62247744:JID3PdGNw:m:1:3331421248:7542CEF91CA6F5C6EE938AB7F533AEED:r)

---
| We need to draw a line in the sand on this one, or else we may NEVER be able to reign in the Deep State that is being weaponized against us. We know that these Swamp bureaucracies already worked with Big Tech to censor Free Speech and rig an election against Donald J. Trump. We know that they already conspired to label concerned parents as "domestic terrorists." We know that they have been arming the IRS to the gills and forming a private militia of tax collectors. **But now that one of the WORST of these bureaucracies is again targeting AMERICANS' rights to bear arms?!

[__WE HAVE TO TAKE IMMEDIATE ACTION!__](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62247744:JID3PdGNw:m:1:3331421248:7542CEF91CA6F5C6EE938AB7F533AEED:r)** **I'm doing just that by calling for the ATF to be completely abolished altogether. I'm not kidding.** I also know that a big undertaking like this won't be accomplished without the full support of our movement.** [So if you want the ATF's grimy hands off YOUR lawful firearms, will you please join me with a boost of support towards this ABOLISH THE ATF FUND today??](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62247744:JID3PdGNw:m:1:3331421248:7542CEF91CA6F5C6EE938AB7F533AEED:r)**

name: Patty Murray
subject: A victory for pregnant & nursing workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Add your name to keep making progress.
#
Peter,
Across the country, pregnant workers have been pushed out of their jobs because their employers couldn’t be bothered to provide the most basic workplace accommodations.
Pregnant women should never have to make a decision between a healthy pregnancy and a paycheck. And with some reasonable workplace accommodations — like an extra break to use the bathroom, a stool to sit on, or an exemption from heavy lifting — many pregnant workers would not be forced into that situation.
Working moms are often faced with similar issues when they need time and space to pump so they can keep breastfeeding their babies. A reasonable break and private place to pump should not be too much to ask for moms in the workplace.
**In the Senate, I worked hard to pass the Pregnant Workers Fairness Act, a bipartisan bill that will require employers to provide important accommodations for their pregnant employees — and I’m so proud that we were able to pass it and get it signed into law as part of the year-end funding package.**
**I am also thrilled that the PUMP Act is now law, too. This bill helps close loopholes that leave millions of working women without accommodations for pumping and breastfeeding.**
**[We got this legislation over the finish line, but there is still more work ahead to protect workers’ rights and create an economy that works for everyone, including pregnant workers and working moms. Add your name now if you’re with me in the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57764524/389065100/-1038052344?refcode=pm_em_230124_1&ms=pm_em_230124_1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDljZTc2Ni1kMjljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcDwSZDc05wod7G_LkH8NLWAksJHPtPMZHicnOAFZEI=&emci=5c0ddb27-8f9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=d09ce766-d29c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Patty Murray

clean_body: Add your name to keep making progress. Peter, Across the country, pregnant workers have been pushed out of their jobs because their employers couldn’t be bothered to provide the most basic workplace accommodations. Pregnant women should never have to make a decision between a healthy pregnancy and a paycheck. And with some reasonable workplace accommodations — like an extra break to use the bathroom, a stool to sit on, or an exemption from heavy lifting — many pregnant workers would not be forced into that situation. Working moms are often faced with similar issues when they need time and space to pump so they can keep breastfeeding their babies. A reasonable break and private place to pump should not be too much to ask for moms in the workplace. In the Senate, I worked hard to pass the Pregnant Workers Fairness Act, a bipartisan bill that will require employers to provide important accommodations for their pregnant employees — and I’m so proud that we were able to pass it and get it signed into law as part of the year-end funding package. I am also thrilled that the PUMP Act is now law, too. This bill helps close loopholes that leave millions of working women without accommodations for pumping and breastfeeding. Thank you, Patty Murray ** As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2r5ljqmjkf6ckifthkp3r47rjlvfbcj18ec95n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm9o37c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z15ttjqp6o7qaa3a3f5oqlvldoj3tjdvvutec2k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm9o37c1h2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdrhhjlr4gl1psjp5rpu2pmsl9isfqb7oub57cr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm9o37c1h2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvlr5cjfv5m7f0fcp07sroe96g4ofs1va97evu80_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm9o37c1h2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z52i9i13g6chmnioqk6ef7ef7jnhpu80qmknss30_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm9o37c1h2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zua5d9d3984a48cpo9a9uvi9i46nr0v4m5855fqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdhm9o37c1h2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|

# **
The Feds's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=855085922f4e44afadf1e55130990585&_e=bN0TIclEB1WZulBX9uQ1-tePPZ-56T2Pan5IzmlZnFodS1MMKX9qTEvOBNPYQSbD_sKau9B-hvhm0MnM3OaZ0C1jCCAG-JhI1WyRigLhTAVXw1Qm9WCY8Xa_POv0t7eV1w2Jp_OckVDmDfg_AopwkXW6Sn9uhm3gxQVdnLGmOBYCbIfeTcyroBDtOXl6KKfLoGkk1X9bvG6eU9pQsxyMdz4nhLc_CWdc-S5fUGJytZCJX_2uq4pAw5nYoWFz0h5EMEgxPRrIzfenkuTdH7DSgBIT-XNTIPIJSGG4LJzKuJBhhHcRXGIAeu7DbdvzGhCb).
**Our government will know what you have, where you have it, and how you are spending it.** This is the ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=855085922f4e44afadf1e55130990585&_e=bN0TIclEB1WZulBX9uQ1-tePPZ-56T2Pan5IzmlZnFodS1MMKX9qTEvOBNPYQSbD_sKau9B-hvhm0MnM3OaZ0C1jCCAG-JhI1WyRigLhTAVXw1Qm9WCY8Xa_POv0t7eV1w2Jp_OckVDmDfg_AopwkXW6Sn9uhm3gxQVdnLGmOBbNYJK1zdEjXbATKJjOiW6N4GPXBRQNHjtxDojIggcxcQFALbRigFqZ5l_vALWwi_5D0eBL4ArwrwIiuTiIGGN2x1E28sxBr9JmHyO9yXdY2gXbeEoYCZMw-ZzuLpBM7fUQ_dzmnqqjDlxK1Bj__XqB) unless obtaining their approval at first.
Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.
**They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are not in a[ "Financial Rat-Lab"](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=855085922f4e44afadf1e55130990585&_e=bN0TIclEB1WZulBX9uQ1-tePPZ-56T2Pan5IzmlZnFodS1MMKX9qTEvOBNPYQSbD_sKau9B-hvhm0MnM3OaZ0C1jCCAG-JhI1WyRigLhTAVXw1Qm9WCY8Xa_POv0t7eV1w2Jp_OckVDmDfg_AopwkXW6Sn9uhm3gxQVdnLGmOBaRgg34siXDNuNiOZRAJcmVRZKp1_hA5v5wV-Pw-nfhR2qLsXUqO7CIR6Ugl_Kv30ONf-YwiMp8SVfvLR2vx6QtJy0SJAG2ympswym_zOg_4GS7lytoEN0ED8n1igCejntsx11unKrwdzk1O-gl4Wwp). Enough is Enough, we have suffered greatly. **
Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway.
You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.
Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. [Get more information.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=855085922f4e44afadf1e55130990585&_e=bN0TIclEB1WZulBX9uQ1-tePPZ-56T2Pan5IzmlZnFodS1MMKX9qTEvOBNPYQSbD_sKau9B-hvhm0MnM3OaZ0C1jCCAG-JhI1WyRigLhTAVXw1Qm9WCY8Xa_POv0t7eV1w2Jp_OckVDmDfg_AopwkXW6Sn9uhm3gxQVdnLGmOBb8RKZCaY-EkDIviIjbftRnVwsvYw0noNzvELDXvkBspajCRCyjESDm9iwkXS6tC7vwyEnFEkQv8EmbIdKFg1UQNU8K2ZAlGPlKj7S94ohNwzyOpbD6KfABp8Tcc61f0UqDRLX4MZtqBKcRXLUmdWYM)
There has never been a more urgent time to understand the role of gold and how to own it. Taking control back of both your privacy and your retirement wealth are key. Investing in gold and silver can help you sit back and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with protecting your retirement.
The time on missing on great opportunities is over. **[Act today!](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=855085922f4e44afadf1e55130990585&_e=bN0TIclEB1WZulBX9uQ1-tePPZ-56T2Pan5IzmlZnFodS1MMKX9qTEvOBNPYQSbD_sKau9B-hvhm0MnM3OaZ0C1jCCAG-JhI1WyRigLhTAVXw1Qm9WCY8Xa_POv0t7eV1w2Jp_OckVDmDfg_AopwkXW6Sn9uhm3gxQVdnLGmOBasPwDcbo_mgCyi1RHhXtkrV1PQhCMrH-YAMpIjo-HqZ3NKZ0sZ-mtb1UZWzXCrRj4KRtLoppUNjtnTVGR3ZyCnEfcmckaMMB7rp9xVZ26jtg6xaSowiBGcCPO-eyfmPhetH3layMNP6tK5o3-O4njK)** Explore, 100% free, how gold inside your retirement can significantly improve your future wealth.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0424%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qEwBWxqAUIForzbljBQA4g&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657876%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vD%2fiTN4P9rrUDx3PVrlH4A&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657876%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vD%2fiTN4P9rrUDx3PVrlH4A&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657877%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QFSwY%2fB7Z2GTKha4ijo6xw&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657878%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PubQw74I0MMgCEakzHs%2bjQ&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657876%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vD%2fiTN4P9rrUDx3PVrlH4A&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657879%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WeKpEc0aB7VVKZqjoiWdog&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657870%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XR5td%2bQm3k2Rbi%2b2X0UCDg&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657871%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=juFqTJDW%2fc1JFguTJHHkhQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657872%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vwj9Dpv8by6yC7RFDX%2bKbg&sysid=1)

clean_body: I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our country. But our work is far from over, and Democrats are counting on this grassroots team to continue building the strongest party in history. | | We’ve come so far together, Derek. We’ve created millions of new jobs, expanded access to affordable health care, made historic investments in climate, infrastructure, and veterans benefits, and signed the most significant gun legislation in three decades. I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our country. But our work is far from over. Kamala and I are counting on this grassroots team to continue building the strongest Democratic Party in history. The DNC is the only party organization tasked with winning elections for Democrats at every level -- in state legislatures, governor’s offices, Congress, and more. Last year they ran innovative organizing, data, tech, and voter protection programs to secure our Senate majority, flip gubernatorial seats in Arizona, Maryland, and Massachusetts, and win state legislative chambers in Michigan, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgugc9hoep06d80bqdhan6suev0kouenvhm3sj80_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm0pb2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu5hrjfn5a09o2i13t2nhaed1j1k6l3uq87cl640_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm0pb2c3h2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zid6716iosg7scuujqt417ris84cvk657cvv0hg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm0pb2c3h2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1e97ee2nskvi63ntk2tp64fpb52vqtc4a0vnpu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm0pb2c3h2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaubfic217mvrq9nf9sic32atss9inle9vhn8s28_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm0pb2c3h2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm8hpat5aqr3r4f5homkbj3v4hv03horc6im6b6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm0pb2c3h2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9qag92cs2vffu5irqluq6rjdl2c4mghpoaj7p4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm0pb2c3h2bs)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need to be able to count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18872?t=1001&akid=2923%2E346206%2E2dQaCa ][IMG]

Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little
bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the
year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just
$20 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my
energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the
link: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18872?t=1002&akid=2923%2E346206%2E2dQaCa ]https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18862?t=1003&akid=2923%2E346206%2E2dQaCa

Peter – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP
spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were
doubting whether we could win.

My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising
investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were
making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might
that the funding will come through.

Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign
has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton
of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important
supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18872?t=1004&akid=2923%2E346206%2E2dQaCa ]Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to help us retire our
debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Charles Booker,
and I’d be grateful for anything you can give.

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now,
we just have to finish this thing off.

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230125-2923-footer&t=1005&refcode2=2923_346206_2dQaCa&akid=2923%2E346206%2E2dQaCa

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2923%2E346206%2E2dQaCa

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7810%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=LW3JQpto2zzg6XK8J0h0Fw&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93932%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V6QETTvTEOtX4HfaJUlBHA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93932%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V6QETTvTEOtX4HfaJUlBHA&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93933%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T8mi83JF81dyIQXkVbtOHg&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93934%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=76KHS2NUm2xRiO24MtoTIg&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93932%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V6QETTvTEOtX4HfaJUlBHA&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93945%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LztnoEGiszbaaKVaG%2beTKA&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93946%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HXiWNw97qrNeMxhV2CYD9Q&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93947%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f6ZluVZBOwl5ca7TL%2fPm3w&sysid=1)
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93948%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=STbayGaZJy63H4jguZga3w&sysid=1)

Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: Is this Biden’s attempt at Repentance?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
It's fallen on you and me to make sure Black People know the truth about the Dems!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62247784:6vZafdGNu:m:1:3331421248:1CD885F63E3F7F0A27733AE29EA24404:r "Headline") Peter: The only way Biden and the Left think they can keep Black people voting for the Democrat Party is to lie to our faces. And just the other day as America honored the late Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr, Brandon struck again. This time, he boasted about his attendance at Black churches during the civil rights movement. **While the evidence proves he didn 't, Biden doesn't care.** He just keeps hoping that if he repeats a lie long enough, people will believe him. The problem is, as we get closer and closer to Biden launching his reelection campaign, this lie and others like it, could help him remain in the White House! The driveby media has done everything they can to prop Grandpa Joe up and it's fallen on you and me to make sure Black People know the truth - that the Democrats aren't their allies... they just want to keep Black voters in their place and trust the Left... because they know what's best for us! **[If we're going to succeed in stopping Black people from voting blindly for Biden and Democrat candidates, we need your donation today to help New Journey PAC expand our efforts in the Black community. Chip in today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62247784:6vZafdGNu:m:1:3331421248:1CD885F63E3F7F0A27733AE29EA24404:r "If we’re going to succeed in stopping Black people from
voting blindly for Biden and Democrat candidates, we need your $25, $50, or $100 donation today to help New Journey PAC expand our efforts in the
Black community. Chip in today!")** **My name is James Golden, but you may know me better as Bo Snerdley - the man behind the glass listening to the one and only Rush Limbaugh for more than 30 years.** As I reflect on my time with the great El Rushbo, I always appreciated that he dealt in facts. That's how he fought the liberals for so long. Here are some facts I think every American should know about Brandon:
* Joe Biden once said, about Black parents, _" we bring social workers into homes of parents to help them deal with how to raise their children. ... **They don't know quite what to do. "**_
* [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62247784:6vZafdGNu:m:1:3331421248:1CD885F63E3F7F0A27733AE29EA24404:r "Biden")In 1994, Brandon sponsored a crime bill that is now responsible for placing more people of color in jail, than any other law since the founding of this nation and he called black men **" super predators" while** trying to convince colleagues to support him.
* The photo to the side is Joe Biden campaigning with Senator Bobby Byrd - **a former member of the KKK** (and a Democrat). Biden even delivered the eulogy at his funeral.
* Even the Washington Post's fact-checker gave him 4 Pinocchios for lying about the new Georgia voting laws opposed by his friend Stacey Abrams.

**Let 's face facts, just like the Democrat Party, the truth is that Joe Biden is an old racist.** When it comes to HELPING the Black community live the American Dream, Biden and the Democrats have NEVER stood up for Black America, and they never will. They want us beholden to them, unable to fend for ourselves, living as victims. **[I founded the New Journey PAC to show the Black community the hypocrisy in our system and that a better way forward was possible if they stop believing the Democrats' lies. Will you help me spread these truths to increase our outreach for 2024 with your donation today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62247784:6vZafdGNu:m:1:3331421248:1CD885F63E3F7F0A27733AE29EA24404:r "I founded the New Journey PAC to show the Black community the
hypocrisy in our system and that a better way forward was possible if they stop believing the Democrats’ lies. Will you help me spread these
truths to increase our outreach for 2024 with your $50, $100, or $250 donation today?")** **We are leading the fight to make Black America Conservative Again, and we are winning. 2022 saw great strides in bringing Black voters to the GOP.** Black America needs conservative leaders _like Tim Scott, John James, Byron Donalds, Winsome Sears and Wesley Hunt_ , not more condescending racism from Democrats like Joe Biden and AOC's Squad. **It 's time to embark on a New Journey and show Black America that they are not victims anymore.** It's why we must continue to build upon our success. **[Join our Movement and donate $100, $500, or $1,000 today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62247784:6vZafdGNu:m:1:3331421248:1CD885F63E3F7F0A27733AE29EA24404:r "Join our Movement and donate $100, $500, or $1,000 today.")** Joe Biden will tell any lie to stay in power and the media will never call him on it. If we are going to stand against him, we have to stand together. I need every Conservative reading this email to stand with me. **[Please, donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62247784:6vZafdGNu:m:1:3331421248:1CD885F63E3F7F0A27733AE29EA24404:r "Please, donate today.")** For a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62247784:6vZafdGNu:m:1:3331421248:1CD885F63E3F7F0A27733AE29EA24404:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, aka Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC
---

NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE**
