subject: It's Official 🌟
body:
| | | | | Peter,We’re coming to you with great news! The Zelenko Freedom Foundation has officially been approved as a 501(c)(3) tax exempt organization - the first of it’s kind in the medical freedom space.That’s right. We are organized exclusively to provide funding to social entities and social activities surrounding education, leadership development, health literacy, advocacy, public policy, social, health and community development. These activities will include, but are not limited to, events, workshops, grants, research funding and limited scholarships.And we are doing it for the RIGHT reasons.While the globalist community has their Open Society Foundations and the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation - we now have something to directly counter what they are doing: The Zelenko Freedom Foundation.Now that we are officially a tax-exempt organization, we need your help to grow our funding EXPONENTIALLY to be able to fight back against the medical tyranny that has gone on for the past three years.
---
| [DONATE TO THE FIGHT AGAINST MEDICAL TYRANNY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=79c91dc1bc&e=fdefed58de)
---
The Zelenko Freedom Foundation is an organization devoted to educating the public about how to protect their health and fight for their rights as patients and consumers. For years, we have worked to share valuable information with the world that is often being suppressed by Silicon Valley oligarchs and corrupt corporate interests. In collusion with our own government, these corporate thugs put pure greed ahead of the American public.We have all come to understand that the COVID virus was man made and was treatable from the outset. The COVID “pandemic” was all about the two things the leftists crave the most: MONEY AND POWER.Let’s join together in taking BOTH away from them!**DONATE TO THE ZELENKO FOUNDATION TODAY TO BECOME A FREEDOM FIGHTER!**
| [BECOME A FREEDOM FIGHTER TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ac70ba8302&e=fdefed58de)
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3856e5baf3&e=fdefed58de)
In addition to exposing government and corporate lies about COVID, the Zelenko Foundation aims to invest in the future of America to make sure this doesn’t happen again. We want to train people to gain access to the healthcare industry and technology that will shape our future and preserve our God given rights. We want to incubate a prestigious group of young professionals who will go forth to make a difference and become leaders in their communities and industry... **and will stand firmly in favor of medical freedom!** But we can’t fight tyranny and educate the next generation of freedom fighting healthcare workers without funding. Your support of our mission is what will make us successful. We here at the Foundation are carrying on the vision of our founder, Vladimir “Zev” Zelenko, MD, who was a Nobel Peace Prize Nominee and a board certified physician in the US.
| [DONATE NOW: FIGHT BACK!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ebbe8cf55d&e=fdefed58de)
---
We are counting on you to help us grow this organization into something that can truly rival what the Left is doing.We are uniquely positioned to be able to fight back and effectively create the change needed. We will continue to update you, but right now, we need to ask for your help.Please click below to contribute a tax-exempt donation that will help us to reshape the future of this nation in the mold of **LIBERTY** rather than tyranny!
| [SUPPORT THE Z FREEDOM FOUNDATION TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=12fbe65741&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you and God Bless you,
Kevin Jenkins & Ann Vandersteel, Co-Chairs
Zelenko Freedom Foundation
|

See It Here “OK, Very Shady” Bill Maher Calls Out Joe Biden’s Classified Documents Late-night talk show host Bill Maher, host of HBO’s “Real Time with Bill Maher,” commented on the classified document controversy President Biden is dealing with in a way his left-wing fans may not enjoy. Maher, a Democrat, has been a right-wing token of sorts in recent years, even going as far as to appear for a sit-down interview with Daily Wire founder Ben Shapiro. name: Charles Harper, Evergreen Action
subject: 📺 The two pollution rules Biden must use ASAP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
He's running out of time. We have to spread the word.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4425?t=2&akid=13245%2E53494%2Eecjxeb) Friend, President Biden has yet to use his two most effective climate tools, and if he keeps delaying, he could lose the chance to use them at all. I break those rules down in our latest Evergreen Explains—we need to spread the word and call on Biden and EPA to go further, faster. [_**Will you take three minutes to watch and share my video about this crucial climate opportunity at risk of being squandered?**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4425?t=3&akid=13245%2E53494%2Eecjxeb) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4425?t=4&akid=13245%2E53494%2Eecjxeb) | [WATCH NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4425?t=5&akid=13245%2E53494%2Eecjxeb)
---
As Evergreen's power sector policy lead, I helped determine that if Biden wants to meet his climate goals, he **must** set ambitious pollution standards for power plants.
That's because updating the two EPA rules that regulate power plants could cut power sector pollution by 25% by 2030. That's huge! But EPA keeps delaying these two rules, and now they're in danger of not getting done at all.
[_**Not on our watch. That's why I'm asking you to watch and share my video today—we need to raise awareness about the super-effective climate tools Biden's leaving on the table.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4425?t=6&akid=13245%2E53494%2Eecjxeb)
[WATCH + SHARE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4425?t=7&akid=13245%2E53494%2Eecjxeb)
---
Onward,
Charles Harper
Power Sector Policy Lead, Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=13245%2E53494%2Eecjxeb). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

I learned as a U.S. Army Green Beret that no great mission is achieved alone, Peter. And that’s true from the halls of Congress to the battlefields of Afghanistan. Who you surround yourself with matters, Peter, and I want to make sure I have the best team possible by my side. That’s why I need YOU on my team. In Service, Col. subject: The most important election this spring
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rapid Resist Action
body:
We can make a difference with your help

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57770915/389090862/-1758635200?refcode=EM_FR_230125WISupremeCourtRESEND_ML_90do_9_N_TESTA_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWQwYmNlYi1lZDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAexTpAEIZiv9DhnNT6qDSuwpY71h8beK4p247gYg-A=)
Team,
We’ve already told you that 2023 is not an off-year. **But that’s especially true in Wisconsin right now.**
For more than a decade, Wisconsin Republicans have dominated the state legislature, repeatedly gerrymandering their districts to hold power. **They restricted voting rights and reproductive rights to extreme levels.** And they’ve gotten away with it due to a conservative Wisconsin Supreme Court siding with them on every issue.
Thankfully, we have a chance to flip the balance of the court this spring. In roughly one month, candidates for an open Wisconsin Supreme Court seat will compete in a nonpartisan primary, and we’re working to boost turnout to make sure at least one progressive candidate makes it to the general.
**[Team, we have a chance to make progress in Wisconsin and move the state more solidly back into the blue column for future elections. But it requires at least one of the progressive candidates to make it to an April general election. Can you donate $10 or more right now to help us fund our GOTV turnout in Wisconsin for the next four weeks?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57770916/389090863/-1758635200?refcode=EM_FR_230125WISupremeCourtRESEND_ML_90do_9_N_TESTA_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWQwYmNlYi1lZDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GAexTpAEIZiv9DhnNT6qDSuwpY71h8beK4p247gYg-A=)**

With good turnout, we could ensure a flip of this seat in just four weeks and change the balance of power on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.

name: BACKROADS PAC
subject: Are you a 2023 Founding Donor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Grassroots support is at the core of every successful campaign and movement

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57758959/389043882/1955960297?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230124-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjZlNThkNS1jNDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EvZDkG70jtuEsFFxv1DHiY6I0qVAxvbN8wlu-jVxaFw=)
---
| Peter,

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We wanted to talk to you about the role VoteVets plays in strengthening our gun laws.
#
Derek -
As you know there have been a number of tragic mass shooting over the last few days.
So we wanted to talk to you about the role VoteVets plays in strengthening our gun laws.
The truth is, one of the big debates in Congress is whether weapons of war belong on our streets, much less in the hands of people who have no idea how to use them safely and responsibly.
The far-right will point to the military and say 18-year-olds can join and use these weapons.
Yes. But in the military, we are trained to handle these weapons and store them safely. Before we even fire at the range for the first time, there are safety classes and lessons on how to use these weapons responsibly. And we also re-qualify to use them annually.
We know better than anyone that these weapons aren’t toys. We aren’t safer or freer as a society when someone with little training is able to buy and use these weapons on the streets.
Our perspective matters in this debate. Just like it did when Congress passed the first major gun safety legislation in almost 30 years.
But we cannot do this alone. So we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a contribution to VoteVets today to help us elevate the voices of Veterans on the issue of gun safety? We have a critical role to play in strengthening our gun laws, but we cannot do it alone.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230125-1-15&t=1&akid=7302%2E3013755%2EAYV5W2)

| | | [Tell the GA state Judge to Release the Grand Jury Report on Trump's Attempt to Steal 2020 Election >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2366e88-4a9c-4c1a-a01b-1458d63184b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | **Right now** , **a Georgia state judge is considering whether to release a grand jury report detailing Donald Trump's attempt to subvert the 2020 election results** in that state (where he infamously told officials to "find" enough votes for him to win). The report is the product of a [year-long investigation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f1a0770-a713-4ff6-a306-19556f42d866/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and **the grand jury itself recommended its release.** And Judge Robert McBurney should follow that recommendation. **Trump remains a clear and present danger to our democracy and our nation, and America needs to know the full extent of what he did** , **and what he might be planning for 2024.** [**Add your name, and tell Judge McBurney to follow the grand jury's recommendation and release the report.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cf90863-6975-41bc-8204-9d0e59bef8d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Grace Jo
subject: One story every high school student needs to hear
body:
I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkrhubjfp7pt1igiie474nllqje2cbcm3r44rum8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)
Hello Friend,

I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear.

I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.

Most Americans today don't understand what socialism does to you -- especially the younger generation.

High school students don't know how it steals your humanity by starving your soul, mind, and stomach of all that freedom provides.

_**That 's why I want to tell my story to high school students across America. **_

**Young Voice 's Dissident Project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell their stories. **

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

[_**Friend, can you help sponsor a student for just $15, so they can hear my story --the story of a survivor? Click here to donate $15, $45, $90, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zed6o9dctib741brccep3nca893s2o055n5ergig_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)

**This is my story.**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo94tq54vpkgvdojf638djatps50bpufk2bor0i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)

During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world's worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about one meal a week--a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight. We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his "crime" was that he left his country in search of food for his family.

That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped. It became the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again.

Some of my family escaped, but the regime murdered most of them.

This is just a small part of my story, Friend.

**Coming to America changed my life. **

That's why I want to help preserve the freedom and prosperity in America by sharing my story and experiences with high school students across this wonderful country.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq7964p530srd3fj0dtoqjt03v9c8i3kb5k8q680_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)

That's why I'm asking for your support, Friend. Can you help sponsor the Dissident Program so I can share my story?

Click any button to send your donation.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgtd8v2u1qeavn8fceve1f3cc80bg6jquf6ddjc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj1orhg65cs8vg5s6sc0qgma4rji4ahi5ophmlag_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrne6tj13btuk65g8tib06f9qnnajpd7b6hqq8lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp2oan7eeg5bgnukraakdp8hj07ad4utofgvkch0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zopssnb1m6ash55ot86iq1ubafq20p8b183ckilg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs9136edma2ik0hupq8l4pak2vb7qefgrj4qmne0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znh530e3hfaot1erf8mq1s92lmj1lmvdlkdqfino_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj4i66cgds44cg23ipqr3egiscnius8smbcglaag_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd5h0ia5g4camq21m83n8ibil079kfrt8bkehr70_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdjm9o70s9h2bs)

Thank you,

Grace Jo

_Now that Trump is OFFICIALLY running for president again, we need to know where this grassroots team stands:_

Team -- Things have gone from _bad_ to **_worse_** for Donald Trump!

First he led Republicans to a _disastrous_ midterm election performance, then he came under MULTIPLE investigations, and now a new poll shows his **disapproval** rating at 67% -- _**that's an ALL-TIME HIGH!**_

We NEED to confirm these numbers **immediately** , before the next election gets any closer. We’ve launched an urgent LIVE POLL to find out where Democrats stand, but the deadline is hours away and we still need 19 responses from Pennsylvania!

**Please, tell us right now:**

If you're a Democrat who abuses their authority, like HillaryClinton with her email server or Obama with Fast and Furious, you get away without consequence. **But if you’re a conservative, you’re automatically guilty of Precrime.** The left has corrupted every institution in Washington, from the FBI to the IRS, making them into their own personal attack teams against their political enemies. name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your Update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132768?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**The legislature has less than a week for committees to report general bills and constitutional amendments in their original chamber.** In order to meet this deadline, committees are busy holding hearings this week to discuss some of the thousands of bills that have been introduced.
---
|
---
| **Gov. Tate Reeves** will see a challenger in his primary race. **Dr. John Witcher** , known for founding Mississippi Against Mandates, has filed to run for Governor, joining Reeves and **Brandon Presley** in vying for the state's highest elected position.

A second candidate has qualified to become the Northern District Public Service Commissioner. Tupelo native **Tanner Newman** announced his candidacy Monday, and he will face **Mandy Gunasekara** in the Republican primary election in August.
---
|
---
|
---
| Over 2,300 bills have been introduced in this legislative session.

**THE GOOD**
**\- HB 1125 from Rep. Gene Newman creates the Regulate Experimental Adolescent Procedures (REAP) Act. **This will prohibit minors from receiving transgender procedures and surgeries.
-**HB 478 from Rep. Sam Mims creates the Occupational Therapy Licensure Compact.** This allows for those with occupational therapy licenses in other states to offer services in Mississippi and vice versa, allowing Mississippians to grow businesses.
**\- HB 1158 by Rep. Lee Yancey amends the Mississippi Medical Cannabis Act. **This bill prevents the medical board from adding over-regulatory requirements.

**THE BAD**
**\- HB 401 revises certain provisions relating to a manufacturer's ownership of a motor vehicle dealership.** This bill would discourage electric vehicle companies and innovation from coming into the state and goes against the free market.
**\- HB 968 would generate a massive tax increase on businesses and consumers by placing taxes on software used as business inputs.** This in turn would get passed down to the consumer and will ultimately raise the cost that consumers will pay.
**\- SB 2458 and SB 2477 both call for a tax rebate. **While MCPP believes in eliminating taxes, the proper way to go about this would be to have an overall tax cut, rather than a one-time check.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f0733e95b9&e=5703353baa)
---
Senator Jeremy England discusses HB 401 which would discourage electric vehicle companies from entering the state.
| **THE INTERESTING**
**-**** HB 717 from Rep. Michael Evans prohibits elected officials from switching political parties during their term of office. **Several lawmakers have switched parties throughout the current term, so this would be an interesting bill if it were to pass.
**\- HB 1027 from Rep. Jill Ford and Rep. Otis Anthony proposed the blueberry be designated as the state fruit. **
---
|
---
| We have been working hard to push our conservative plans through the legislature. Several lawmakers have been a great help in ensuring that conservative ideas are being carried out. **A full list of MCPP's goals for the legislative session can be found[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ccd6755f38&e=5703353baa). **

**Here are some bills introduced that support our agenda:
\- HB 818 from Rep. Lee Yancey ensures the state Public Employees' Retirement System Board adheres to their fiduciary duty of making decisions based on fiscally responsible principles rather than social and environmental causes.** It ensures the board makes investment decisions with the sole purpose of maximizing returns.
**\- HB 1074 by Rep. Jill Ford enacts the Title IX Preservation Act. **This codifies the definition of a woman and protects women in sports, schools and other entities.
**\- SB 2459 from Sen. Chris Caughman and Sen. Philip Moran reduces and phases out the state income tax.** By the calendar year 2028, the income tax would completely be eliminated.

Have a great rest of your week!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=216e7f44c2&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
| _PS you can stay up to date with every bill introduced during the session through the [2023 Legislative Tracker](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9edf3fc2d9&e=5703353baa) found on our website. _
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=9915a633e1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=9915a633e1).

_Copyright © 2023 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

_Our family!_
Raja is the hardest working person I know.
He fought tirelessly for protections for frontline healthcare workers like me.
He went after companies for targeting e-cigarette campaigns at young kids like ours.
And at the end of every day, he still finds time to be a dedicated husband and father.
[_**I’ve never been prouder of my husband. He’s fighting hard for families like yours and mine every day. And I know he doesn’t like asking for money. So I hope today, you’ll listen to my request instead. I know we need strong people like my husband in Congress, and I’m asking you to support Raja however you can. Anything you could chip in, whether it’s $5 or $25, would be greatly appreciated by both of us. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57760547/389050199/-1810142053?source=20230125_em_fr_b1_priya_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWEyNmI0Zi1jOTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8ItCErqhDXKPgPe6Uu0wsNNdEr4G0x2FNbFQIP_GYo=)
One of the things I love most about Raja is that this isn’t about politics for him.
It’s deeply personal.
It’s rooted in his experience as a child of immigrant parents.
It’s rooted in his role as a father who wants the best for every child.
It’s rooted in the same values I’ve watched him champion for decades.
I couldn’t be prouder of him -- as a congressman, husband, and father.
That’s why I wanted to email you today. I hope you see in Raja what I do -- and I hope you don’t mind me asking you to support him however you can. Will you join us?

name: Grace Jo
subject: One story every high school student needs to hear
body:
I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs4f4fqh3l2qfa5n81mk0clqjvkhao7ea7o9catg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)
Hello Friend,

I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear.

I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.

Most Americans today don't understand what socialism does to you -- especially the younger generation.

High school students don't know how it steals your humanity by starving your soul, mind, and stomach of all that freedom provides.

_**That 's why I want to tell my story to high school students across America. **_

**Young Voice 's Dissident Project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell their stories. **

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

[_**Friend, can you help sponsor a student for just $15, so they can hear my story --the story of a survivor? Click here to donate $15, $45, $90, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z929b0c72397o26o366ibdt6pr4kqlk19vcoikqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)

**This is my story.**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9mv541cin6ff82go97q1kvbppgpdhfg19q20aa0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)

During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world's worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about one meal a week--a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight. We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his "crime" was that he left his country in search of food for his family.

That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped. It became the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again.

Some of my family escaped, but the regime murdered most of them.

This is just a small part of my story, Friend.

**Coming to America changed my life. **

That's why I want to help preserve the freedom and prosperity in America by sharing my story and experiences with high school students across this wonderful country.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi6ajvtmhv5kpbnt1vaod1e332mdgu1v3ll11t5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)

That's why I'm asking for your support, Friend. Can you help sponsor the Dissident Program so I can share my story?

Click any button to send your donation.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztnoavnvrao9if5v6rpt2e56vqk5k14pp2egu2m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zacnp08vrr6tp6h5jipph6psq8ru627pe9q8ug3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z05koltljqnn43nqioibdlvtnf88ikmeqe6dg0r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9ikks3n371po99j8gq5vb7v1pgt57rjgtjamd9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z20q6p6rquv13np1325bed1pvfrmhm2vah7heo3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7eo341lchp64vc6ibemno3glhe8br2ai5c2dhr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaqq800pnjis93kednn2lhr4gpm5r7uso3lcid18_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbjef7gtedehcgqmv29bfojmiv4giscguaga9a6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkn6ovrm0mioiio317rp3j3lf1qs2n1voiu09upo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0ob4c1h2bs)

Thank you,

Grace Jo

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zksmu280li1sfdoiuc01qtbft1075a3lovm9udi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0pb5cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztjt362n485v4hrdq147c8gb03nc3ga69tlmpiag_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0pb5cth2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zutj5fmlg3ldfp29ihbolu5r33oeg14ckafaq4go_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0pb5cth2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvj9gda037ueccm1na5k5195ne0shmp5svael96g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0pb5cth2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj4q37bsvbekm577mji1l2m8etst760dnojtjgi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge0pb5cth2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
#

Peter -
I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.
Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.
I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:
[**Can you make your first contribution to my United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan23.ZeANVi&refcode=em220125-1-30-vsp&t=1&akid=296%2E734936%2EgLQuP0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-jan23.BbOoHg&refcode=em220125-1-30-vsp&t=20&akid=296%2E734936%2EgLQuP0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-jan23.sehrQ-&refcode=em220125-1-30-vsp&t=21&akid=296%2E734936%2EgLQuP0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-jan23.rnUbjU&refcode=em220125-1-30-vsp&t=22&akid=296%2E734936%2EgLQuP0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-jan23.d1E2Xt&refcode=em220125-1-30-vsp&t=23&akid=296%2E734936%2EgLQuP0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-jan23.WiapOi&refcode=em220125-1-30-vsp&t=24&akid=296%2E734936%2EgLQuP0)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-jan23.ApMlwN&refcode=em220125-1-30-vsp&t=25&akid=296%2E734936%2EgLQuP0)**
---
****
The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do yet, either.
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’ [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7658%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=xXJtrRhfFTd8WTTFRiHZGA&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78785%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ujV16lmesC4vHTB%2fV3VrIA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78785%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ujV16lmesC4vHTB%2fV3VrIA&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78786%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uxk5D1ih9ZQhpGlq1C3T0Q&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78787%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kYjApbjkW38Fm7KP7cFb7w&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78785%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ujV16lmesC4vHTB%2fV3VrIA&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78788%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9hI3MbpvH9A1xgHUvY6%2ftg&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78789%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EVPX8e5dx7%2bE9iZofBasuQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78780%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MdqcGM9Ax4irhByeK4KmMQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78781%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ety%2flwB5UIyCdvsUPDpCSA&sysid=1)

That's why we need to keep her in Congress and start raising money for her reelection which is already LESS than two years away. body:

Peter,

There is a serious lack of leadership in Washington, D.C. The President is running the country into the ground. Congress is having trouble getting its act together. There are low approval ratings across the board in all areas of government. Something has to give.

Ron DeSantis is succeeding while everyone else is failing. He won by a landslide in Florida because of his results-driven conservative leadership.

He kept Florida open and thriving through the COVID pandemic. He stood up to Disney's woke agenda. He worked to protect children from Critical Race Theory indoctrination.

Ron represents real, active leadership. That's why Ready for Ron, an organization creating a network of patriots, is building up the grassroots support needed to draft Ron for President in 2024.

Can you help us reach 500 new donors before the end of the month?

[_**You can help us start 2023 with a bang by sending $25, $35, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to send your URGENT support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62248850:JdGDzdGEN:m:1:3331421248:C74434893324E08398D7E0C76D174694:r)

Ron is the adult in the room in a government full of childish politicians. He fully believes in good-faith leadership over political posturing.

Ron DeSantis understands that politics should flow from policy -- not the other way around.

Ron DeSantis will fight for our America-First agenda.

And if he continues to govern as a bold conservative and enact pro-freedom policies, he will be poised to run for the Republican nomination and become the man to beat Joe Biden in 2024!

America needs Ron in the White House, but it's up to you and me to convince him to run. Help us draft Ron by donating today.

Ron is the best choice to reform the D.C. Swamp and bring freedom and common sense back to Washington, D.C.

This is our chance to set the blueprint for getting America back on a path of security and prosperity.

But first, we need to establish a nationwide network of supporters to draft Ron to run for President.

The Biden administration's incompetence and deliberate decisions: ❌ Endangered American citizens and immigrants ❌ Allowed deadly drugs to flood into our neighborhoods ❌ Essentially Relinquished operational control of the border to the cartels ❌ Gave taxpayer money to NGOs to help move illegal immigrants throughout America (The extent of this NGO operation was first uncovered by The Heritage Foundation 's government oversight project). While Biden plays theater at our border and makes the crisis even worse, we need our NEW conservative majority in the House to put forth a robust and aggressive border security agenda that includes... ➡️ Investigating the Biden administration and the taxpayer-funded NGOs responsible for bring this crisis into every state in America ➡️ Impeaching Secretary Mayorkas for dereliction of duty at the border. ➡️ Securing our border with much-needed physical and technological infrastructure Thank you, Jessica Anderson Executive Director, Heritage Action | | | Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. subject: The Drama Continues in South Carolina
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Friends,**

“I think there should be a freedom caucus in every state...for the very first time, there are groups of people, not only in Washington, but in our state houses that are actually standing and doing what they said they would do. If we abandon them now, we deserve what we get. These people are brave enough to stand. We must support them.” – Glenn Beck
---
| [ ](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=b8bdc445d9&e=64ecec6d03)
---
|
#### Click to hear Rep. Adam Morgan on Glenn Beck's radio show, discussing the South Carolina Freedom Caucus's latest fights.
---
| **SOUTH CAROLINA**

Big Update! SC Freedom Caucus Chairman Adam Morgan was on Glenn Beck’s radio show this morning. [Listen here.](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=2b28e6c365&e=64ecec6d03)

If you live in South Carolina, be sure to **call House Majority Leader Dave Hiott at (803) 734-3138** and tell him you stand with Adam and the South Carolina Freedom Caucus.

We know Hiott and his colleagues read these emails. So here’s a direct message to them – more air support is coming. A lot more. Buckle up.

And a big thank you goes to Glenn for being so supportive of our efforts. He and his great team at Blaze TV are enabling us to reach more and more people.

**WYOMING**

The Cowboy State’s attorney general is an appointed position. So the office is not accountable to voters. The Wyoming Freedom Caucus wants to change that because their current AG has been enabling the Far Left by being silent. Excerpt from [a local paper](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=114b059c0b&e=64ecec6d03):

_The Wyoming Freedom Caucus is pushing legislation that would change the attorney general from an appointed to an elected position, another move by the group seeking to change some of the ways in which governance in Wyoming operates. The caucus admonished Wyoming Attorney General Bridget Hill in a statement on Tuesday for not joining an "important letter" signed by 21 Republican state attorneys general that admonished proxy-voting advisory firms for "placing radical social activism ahead of the financial interests of their clients."_

>From the WYFC statement:

_Perhaps no state is more adversely impacted by the work of these corporate activists than Wyoming. Environmental and social governance (ESG) policies seek to destroy the resources Wyoming produces - the very same resources used to power the boardrooms promulgating them._

_HB0107, sponsored by Representative Heiner (HD 18) would empower Wyoming citizens to elect our Attorney General. The WYFC fully supports this effort in the hopes that our state will join the 43 other states who elect their state's top advocate. The WYFC also supports all legislative efforts to stop ESG in Wyoming, including SF0159, sponsored by Senator Biteman (SD 21) and HB210, sponsored by Majority Floor Leader Neiman (HD 01)._

**SOUTH DAKOTA**

Governor Kristi Noem, who carries a false reputation of being a conservative rock star, pushed a $200 million “economic development” bill in the state legislature earlier this week. This price tag includes $50 million from the Biden Democrats who sent the money to the states for special interests to splurge on. Congressional Republicans from South Dakota all opposed this when it was debated in DC. But once the money was sent to South Dakota, Noem and most Republican lawmakers seized on the opportunity to spend this money. Except for the South Dakota Freedom Caucus, whose members fought it on the SC House floor by filing several amendments.

Ultimately, the bill passed over their objections. But to truly understand the soft corruption that occurs in this state and elsewhere, check out [this video](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=b437eff660&e=64ecec6d03) where State Rep. Roger Chase admits that he would personally profit from the bill. He sponsored the bill, voted for the bill, and refused to recuse himself from it!

**IDAHO**

Yesterday, we wrote about how Idaho education superintendent Debbie Critchfield is opposed to the Idaho Freedom Caucus’s school choice push, now we’re learning that she’s doing President Biden’s bidding. Recall that IDFC member Senator Chris Trakel went to a Caldwell School Board meeting to fight against a proposed rule that would allow biological boys to go into the girls’ locker room. From Brian Almon with the [Gem State](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=a52ceef88d&e=64ecec6d03) substack report:

_State Superintendent of Public Instruction Debbie Critchfield sent a letter to legislators explaining that while neither the state nor the federal government technically require school districts to adopt woke policies, the threat of litigation from the federal government means they probably should._

_“It is accurate to say that the federal government does not require districts or charters to adopt such policies,” Critchfield wrote. “However, schools can be subject to intense federal scrutiny and potential legal risk if they don’t adopt such policies... Based on this reality, local education leaders can find themselves in a no-win situation. They may adopt policies that some patrons find objectionable or risk an onerous federal investigation and legal action.”_

_In other words:**It’s a nice school district you have here. It would be a shame if somebody destroyed it with onerous litigation.**_

Who needs Democrats when we have “Republicans” like Critchfield? The good news is that the Idaho Freedom Caucus will be fighting this alongside Idaho’s attorney general, Raul Labrador (a founding House Freedom Caucus member when he was in Congress). Stay tuned for more.

**MISSISSIPPI**

Our MS Freedom Caucus Chairman Dana Criswell is exposing his “Republican” colleagues on tax hikes. Please consider [retweeting](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=6dc499b0af&e=64ecec6d03):

Please donate to the State Freedom Caucus Network TODAY. ** ** The best way to save our country is to fight in the states. So we need your help!

As Glenn Beck said, “If we abandon them now, we deserve what we get. These people are brave enough to stand. We must support them.”
---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=2d05286c61&e=64ecec6d03 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE")
---
| Keep fighting,

**Andy Roth**
**President**
**State Freedom Caucus Network**

P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=70ea71b57a&e=64ecec6d03) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
---
| [ ](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=0b45792215&e=64ecec6d03)
---
| | |

**Our mailing address is:**
State Freedom Caucus Network300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003-1021
[Add us to your address book](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=0e5c1eaafe) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=0e5c1eaafe).

name: Grace Jo
subject: One story every high school student needs to hear
body:
I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear. I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb4aqfqn5fcfok4tp8o5n9pn48mfat07t24dofbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge4oj4cdh2bs)
Hello Friend,

I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear.

I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.

Most Americans today don't understand what socialism does to you -- especially the younger generation.

High school students don't know how it steals your humanity by starving your soul, mind, and stomach of all that freedom provides.

_**That 's why I want to tell my story to high school students across America. **_

**Young Voice 's Dissident Project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell their stories. **

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

[_**Friend, can you help sponsor a student for just $15, so they can hear my story --the story of a survivor? Click here to donate $15, $45, $90, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7hp5k4a35rq9jii7dkdf9pu7081h8fhkjn5u5mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge4oj4cdh2bs)

**This is my story.**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk74jrp0flhcfdeaveei3t93t7olc6o9s2o218s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge4oj4cdh2bs)

During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world's worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about one meal a week--a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight. We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his "crime" was that he left his country in search of food for his family.

That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped. It became the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again.

Some of my family escaped, but the regime murdered most of them.

This is just a small part of my story, Friend.

**Coming to America changed my life. **

That's why I want to help preserve the freedom and prosperity in America by sharing my story and experiences with high school students across this wonderful country.

clean_body: I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear. I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism. Hello Friend, I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear. I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism. Most Americans today don't understand what socialism does to you -- especially the younger generation. High school students don't know how it steals your humanity by starving your soul, mind, and stomach of all that freedom provides. That 's why I want to tell my story to high school students across America. Young Voice 's Dissident Project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell their stories. We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure. This is my story. During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world's worst famines. During that time, I only ate about one meal a week--a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught. In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight. We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find. My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his "crime" was that he left his country in search of food for his family. That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped. It became the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again. Some of my family escaped, but the regime murdered most of them. This is just a small part of my story, Friend. Coming to America changed my life. That's why I want to help preserve the freedom and prosperity in America by sharing my story and experiences with high school students across this wonderful country. That's why I'm asking for your support, Friend. Can you help sponsor the Dissident Program so I can share my story? Click any button to send your donation. Thank you, Grace Jo The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program. subject: here's how you can help veterans in 2023
body:
Click here to learn more >>> | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2582aadb7c&e=fdefed58de)
---
| Hi! My name is Marshall Bush and I’m emailing you on behalf of the Working Warriors Foundation.
My grandfather, the late President George H.W. Bush, taught me how to “Be a Point of Light.” To me, this means doing whatever we can to help others, help our communities, give back, and leave the world a better place than it was when we got here. | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=25431248b6&e=fdefed58de)
---
| I’m working with the Working Warrior Foundation to extend my grandfather’s legacy and support our veterans and transitioning service members.
**Right now, over 350,000 of our veterans are unemployed and almost 10% are homeless.** We owe them a debt of gratitude that can never be repaid, and that’s why the Working Warrior Foundation is helping fund efforts to create new opportunities in the civilian world.
**Our 2023 fundraising drive has just begun and we’re counting on the generosity from citizens like you to support our nation’s heroes.** | | | | [HELP US SUPPORT OUR VETERANS](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=87f0db2376&e=fdefed58de)
---
This year, we are partnering with a number of organizations that specialize in creating jobs, housing, and other opportunities for our service members and their families.

With a donation of just $30, you can help us create a brighter future for our veterans across our country. **[Please click here to place your secure donation or click the button below!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=dd91352ee5&e=fdefed58de)**
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c2e6bf7690&e=fdefed58de)
---

Best regards,

Marshall Bush
Working Warriors Foundation

Working Warriors Foundation is a Virginia nonprofit corporation operating through a fiscal sponsorship with Players Philanthropy Fund, a Maryland charitable trust recognized by IRS as a tax-exempt public charity under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code (Federal Tax ID: 27-6601178). Contributions to Working Warriors Foundation are tax-deductible to the fullest extent of the law.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Ugly news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2023-fr-january?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2023-fr-january?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
I've got some bad news:

In the dead of night, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party did yesterday what they’ve threatened for the last two years.

They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.

This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters.

Folks, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people.

Please, contribute $10 or whatever you can spare today to our campaign and Eric Swalwell to help us respond to Republicans’ baseless attacks on my ability to hold them accountable. This isn’t the end of my fight for truth, accountability, and our democracy. In fact, it’s only the start: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2023-FR-Schiff?refcode=E20103-20230125-SchiffSurrogate-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-RapidResponse-NA&amount=10]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:
$5 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2023-FR-Schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=E20103-20230125-SchiffSurrogate-EG-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5] $15 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2023-FR-Schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=E20103-20230125-SchiffSurrogate-EG-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]
$25 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2023-FR-Schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=E20103-20230125-SchiffSurrogate-EG-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25] $50 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2023-FR-Schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=E20103-20230125-SchiffSurrogate-EG-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=50]
$100 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2023-FR-Schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=E20103-20230125-SchiffSurrogate-EG-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=100] More → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2023-FR-Schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=E20103-20230125-SchiffSurrogate-EG-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=other]

I’ll have much more to say soon. But for now, thanks for standing with me — because it’s not just a personal attack on me. It’s an attack on accountability and effective oversight.

And it's up to all of us to fight back.

— Adam

name: Jim Renacci
subject: It is time to SAVE OHIO'S SCHOOLS - Join us!
body:
SOS Ohio is Rolling to help take back our school boards
| |
---
2023 is underway and this fall we have an important election in all our communities to [SAVE OUR SCHOOLS](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdkEtvozAUhX8N7EDGL2DBIk1aadpGGkXVJDvk2Aa78QNhmJT--nESZhYjWZbv_e49Oj6yKWiJKSVVTVLR0HMtaKobCCACBSRFBKDKGZUA4gJ0kAjc1V2Cgc0_tR2lY5zrnHubqoZKyitUVIxBVGPZCcI7WoIy7paoRig1jZqmISRok8CXeDo_2pAH9lv6eQxceW-CVze1CA1zQrs-voLuXTYPCXrpztxokaDdj-vmgPrXt-fj-6cYLyeOj_QnP5ptf3izH09zfXq3X68KaK_gN_Fq-_V9ni057M9LfUkgnSfbWin0bKOYtEybtRmiEy5j03HTMjsY3S0r4rFk0UqEj3Cy4EPrlfatk9e_Q95N0k0PgewDXo6XbbUPvyJu3cP7f02lRUxkhyswsxNOx0YMV22MDrSMMfc3b_d8VzNNUj4lEN63ILxHCfGy2R8UWQaSRZmMOft8Y3Ab72kZ5L_BVSNffwyTcvcHQFSiIg) from liberal wokeness and destructive policy.
Late last year, we formed Save our Schools Ohio, a PAC that will assisit dozens of other groups across Ohio help get qualified school board candidates elected and start the movement of taking back school boards all over our state. Now after months of data collection and organizational meetings we are ready to kick this off.
Will you get involved? There are many ways.
• RUN for school board • Help host a Fundraiser • Organize your county or region • Assist local candidates But First - [YOU NEED TO SIGN UP TO HELP](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdkMtu4yAYhZ8G72zZGHC88CJN2un0IlXWSMmsLAzY0HCxjN3UffohidvFSAjB-X6ODkdUGSkQIXhT4ohXpC05iVQFU5inGcRZAOkmoUSkEGVpBzFHXdkBlJrkXZlRWMqYSpgzkaxEV_AStm3WUSwQYyjPMoHFpqU5J6wVka7kNA0e5FsAH8Lq3Gh84umHcPPomXROeycvbgFqarmyfTh51dt4HkD-0LVMKw7y_e_zts77p-f7w8s7H09Hhg7kjR30rq-fzZ-7uTy-mM8nmSon4Rd2cvf51c4G16_tUp4AJPNkGiO4mk0wE4YqvYo-JGEiiJbphppBq25ZEQtXGqIEeCsn9s43TirXWHH-HnJ2Ena6GcTHul8ef52mx78BN_aW_T9RKh4a2aNNOtMjisaKD2eltfKkCDX3l2zXftcwFSjuAITXVxBeq4Ro2b7WEi8DjoNNTK25vzC4C_u0DOJncPVI1h9DUOz_AfgipDo "Click here to Save our Schools!")! Click the logo below to sign up to get on the team. We are looking for folks to help on every level!! This is a critical year. We have a shot to UNITE and start making a real difference. Please sign up today!
| [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdkFuPnCAcxT-NvmkQBPXBh9m5JN1L05imM28GAYVdLka0s-6nLzNj-9CEEDi_PyeHI-qMFDkhuKxwzGvSVZzEqoYAIpBBnAUAypQSAWCegR5invdVH-XApO_KTMJSxlTKnIllzbAoUckwIqTjIoe4oiUSEFKQiaJHXaxrOc-jj9AugqewejcZn3r6W7hl8kw6p72TN7cANbVc2SGcvBpssowROvUd04pH6PDtumvQ8PxyPL--8-njwvIz-cHOej80L-bn01JdXs3nswTKSfiFndx_fnWLwc1bt1YfESTLbFojuFpMMBOGKr2JPiRhIoiW6ZaaUat-3RALVxqiBPgoJ_HOt04q11px_Tvk7Czs_DBIxtMv0lyO38k54NY-sv8nSsVDI4e8BAu95PFU8_GqtFaeFKHm4Zbt3u8Wpo6KpwjC-ysI71XCfN29NRKvI06CTUKtOd4Y3Id9Xkfxb3DzSLcfw6g4_AGKrqIJ)

Look for special events and other exciting news being announced soon! I would also love to come talk to your group of 30 or more parents and citizens discussing what we can do fix our schools. Please email Tom Weyand at [tomweyand@jimrenacci.com](mailto:tomweyand@jimrenacci.com) to schedule something today. Thank you and God bless,
Jim Renacci
