name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Shocking Comments from Top GOP Official
body:
If you want to know why we can't recruit Republicans in Chicago, look no farther than the Democratic rhetoric coming from the Chicago GOP Chair.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/681a483e3b49/shocking-comments-from-top-gop-official?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Chicago GOP Chair Disses the Unvaccinated, Says They Should Pay for Own COVID Hospitalization Costs, Considers Saving a Life "Wasteful" Spending (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-chair-disses-the-unvaccinated-says-they-should-pay-for-own-covid-hospitalization-costs-considers-saving-a-life-wasteful-spending.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-chair-disses-the-unvaccinated-says-they-should-pay-for-own-covid-hospitalization-costs-considers-saving-a-life-wasteful-spending.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Dr. Anthony Fauci, director of the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases testifies at the House Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Crisis on the Capitol Hill in Washington, April 15, 2021. (Susan Walsh | Pool | Reuters)

============================================================

In a recently uncovered ** Facebook thread (https://www.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=pfbid02CLCsV6mMNEkv3F8kCoZEHrM93ELEAUVW5dQqKC3pwXPfaXMdFErkiCLFzTkRv5UKl&id=1398842833&sfnsn=mo&mibextid=YsHG2a&paipv=0&eav=AfZUacdoOqwEmnb5fkQL0wb_OsqF3bS_UPgxspev7XtR2O_RSehyHZNcNOu-91PXs4g&_rdr&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
from a year ago, Chicago GOP chairman ** Stephen Boulton (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-couldnt-find-mayor-candidate-looking-to-support-a-democrat-instead-during-nonpartisan-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
offers some shocking admissions when it comes to the unvaccinated population, writing,

“I find it unfathomable that people are risking their lives to dodge two little shots....Now a lot of people are going to die for nothing but ‘principle’ grounded in ignorance – or, even worse, politics.”
** (https://www.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=pfbid02CLCsV6mMNEkv3F8kCoZEHrM93ELEAUVW5dQqKC3pwXPfaXMdFErkiCLFzTkRv5UKl&id=1398842833&sfnsn=mo&mibextid=YsHG2a&paipv=0&eav=AfZUacdoOqwEmnb5fkQL0wb_OsqF3bS_UPgxspev7XtR2O_RSehyHZNcNOu-91PXs4g&_rdr&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Boulton then borrowed a line from Joe Biden and the Democrats by blaming the unvaccinated, saying,

“We have people who won’t get the vaccine, creating the problem now.”

In a White House
** speech (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefing-room/speeches-remarks/2021/09/09/remarks-by-president-biden-on-fighting-the-covid-19-pandemic-3/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
on September 9, 2021, President Biden said,

“This is a pandemic of the unvaccinated. And it’s caused by the fact that despite America having an unprecedented and successful vaccination program, despite the fact that for almost five months free vaccines have been available in 80,000 different locations, we still have nearly 80 million Americans who have failed to get the shot.”

But Boulton offered a solution for the unvaccinated,

“I think the next step will be that private health insurers will demand laws barring coverage of Covid hospitalization costs for unvaccinated persons. You don’t want the vaccine on principle? Great, free country. But you pay for your doctors and hospitals when you get sick, don’t make the rest of us do it.”

That’s right. If you choose to be unvaccinated, and you get sick – you pay for the hundreds of thousands of dollars in potential hospital costs out of your own pocket – don’t make the insurers or the vaccinated pay for your bill.
** (https://www.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=pfbid02CLCsV6mMNEkv3F8kCoZEHrM93ELEAUVW5dQqKC3pwXPfaXMdFErkiCLFzTkRv5UKl&id=1398842833&sfnsn=mo&mibextid=YsHG2a&paipv=0&eav=AfZUacdoOqwEmnb5fkQL0wb_OsqF3bS_UPgxspev7XtR2O_RSehyHZNcNOu-91PXs4g&_rdr&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Unbelievable.

Boulton then likened the personal decision of remaining unvaccinated to “playing medical Russian Roulette, hoping your chamber has no bullet.”

Boulton also strongly believes and complained “that fortunes in avoidable hospital medical expenses are being wasted on saving people who shouldn’t be in those ICUs...”
** (https://www.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=pfbid02CLCsV6mMNEkv3F8kCoZEHrM93ELEAUVW5dQqKC3pwXPfaXMdFErkiCLFzTkRv5UKl&id=1398842833&sfnsn=mo&mibextid=YsHG2a&paipv=0&eav=AfZUacdoOqwEmnb5fkQL0wb_OsqF3bS_UPgxspev7XtR2O_RSehyHZNcNOu-91PXs4g&_rdr&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In other words, saving the life of an unvaccinated human being is “wasteful spending.” Not sure where that fits into the ** American Medical Association’s Medical Code of Ethics (https://journalofethics.ama-assn.org/article/ama-code-medical-ethics-opinions-care-end-life/2013-12?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, where a physician’s duty is to “sustain life and relieve suffering.”

But leave it to Dr. Boulton, who would rather watch a patient die, then spend money and save their life because they chose to be unvaccinated.

Once again – unbelievable.

A November 23, 2022 article in the Washington Post
** titled (https://web.archive.org/web/20221123173512/https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2022/11/23/vaccinated-people-now-make-up-majority-covid-deaths/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, “Vaccinated people now make up a majority of COVID deaths” – a point that is accurate according to health experts and data – has since changed its ** headline (https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2022/11/23/vaccinated-people-now-make-up-majority-covid-deaths/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
to “COVID is no longer mainly a pandemic of the unvaccinated. Here’s why.” But regardless of the title, the point is the same – since last April, there’s been a rise in deaths of the vaccinated.

And people have been coming forward in droves, talking openly about the negative effects of taking the COVID vaccine – including airline pilots, doctors, nurses and Illinois’ very own Ryan Cunningham, who wrote on his Twitter,

“I got the COVID vaccine before most could as healthcare provider and emergency manager implementing many of the policies of the “covidians.” Days after I was transported to the hospital with cardiac issue. Today I’m in heart failure.”
** (https://twitter.com/rycunni/status/1604722671891394560?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1604722671891394560%7Ctwgr%5E5f18a7230b94c61d843ee3469407b100973220d3%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.illinoisreview.com%2Fillinoisreview%2F2023%2F01%2Fchicago-gop-chair-disses-the-unvaccinated-says-they-should-pay-for-own-covid-hospitalization-costs-considers-saving-a-life-wasteful-spending.html&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Greg Pearson, an airline pilot suing over the vaccine mandates said,

“I got a COVID vaccine at 11:30 am, and woke up at 3:30 am with heart pounding. I went to ER and doctors found my heart was in atrial fibrillation, I could have had a stroke while flying and killed people, airlines don’t care.”
** (https://twitter.com/healthbyjames/status/1614648850546933761?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1614648850546933761%7Ctwgr%5E5f18a7230b94c61d843ee3469407b100973220d3%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.illinoisreview.com%2Fillinoisreview%2F2023%2F01%2Fchicago-gop-chair-disses-the-unvaccinated-says-they-should-pay-for-own-covid-hospitalization-costs-considers-saving-a-life-wasteful-spending.html&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Last March, JPMorgan Chase & Co ** announced (https://thehill.com/policy/healthcare/public-global-health/598122-jp-morgan-to-lift-ban-on-hiring-unvaccinated/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
that they were ending their vaccine mandate for employees.

United Airlines made a similar
** announcement (https://www.cnbc.com/2022/03/10/united-airlines-unvaccinated-workers-can-return-to-their-jobs.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in March, saying unvaccinated employees could return to their jobs.

In
** December (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-public-health-director-on-covid-19-vax-requirement-for-school-aged-kids-no-mandates-planned.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, during the Illinois Immunization Advisory Committee meeting, which included time for public comments, it was decided that there wouldn’t be a mandate of the COVID-19 vaccine for school-aged children. As IDPH Director Vohra ** stated (https://www.thecentersquare.com/illinois/illinois-committee-takes-no-action-on-covid-19-vaccines-for-kids-as-uptake-wanes/article_99bca1c4-8245-11ed-bf19-134bb543fc9c.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“I want to assert here and things that the governor has shared as well is that there are no plans to update the vaccine requirement for school-aged children.”

And while the mandate madness has destroyed businesses and economies, caused irreparable harm to children and has led to a mental health emergency – triggering anxiety and depression worldwide, Chicago GOP chairman Stephen Boulton – who is neither a medical expert or political strategist – is out there fueling unnecessary division and borrowing talking points from the Democrats.

Getting the jab is a personal decision – and here in America, we are free to decide. Perhaps Boulton and his fellow Democrats will have better success pushing their agenda in countries like Venezuela, China or North Korea.

But here in the United States of America – leave that decision to the individual. As Ronald Reagan so famously said,

“The nine most terrifying words in the English language are: I’m from the government and I’m here to help.”

** Former Republican Gubernatorial Candidate Darren Bailey Calls on IL GOP Chair Don Tracy to "Step Down," Shares Illinois Review Article (https://www.facebook.com/BaileyforIllinois?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In the wake of IL GOP Chairman Don Tracy's ** interview (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/don-tracy-says-il-gop-will-re-evaluate-neutrality-in-primary-after-blaming-bailey-for-midterm-election-losses.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
this past Monday on ** Bishop on Air (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kNw7eyOIIIc&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
on WMAY radio, in which Tracy appears to have placed the blame for down-ballot election losses on the "top of the ticket," former Illinois Senator and Republican Gubernatorial Candidate Darren Bailey has called on Tracy to "step down."

In a Facebook
** post (https://www.facebook.com/BaileyforIllinois?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
on Tuesday afternoon, Bailey stated,

"Mr. Tracy, I have been patient with you, but it's time to follow Jim Durkin's lead and step down. Bailey's post included a link to an
** Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/don-tracy-says-il-gop-will-re-evaluate-neutrality-in-primary-after-blaming-bailey-for-midterm-election-losses.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
article covering Tracy's radio interview."
** (https://www.facebook.com/BaileyforIllinois?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Two hours later, Bailey made another Facebook ** post (https://www.facebook.com/BaileyforIllinois?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, featuring a picture of his grandchild having a visceral reaction after tasting a lemon, with the comment, "That look I get from my grandchildren when I try to have a conversation about the future of Illinois under current state party leadership..."

During his Monday interview, Tracy
** stated (https://youtu.be/O6DHuWDOgrI?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“And a lot of these great candidates we had this past time put their heart and soul and their family treasure into these races only to be impacted by the top of the ticket, something they have no control over...So I think we almost have a fiduciary duty to look at our primary and determine whether neutrality is the best policy.”

Bailey is the first-named plaintiff in another
** lawsuit (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-attorney-tom-devore-darren-bailey-file-another-lawsuit-after-an-effingham-judge-issues-a-temporary-restraining-order-pausing-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
filed by former Republican Attorney General candidate Tom DeVore against Gov. JB Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban. As ** Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-judge-rules-in-favor-of-former-ag-candidate-tom-devore-and-over-860-plaintiffs-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
broke last Friday evening, DeVore secured a temporary restraining order against the gun ban in Effingham County. DeVore and Bailey are appearing before a judge in White County this morning on DeVore's ** motion (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-attorney-tom-devore-darren-bailey-file-another-lawsuit-after-an-effingham-judge-issues-a-temporary-restraining-order-pausing-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
for a temporary restraining order in the second case.
** (https://youtu.be/yXV7AfBzm6s?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Editor Mark Vargas and Publisher Scott Kaspar discuss what the TRO granted in Tom DeVore's lawsuit against JB Pritzker's assault weapons ban means for Illinois gun owners, on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas," on AM 560 The Answer (Jan. 23, 2023).
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=198f20702d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_25_03_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-198f20702d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Urgently need your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

First: Our own fundraising has been steadily declining over the last year
and it’s unsustainable for our organization — if things don’t turn around
we’re going to have to look at budget cuts.

Then: Axios just reported that ‘The Moderate PAC’ is planning on raising
$20 million to stop our movement and protect corporate-backed, entrenched
incumbents.

Now: We urgently need your support to fight back against this PAC that
received $1,000,000 from a GOP-mega donor and billionaire.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230125-27223&t=1001&akid=27223%2E1203867%2EeE7fR1 ]Will you rush a contribution of $3 right now? As a
grassroots-funded organization, every single donation truly makes a
difference to us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230125-27223&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27223%2E1203867%2EeE7fR1 ]Contribute $3

The political establishment is coming after us because they’re terrified
of our people-powered movement that is actually shifting political power
in our country to the 99%.

Imagine the Democratic Party without AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, or
Cori Bush in Congress. We recruited each of these leaders to run and win
and we’re building the infrastructure for even more grassroots candidates
to do the same, but the Moderate PAC is planning to raise and spend $20
million against us and our candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230125-27223&t=1021&akid=27223%2E1203867%2EeE7fR1 ]Please make your best gift now to help us counter this obscene amount
of money against us.

Thank you,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27223%2E1203867%2EeE7fR1 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27223%2E1203867%2EeE7fR1 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230125-27223-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27223_1203867_eE7fR1&akid=27223%2E1203867%2EeE7fR1

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27223%2E1203867%2EeE7fR1

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

We need your help to support the Democratic Party of Virginia and stay on track

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57775468/389102509/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODg0ODM0ZC1mYzljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRozDM-OIDz8lehaq2cGJTW2wcTO1bhzMcDVB3a54sw=&emci=55689d49-2e9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a884834d-fc9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Our first deadline of 2023 is just around the corner and it’s critical we come out of the gates swinging. **There are more than a dozen highly competitive races in the Virginia General Assembly this year,** where the future of our rights in the Commonwealth will be decided. If Democrats are going to win in November, we need your help. In the last election, we saw just how quickly our momentum can stall when Democrats stay home. That’s why we need you to step up for these seats in Northern Virginia, Hampton Roads, the New River Valley, the Richmond suburbs, and all across Virginia. _[**Will you pitch in and help the Democratic Party of Virginia ensure that the new General Assembly is blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57775469/389102510/1428596121?refcode=mw_em_230125_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODg0ODM0ZC1mYzljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRozDM-OIDz8lehaq2cGJTW2wcTO1bhzMcDVB3a54sw=)_ The truth is, the future of the Commonwealth depends on Democrats winning in November. Already we’ve seen Republicans in Richmond attempt to roll back voting rights, access to abortion, and environmental protections. Our Democratic majority in the state Senate is standing strong against these attacks on our progress, but that’s all on the line in the coming election. That’s why I’m doing everything I can to help us stay on track. Can I count on you to do the same? _[**Contribute now to elect Democrats to the General Assembly and protect the rights of every Virginian >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57775470/389102511/1428596121?refcode=mw_em_230125_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODg0ODM0ZC1mYzljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRozDM-OIDz8lehaq2cGJTW2wcTO1bhzMcDVB3a54sw=)_ Thank you, Mark **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57775471/389102512/1428596121?refcode=mw_em_230125_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODg0ODM0ZC1mYzljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRozDM-OIDz8lehaq2cGJTW2wcTO1bhzMcDVB3a54sw=)**

clean_body: We need your help to support the Democratic Party of Virginia and stay on track | | | Derek, Our first deadline of 2023 is just around the corner and it’s critical we come out of the gates swinging. There are more than a dozen highly competitive races in the Virginia General Assembly this year, where the future of our rights in the Commonwealth will be decided. If Democrats are going to win in November, we need your help. In the last election, we saw just how quickly our momentum can stall when Democrats stay home. That’s why we need you to step up for these seats in Northern Virginia, Hampton Roads, the New River Valley, the Richmond suburbs, and all across Virginia. = The truth is, the future of the Commonwealth depends on Democrats winning in November. Already we’ve seen Republicans in Richmond attempt to roll back voting rights, access to abortion, and environmental protections. Our Democratic majority in the state Senate is standing strong against these attacks on our progress, but that’s all on the line in the coming election. That’s why I’m doing everything I can to help us stay on track. Can I count on you to do the same? = Thank you, Mark = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: How'd we figure out Democrats would far outpace pundit expectations in 2022? Top pollster Jef Pollock shares the secret sauce …
body:
Why was the “red wave” only a ripple?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61a9c2dd-0c8a-4bc5-a6f4-0628da6013e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, The latest Blue Amp Action newsletter is here! *[ As always, more on Anthony Devolder..err Kitara...err George Santos!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4aa51ee0-b632-4268-a856-db71aed4fae4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Russia has turned Americans into assets before, whether paid or useful idiots repeating their TPs verbatim... Manafort. Trump. Rohrbacher. Tulsi. [Why not George Santos, especially when we know THEY helped fund him](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d243237-b74c-4a2c-8469-bc56aaedc00a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/65mUS6Sv0U8](https://default.salsalabs.org/T727a5f61-8f5f-45a0-b2b8-216afb3b5184/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * How'd we figure out Democrats would far outpace pundit expectations in 2022? [Top pollster Jef Pollock shares the secret sauce](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0fc5ac13-3805-4031-b3da-80a819e77e96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/tHtNgo7urA0](https://default.salsalabs.org/T778ecf07-ddfc-43e3-92cd-344c45c3a8cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * [Former NFL Coach Tony Dungy shared a lie about kitty litters being used by kids as bathrooms at school.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0c4f098-8921-4997-8e8b-1a6ffa37ac9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It's dangerous, stupid & if NBC had integrity, they'd drop his arse: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6oheZUpsZIU&t=22s](https://default.salsalabs.org/T388e6852-d0de-4b9d-94ff-9691351247be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * And yes, more Santos! I mean, he is a walking mess of a person. So...[Could bumbling, doofus-y liar Santos actually be a Russian stooge?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72e9a2bb-92be-4622-8cbf-4fc298418733/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Could he even pull it off? [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/kKLzSW_tR1s](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52ac7c5c-434f-4d12-89ff-a91879df6c70/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ******************** **[Have you visited our sponsor Dissent Pins yet?? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c59fdb9-30c5-4b2b-8a82-06c165b69b91/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)Do you need a ["Mazel Tough" t-shirt? A Secret Jewish Laser Corps pin? A "No One's Treading On You, Sweetie" sticker or something from their Pride Collection?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2625283-9a70-4e31-8e5d-1eab4b03e772/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** **It's all [here at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta927d4d3-b47a-4fd6-bdbe-37c3c5d60ae0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** ******************* * **Now that classified documents have been found in Mike Pence's home too** , do we get to make all the dumb memes, videos, etc mocking him as they did Biden? The truth is the laws need to be tightened. Biden & Pence, I'm pretty sure, didn't know about it. Trump? He did. He lied about it. He sued. He refused. He called them his. He is different than the others, and if there's any justice, he'll go to prison for it. [One final reminder: Go shop for gifts or yourself at our new sponsor, Dissent Pins! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te08705c3-c80b-4f57-ae01-c896a0e4daaf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)They give half their profits to great causes, which comes out to nearly $1 million since they began. [You can get great items like Ukrainian Easter Egg earrings or a "Bigfoot & Chemtrails & UFOs Oh My" Conspiracy Theory Kit. Or, you can get this, one of the coolest presents I've ever gotten :)](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6417987-24dc-41d2-89f5-36450b0909fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cb74c89-b51f-421e-af63-440c6cd9a6f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Make sure to go by Dissent Pins for all your gift needs right now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34b841d1-5c04-47cc-922c-134d7c34f2c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Also: [Subscribe to Blue Amp on Youtube!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T532baec9-3c62-4e47-a6fe-fede0b5487a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Follow me on Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3cec1ddf-51a3-464d-b85d-6c2c67a796d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Follow me on Post](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cc4f0c5-ee48-4907-9be2-030b25706746/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for reading this edition of the Blue Amp Action Newsletter! And have a great rest of your week! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T484d64f9-0f90-49d7-8c33-5a4a88c3ecfc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

_Roe v. Wade_ would have been 50 this year
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57776165/389103160/-849735382?refcode=EM_C_230122RoeAnniversary_Repro_SB_30DO_4_G_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDQ1NDZiMy1mZDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zruqOLvBOEpoEWVp2XdgA1JkGPrqUZrY3dsWjpOus9c=) Peter, this year, something is different.

January 2023 marks the 50th anniversary of abortion access for Americans through the decision of _Roe v. Wade_ , or it would have been if the Supreme Court had not struck it down in 2022. **For the first time in decades, Americans have entered the new year without federal abortion protections.** And because of that, GOP politicians across the country have leapt into action to finally restrict abortion nationally. They’ve done so right here in Ohio, where they passed one of the most extreme abortion laws in the country.

These laws are unacceptable, and we need Congress to act and codify _Roe_ now. [**_Peter, w ill you sign the petition to demand Congress pass federal abortion protections?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57776167/389103161/593891301?refcode=EM_C_230122RoeAnniversary_Repro_SB_30DO_4_G_TESTA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDQ1NDZiMy1mZDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zruqOLvBOEpoEWVp2XdgA1JkGPrqUZrY3dsWjpOus9c=&emci=d6716e62-fc9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=744546b3-fd9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57776170/389103162/593891301?refcode=EM_C_230122RoeAnniversary_Repro_SB_30DO_4_G_TESTA_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDQ1NDZiMy1mZDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zruqOLvBOEpoEWVp2XdgA1JkGPrqUZrY3dsWjpOus9c=&emci=d6716e62-fc9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=744546b3-fd9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57776174/389103163/593891301?refcode=EM_C_230122RoeAnniversary_Repro_SB_30DO_4_G_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDQ1NDZiMy1mZDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zruqOLvBOEpoEWVp2XdgA1JkGPrqUZrY3dsWjpOus9c=&emci=d6716e62-fc9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=744546b3-fd9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) Without _Roe v. Wade_ , millions of Americans have been put at risk. We already saw the harm caused by Ohio’s law when a 10-year-old girl was forced to travel out of the state to receive an abortion. As devastating as that story was, the worst part is that until Congress restores federal abortion protections, these stories will continue to occur on a regular basis. We can’t wait for another second, Peter. Congress must act now on abortion protections.

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: Taylor Swift fans know all too well

body:
Corporate consolidation only benefits CEOs.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16488%2E3422442%2ExyQmAg)
Derek,
Yesterday an executive from Live Nation testified before the Senate Judiciary Committee about their merger with Ticketmaster.
In case you missed it: **Senators brought their best Taylor Swift puns.**
**But here’s what really matters:** Corporate mergers and consolidation in just about _every industry_ has led to higher prices and poor customer experiences. From grocery stores to airlines to energy companies, it isn’t complicated—fewer choices are bad for consumers.
**Katie’s been a leader in the fight against corporate consolidation.** >From publishing a groundbreaking report showing how Big Pharma’s mergers have stifled innovation and harmed patients, to calling on the Federal Trade Commission to block recent grocery mergers, Katie isn’t afraid to stand up to corporate special interests.
**[What other companies do you want to see Congress hold accountable?](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em-corporate-accountability?source=EMAF25_1_SUR_20230125_V1_F&t=2&akid=16488%2E3422442%2ExyQmAg)**
**[Take the survey ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em-corporate-accountability?source=EMAF25_1_SUR_20230125_V1_F&t=3&akid=16488%2E3422442%2ExyQmAg)**
Thanks for your input!
—Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. If you no longer want to receive emails from us, please . = = | = It’s undeniable: Jim Jordan is not fit to represent the American people in Congress. He betrayed our Democracy. He betrayed his constitutional oath of office. He put Trump ahead of our Democracy — and even 16 years later, he continues to. Look, I’m not a lifelong politician. In fact, I don't consider myself a politician, but I know what it means to stand up for what’s right which is why I'm running for office. I'm a concerned American with solutions to serve the people. But the only thing Jim Jordan knows what to stand for is himself, Donald Trump, and his failed Presidency. We have a shot to win this and kick Jim Jordan to the curb for good. The goal that we have for your state is specific, intentional, and real. Whether or not we hit that goal **_matters a lot._** Let us explain: **We’ve had some BIG successes this month:** We flipped a Virginia Senate seat by a slim 696 votes and our newly elected Democratic trifectas in states like Michigan and Minnesota have introduced dozens of bills that will improve life for working families. These successes have been powered by thousands of donors giving an average of $20, from all over the country. **But:** We have four MUST-WIN special elections coming up in February in some of our closest chambers that could decide majority control! **So when we have a big end-of month goal like we do this month ($150,000 by next Tuesday, in fact!), our state-by-state targets give us a clear roadmap of how many donations we need from each state to hit the goal that helps us determine what we can budget to win races all over America, including upcoming special elections in Pennsylvania and **So we have just six days for 16 supporters from your state to step up and chip in to have what it takes to beat Republican candidates running for state legislature all over the country.**
We’re counting on hitting these numbers – and with time running out in January, we can’t afford to fall short. There has never been a better time to make a donation to elect state Democrats than right now.

clean_body: | | | | | Here’s the truth: We need 16 more supporters from your state to The goal that we have for your state is specific, intentional, and real. Whether or not we hit that goal matters a lot. Let us explain: We’ve had some BIG successes this month: We flipped a Virginia Senate seat by a slim 696 votes and our newly elected Democratic trifectas in states like Michigan and Minnesota have introduced dozens of bills that will improve life for working families. These successes have been powered by thousands of donors giving an average of $20, from all over the country. But: We have four MUST-WIN special elections coming up in February in some of our closest chambers that could decide majority control! So when we have a big end-of month goal like we do this month ($150,000 by next Tuesday, in fact!), our state-by-state targets give us a clear roadmap of how many donations we need from each state to hit the goal that helps us determine what we can budget to win races all over America, including upcoming special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Goals like these are our way of being transparent about how exactly we’re relying on this grassroots team to support our fight to elect state Democrats across the country – support that goes directly to organizers on the ground, ads in key districts, critical mailers, and more. So we have just six days for 16 supporters from your state to step up and chip in to have what it takes to beat Republican candidates running for state legislature all over the country. name: Troy E. Nehls
subject: POLL: Biden Admin Series of Failures?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Do you think President Biden’s Admin is a failure? RESPOND HERE >>>
| | | Leadership means taking responsibility for failure, owning it, and making the necessary changes to ‘right the ship’ ... the President and D.C. Democrats are drowning in their own sea of woke-and-broke Washington nonsense. **The buck stops with Biden, and he has****FAILED AMERICA****. ** _As Chief Administrator of the Executive Branch, Joe’s ‘administrative apples’ haven’t fallen far from the cabinet tree ..._ DHS Secretary Mayorkas has left our sovereign borders wide open as illegal immigrants and drugs flood our border. Attorney General Garland is actively using the Justice Department to criminally target law-abiding parents who dare to ask questions and raise concerns about today’s woke school policies. Transportation Secretary Buttigieg continues to flounder as shipping vessels are delayed due to a complete lack of competence and direction – this has led to baby formula shortages and empty shelves where food was once found ... These are just among the many flops of this FAR-LEFT FAILURE. Do you agree, Friend?**I value your voice and want to hear from you!**
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1g0gtvc7p4fof5teva9qa0n0i74mte5rgctn0ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge6o70c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z589g54gqls4qrkk4fi6qj5abal05qkmuo4topi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge6o70c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbbhjmtpe604stkatfik1naof0gjta0j53l5v3j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge6o70c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zecs2p3vgiu1oqb1594ac7lrbujuh2b0jbfo8mvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdge6o70c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema vs Gallego, but which party?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, We can’t say we’re shocked. Ruben Gallego only just entered the Arizona Senate race two days ago, and already the Republican Party is trying to line up behind Kyrsten Sinema. In fact, they’re yet again asking Sinema to join their caucus in the Senate. (Although she’s now an independent she’s still caucusing with the Ds for now, giving us a 51 seat majority.) Second-ranking Senate Republican John Thune said: “As she knows, because I’ve conveyed this to her many times, we would welcome her in our caucus.” The fact that the GOP believes they can recruit Sinema to their side tells you everything you need to know about who she really represents. subject: A question a lot of you are asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
It’s a fair question! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57789799/389111185/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZmYjYzMC0wODlkLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxBdOOARAHLntZ5c2o_ypHI-sFGHuRutQ4X5xdeFsYE=&emci=823fd6f6-f49c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=bdffb630-089d-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | I want to take a moment to clear something up, Peter. Many of you have been emailing me recently to ask: **_If you won your election, then why are you still asking me to donate to your campaign?_** It’s a fair question! So I wanted to take a second to answer: First off, YES – we won in November! And yes, I am just about to wrap up my first month representing Vermont in Congress. _But remember all of the work it took to get here?_ We faced an extremely competitive and contested primary. At many points, we were outraised, outspent, and down in the polls. Next cycle, it’s likely that we could face another competitive primary, and anti-LGBTQ interest groups could come out of the woodwork to spend against us. We cannot take a single thing for granted – and we cannot let our campaign operation lapse. **Grassroots contributions from people like you are the reason why a candidate like me – a teacher, lesbian, and mom from a working-class background – can get elected to Congress.** And in this next cycle, your support will help me stay here. That’s why I ask you to give $5 and $10 to our campaign when it makes sense for you, but especially ahead of deadlines like the one we’re facing at the end of the month. In the coming weeks I am going to be announcing some exciting projects in Vermont, continuing the work of changing political culture, bucking the status quo, and building an organization around courage and kindness (and being scrappy as hell!)! So, each time we get a $5 donation, I want you to know that it is truly meaningful to me and my team. It is because of people like you that I am not beholden to corporate donors, and that we built a community of 15,000 people who believed that politics can be different. I am very proud of that, and I do not take your time or your hard-earned money for granted. **[So if you can swing it, I would appreciate your support to help us hit our $10,000 January goal for the month with a contribution of $5 or more today. clean_body: It’s a fair question! | | I want to take a moment to clear something up, Peter. Many of you have been emailing me recently to ask: If you won your election, then why are you still asking me to donate to your campaign? It’s a fair question! So I wanted to take a second to answer: First off, YES – we won in November! And yes, I am just about to wrap up my first month representing Vermont in Congress. But remember all of the work it took to get here? We faced an extremely competitive and contested primary. At many points, we were outraised, outspent, and down in the polls. Next cycle, it’s likely that we could face another competitive primary, and anti-LGBTQ interest groups could come out of the woodwork to spend against us. We cannot take a single thing for granted – and we cannot let our campaign operation lapse. Grassroots contributions from people like you are the reason why a candidate like me – a teacher, lesbian, and mom from a working-class background – can get elected to Congress. And in this next cycle, your support will help me stay here. That’s why I ask you to give $5 and $10 to our campaign when it makes sense for you, but especially ahead of deadlines like the one we’re facing at the end of the month. In the coming weeks I am going to be announcing some exciting projects in Vermont, continuing the work of changing political culture, bucking the status quo, and building an organization around courage and kindness (and being scrappy as hell!)! So, each time we get a $5 donation, I want you to know that it is truly meaningful to me and my team. It is because of people like you that I am not beholden to corporate donors, and that we built a community of 15,000 people who believed that politics can be different. I am very proud of that, and I do not take your time or your hard-earned money for granted. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for hearing me out, and for investing in our campaign operation as we build for the cycle ahead. Your support means the world to me. – Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to ever serve Vermont in Congress. If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, ** = If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P.O. Box 291, Burlington, VT, 05402

name: LCV Rapid Response
subject: VOTE IMMINENT: House prepares major expansion of oil and gas drilling on public land. We need your help, Peter.
body:
__Your impact goes three times as far when you join today. |
---

|
BREAKING -- House Republicans have just announced a vote on their proposal to _devastate_ America's public lands by forcing the Biden administration to open more federal land to dirty oil and gas drilling.__

_**This is the vote we 've been warning you about, Peter.**_ It's shameful -- Congress should not sign off on _even more_ giveaways to Big Oil ... especially by handing over our most cherished and critical public lands and waters to drilling. ****_****_

Our teams are meeting with legislators and campaigning to stop this proposal from becoming law - and we're fighting together with President Biden to stop this extremist agenda. The _best_ thing you can do to help is to fund our hard-hitting environmental campaigns. [Please, become an LCV member for just $5 today. Your gift will be TRIPLE MATCHED, multiplying your impact at this key moment.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

I want you to know -- even as we prepare a major major effort ahead of this vote, your membership supports critical environmental work in so many other urgent ways. Here are are just a few of the reasons your membership matters SO MUCH right now:
* **Because we 're keeping up the pressure to make sure that the commitments made in the Inflation Reduction Act are met.** This includes ensuring that Congress provides the necessary appropriations to federal agencies that will implement the climate, cost-saving, jobs, and health benefits unlocked by the law. [We must see this historic legislation through, and we need your help to make that happen >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)
* **Because we 're calling on the Biden-Harris administration to exercise its full executive authority to protect the environment, our health, and the climate. **In doing so, the administration can stop future drilling on public lands, force dirty power plants to clean up, ensure more cars and trucks are electric, and accelerate deployment of clean renewable energy sources. But that's only going to happen if the environmental movement organizes and speaks out. [Power our response: pitch in to protect public lands >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)
* **Because we 're pushing for confirmation of key executive branch vacancies. **Agencies such as the EPA and Federal Energy Regulatory Commission protect the environment and public health, deliver environmental justice, and advance clean renewable energy and climate action: [This is how we get climate action done, but we need support from the environmental movement to back us >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)
* **Because your membership goes three times further right now.** A group of donors is triple matching every contribution through the end of the month. Your support will make triple the impact to ensure that we can accomplish all of our congressional priorities for this year: from implementing the historic pro-climate investments from the Inflation Reduction Act to supporting the environmental justice movement.****[Donate now and your contribution will go even further >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)
* **Because membership is only $5 right now.** Environmental justice issues impact every single one of us: everyone deserves access to clean air, clean water, and a safe climate protected by a just and equitable democracy. [Help us build a sustainable future: any amount will help >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

We have a plan to stop House Republicans' anti-environmental agenda, Peter. We're preparing to drive thousands of letters and calls into Congress. We're rallying environmentalists in key states. And we're pressuring pro-climate senators to hold the line against these extremist bills coming out of the House.

We're gearing up for a fight, but **how big we can go and how hard we can fight will depend on your support.**

So we're asking: [claim your LCV membership for just $5 today. For a limited time, a group of generous donors will TRIPLE every gift to jumpstart our campaign.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thanks for helping us stop this horrible proposal. We'll be in touch soon with more ways you can help.

Onward,

LCV Rapid Response
Alex, Annie, and Norita

|
---
**[**JOIN FOR JUST $5 TODAY**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/7RYwsNG~)**

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9127110&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDU4ODkxOAS2&spReportId=MTY2MDU4ODkxOAS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9127110&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDU4ODkxOAS2&spReportId=MTY2MDU4ODkxOAS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a83ac4f965d42e18bc24101abcf4540&_e=CP5vO85S0jAO9NujqnjRHPHQzc4ptmzEEpSsKncrCorXwLSQtfFTGNKs_UXEP36tqimhQXShZSLIRTipbbF8QAp4OzqPfGFLu2Knc4VxDGKZwyjCqRXiYVWZCwA5fAXVdwrzn_6mIBwmBUbHhgps5L8JH301j_KFBa3n5JGgDEgjxZXltHJsR9VIL9VmYUBFDVAz4Yvm93A08s2ECGfz7kkHudKQBFJ1z8aXUfSBsg9gAaTrqdU1Z8DbwGbZY8Dmbs77PuoSsJm2i_pQG1bzdLVEr0HPSE0wUDlgLzrQHh0JH497XYqkofGit8Yyfsr0RAk8uVa4yrtlHJHw-2SRUpvcU7t1KRIgG4lonaUC7ere7iEZw6K-YMph7Tl-OaLjHJTyG8h3_utDMyEaBsQDPA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a83ac4f965d42e18bc24101abcf4540&_e=CP5vO85S0jAO9NujqnjRHPHQzc4ptmzEEpSsKncrCorXwLSQtfFTGNKs_UXEP36tqimhQXShZSLIRTipbbF8QAp4OzqPfGFLu2Knc4VxDGKZwyjCqRXiYVWZCwA5fAXVdwrzn_6mIBwmBUbHhgps5L8JH301j_KFBa3n5JGgDEgjxZXltHJsR9VIL9VmYUBFDVAz4Yvm93A08s2ECGfz7kkHudKQBFJ1z8aXUfSBsg9gAaTrqdU1Z8DbwGbZY8DmvJuEymT0A9fZmFi4UIkGBVP7AIt9jySnmPPIOzMRLjZ-x7xhsaakjqM5goMFLNKrdT_DsXnqEDItGJoDlMdescHZO3T3C1csuuBqMJMFFdxFY53xIkaLnr9SfNbs0SmfRtaXXo1cVBopXf37CNawKg%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a83ac4f965d42e18bc24101abcf4540&_e=CP5vO85S0jAO9NujqnjRHPHQzc4ptmzEEpSsKncrCorXwLSQtfFTGNKs_UXEP36tqimhQXShZSLIRTipbbF8QAp4OzqPfGFLu2Knc4VxDGKZwyjCqRXiYVWZCwA5fAXVdwrzn_6mIBwmBUbHhgps5L8JH301j_KFBa3n5JGgDEgjxZXltHJsR9VIL9VmYUBFDVAz4Yvm93A08s2ECGfz7kkHudKQBFJ1z8aXUfSBsg9gAaTrqdU1Z8DbwGbZY8DmkTtO-j9STqmDi1Zc_fCWuh-SUsKQSnUGZI2Y11RpxOrKHPUu61SqcLo-hQdoIIeoDSrSxJyjJwxDCoG3Xoq_oNaAFCETWhawpEn-rqC4qUqA_ZkSD8nhi8dZWFJDqpWXzqoXU_tGRYaG8IfJ__c4Xw%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Action News
subject: Nancy And Paul Pelosi Dump Google Stock Weeks Before Justice Department Antitrust Lawsuit
body:
And BREAKING: Classified Documents Found At Former V.P. Mike Pence’s Home
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi4qm719bttt7mngr8ohubvuo2gae234lqknefu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdie0pj4cph2bs)

name: Rep. Maxwell Frost
subject: why I can't get an apartment in DC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
I'm Maxwell Frost, Representative for Florida's 10th Congressional district and one of Rep. Pramila Jayapal's newest coworkers in Congress.
I asked Rep. Jayapal if I can share my story with her grassroots supporters since she has always been a champion for working class families, and I plan to be that champion alongside her.
Now get this — I applied to rent an apartment in DC where I admitted upfront that my credit was really bad. He said I'd be fine. But I just got denied, lost the apartment — _and_ my application fee.
Even I, as a member of Congress, am getting rejected by apartments because of the financial system designed to hold working people back.
_Our housing system is broken. Working-class people are facing skyrocketing rent, gentrification, and de facto segregation. And it's become crystal clear that we can't rely on the same old institutions to fix the same old problems.
_
**We NEED and DESERVE young, working, everyday people in Congress who know firsthand the struggles of the working-class, including the increasingly dire housing crisis. And we NEED leaders in Congress who will do the work to fix this broken system — leaders like Rep. Pramila Jayapal, who is firm in the belief that housing IS a human right.
**
[**Peter, I'm ready to advocate for better and fairer housing policies in Congress alongside Rep. Jayapal, but we need your help. We set a goal to raise $10,000 today to keep our campaigns firing on all cylinders so we can continue our fight for working families in Congress. Can you make a split contribution to my campaign and Rep. Jayapal's now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/26277?refcode=em20230125-2092&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2092%2E420207%2EqAuX6E)
Peter, our political system makes it very difficult for people like myself to run for office.
The whole reason I have bad credit is because I ran up a lot of debt running for Congress for a year and a half. For that primary, I quit my full-time job because I knew that to win at 25 years old, I'd need to be a full-time candidate: 7 days a week, 10-12 hours a day.
As a candidate, you can't give yourself a paycheck until the very end of your campaign. For most of the run, you have no money coming in unless you work a second job. For me, I drove for Uber at night, but that still wasn't enough to pay for my living expenses.
**These financial inequalities are why over 50% of people serving in Congress are millionaires. It's no wonder that Congress hasn't passed policies to help working families when politicians are so disconnected from the average American.
**
[**Rep. Jayapal and I are ready to fight for real solutions that so many Americans face, but we need to raise $10,000 to _stay_ in Congress and continue pushing our movement forward. Will you pitch in a $27 split donation between me and Rep. Jayapal before midnight?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/26277?refcode=em20230125-2092&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2092%2E420207%2EqAuX6E)
**[Chip in »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/26277?refcode=em20230125-2092&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2092%2E420207%2EqAuX6E)**
Thank you,
Rep. Maxwell Frost

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230125-2092-footer&t=22&refcode2=2092_420207_qAuX6E&akid=2092%2E420207%2EqAuX6E)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2092%2E420207%2EqAuX6E)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2092%2E420207%2EqAuX6E)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

| | Hi D. P., How many times is unfinished business never addressed? Do you feel lost at board meetings? Do you feel your voice is not being heard? Learn how to stand up for yourself and voice a concern or a motion. The application of parliamentary law is the best method yet devised to enable assemblies of any size, with due regard for every member's opinion, to arrive at the general will on the maximum number of questions of varying complexity in a minimum amount time and under all kinds of internal climate ranging from total harmony to hardened or impassioned division of opinion. Develop skills to be able to serve as a competent committee chairman or member. Develop skills to be able to function well as an organizational officer or member. Appreciate the importance of using a parliamentary authority in business and in your volunteer organizations. Assess the effectiveness of the meetings you conduct or attend.
---

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: FOR YOUR EYES ONLY:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | **FOR YOUR EYES ONLY: MESSAGE FROM SPEAKER MCCARTHY**
Friend, thanks to YOUR SUPPORT, Republicans have taken back the House and are ready to get to work for Americans across the nation.

But Biden has the White House & Schumer has the Senate. We are now the ONLY thing standing between the elitist radical agenda of Biden and hardworking Americans like you.

Whether or not we reach our fundraising goal by midnight tonight will define what happens for the next two years.

**We need 100 patriots from every zip code in the nation to step up by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**

If we fail, the last two years will just look like a warmup when the devastating consequences of their radical policies hit home.
**Will you stand with us?**

---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=621641c1b1af4db9ba8f2fa288c189f4&_e=1UwMPLCzW_y00HefnD0EP1XH6UEPdWvYJ671C7xCRw-ErHXvyovJvF7T5ZSfEn69j-Yhhfc0kttJlzP9F1XrRECbYRVql8U8H3A7aNfYdnWn5bw-AvZrLbhIqj411d-4uGFoFFvT7lrv19uHw7V6MNN1fem4qxtxuW0v9JxGVX-n6QRGUfLwmIHLxdqKReEJxKzdQOarXnZ3zJPpi4A4Lhv9SMQ3gmXpabPKa39eYURAeit4a9uk4iUszGDBO8DM4RbtKUW0ksuItq_KHE75-sBkzB-4ewqxz2ap_O-pIflPjpotBxF8jJVpZvvrArrf2dHpnCTIb7wAWYOUQiAlTh1uF2yiIQ35LBVrESv9VMsmMeQ3CdT0kQtOU3OKhLTZY3mgEZdPHKUYgB16yABupyBeyXgxm9xusR8V9M06s_FENpdtUZ2-DMLNqPJB7oLTj3qREAg9Az5xvB3WPR_JhQ%3D%3D)

Peter, It's no secret that our border is a complete and utter disaster. A mix of incompetence and deliberate decisions have led to...
* Deadly drugs flooding across the border into our neighborhoods.
* Millions of unvetted illegal immigrants crossing and released into our communities
* Cartels essentially seizing operation control of the border.

And at least one person who MUST be held responsible:**Biden's Secretary of Homeland Security, Alejandro Mayorkas.**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4db3f6867a4d409c804fcbaffdd37b29&_e=9mvdmCVwmMvTJkLGInYLka76s9N7IaJeCcJ2GZHjCnJRI9WP0WA2wpX_OAf_p7JRPzWUqPixBG1uSzvkGp8goGHfnHgPME_SEdEDzBFLwkGTl7xEvDYSWp_nifUQ23YU4f9ztjDga-P0REkCD3WQD_8Nca0eFE9pO19PMPgv2uon9KhgjhCp5WgA6pW_S3jKfQk62mLr7vWMMLA8hovPMpWrFCo-cx9eLho3HoQGll9SNvyjAqK4FTYGgj4dDvfIYKmw2zX1R0L6aZw8dThyj0LhdwocqRtgByY_9GHsw6aPXXwEC2meRyIkEqai9JgOR0XkNkLjNkagUyUpGnQ3NyWC9542eOnjE68Txv4QIONLJtgp-7ybEp5Hx4JVdvMWk2aDCQ8RHktQ42Quy3jGBw%3D%3D)

subject: It doesn’t have to be this way
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need you to know that a better future is possible.
#

Friends -
People are dying every day in America from preventable acts of gun violence.
It doesn’t have to be this way.
We don’t have to live in a country where we fear for our lives in what should be safe spaces in our communities—our neighborhoods, our grocery stores, our schools, our places of worship.
[**Our team at Giffords won’t rest until a future without gun violence is a reality in our country. Will you please contribute $3 today to help us keep moving forward in this important fight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230125-1-15&t=1&akid=4132%2E3935704%2E9Tb_dn)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230125-1-15&t=2&akid=4132%2E3935704%2E9Tb_dn)**
We understand that when multiple mass shooting events happen in a row, overcoming our nation’s gun violence epidemic may seem impossible.
But we need you to know that a better future _is_ possible.
There is no one solution to solve the complex gun violence crisis in our nation. The status quo is not working, but we can change our course. That's why we have to keep up the fight to enact a variety of laws—including popular measures like universal background checks.
[**So please. Contribute $3 today to help us keep up the fight to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230125-1-15&t=3&akid=4132%2E3935704%2E9Tb_dn)

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Higher Education Opinion Survey
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ad2d43e0c5142d69032f36e8e5a451f&_e=UndTHaYU4gq0GBBvOluZ4suhCa9u_GZZCOfKresgKckVC_oHnu9oWHsNw5PlyCNtxaLR2KZovnrNJtxx3rsWl8gvhvCrz0u-UGM8Wz98IS-jlGokYbhgZN6v7AV_BnMxOOS3SmwyRKyEaKrEBZp9asNolRK25Upk-pZxA1ZBZfhLs1vaJvD4J_G2TZZhq9Im6Y8wBPEShCbaO8Tl9H79QKBZLFZ0-hZXsPhaYlN6QrmAvjyT01XN0Kfuk0dwWcC7Q7LlCrA2onmWMnsKUfArIHrxqLFOLJHg_cVdibvBjW0ZszCoKPwZQiEWFGvHBttvVG9yo3DMnuRmN9q3MEJjMyCC0DB8rc_BueVtlXyRlEpAwvJdt1Ljn6ZPgkXl7W1t)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ad2d43e0c5142d69032f36e8e5a451f&_e=UndTHaYU4gq0GBBvOluZ4suhCa9u_GZZCOfKresgKckVC_oHnu9oWHsNw5PlyCNtxaLR2KZovnrNJtxx3rsWl8gvhvCrz0u-UGM8Wz98IS-jlGokYbhgZN6v7AV_BnMxOOS3SmwyRKyEaKrEBZp9asNolRK25Upk-pZxA1ZBZfhLs1vaJvD4J_G2TZZhq9Im6Y8wBPEShCbaO8Tl9H79QKBZLFZ0-hZXsPhaYlN6QrkAgYQ7Q_Q7cvGeHg5gErzlFr_yJAcAepdRMECDpmkkqUk2kyBNUf9ZjtWhGE6vNYRqszokY-AH5ytW2DwkpD8wSx_E6aVPVGI6O5S8ArMmxUi2u_55FU3VVzu0AWNN2sqvMwg_BQaFAMipTJuH-l0i) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ad2d43e0c5142d69032f36e8e5a451f&_e=UndTHaYU4gq0GBBvOluZ4suhCa9u_GZZCOfKresgKckVC_oHnu9oWHsNw5PlyCNtxaLR2KZovnrNJtxx3rsWl8gvhvCrz0u-UGM8Wz98IS-jlGokYbhgZN6v7AV_BnMxOOS3SmwyRKyEaKrEBZp9asNolRK25Upk-pZxA1ZBZfhLs1vaJvD4J_G2TZZhq9Im6Y8wBPEShCbaO8Tl9H79QKBZLFZ0-hZXsPhaYlN6QrkG0XpqIiVnA0VF9XOeYxXKHWRgI2Wng0ar2_KYQ-QWJHmUhyfP3u5y297p80jW7j6OsAyWqcmrvrGjNC8BD0Zv1mwzozIMrDpgeaO_nLwHlIEjQRUJkj4zuS4LT-iNw6bNLvKqeSlHKPL-hZzf5piq) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.

clean_body: Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government | | | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? I am deeply grateful for your friendship. Warm Regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Jason Crow
subject: Members of Congress shouldn’t be allowed to buy, sell, or trade stocks. Add your name if you agree →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

Members of Congress are elected to carry out the will of the people — not to line their own pockets. The American people should trust that their elected officials are in Congress fighting for them and not their own financial interests.

There is one pretty simple solution: Members of Congress should not be allowed to buy, sell, or trade stocks while serving in Congress.

We need to increase trust, transparency, and accountability in our government. The TRUST in Congress Act will help do that.

More than 76% of Americans — Democrats, Republicans, and Independents — believe members of Congress shouldn’t be allowed to trade stocks. I agree. It’s time to make sure our government works for the American people.

Sign on today if you agree: Members of Congress shouldn't be allowed to buy, sell, or trade stocks while in office: [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/stocks]

ADD MY NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/stocks]

Let’s get this done,

Jason

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2023]
Jason Crow for Congress
PO Box 32145
Aurora, CO 80041
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
