name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Will you support my friend Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#
Hi friends -
I am reaching out with a special favor to ask. I got a note from Senator Kirsten Gillibrand that I’d like to share with you. She’s running for re-election and needs our help.
We need to make sure we defend strong Democratic voices like Sen. Gillibrand who will fight for voting rights, reproductive freedom, climate action and more.
She and her team always had my back, so I’m hoping you will read Sen. Gillibrand’s note below and [**consider contributing any amount you can to her campaign today.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-gillibrand.GHJnp5&refcode=em230125-1-mat1&t=1&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8)
Thank you so much for your support.
\- Cheri Beasley
* * *
Friends, she might not realize it yet, but the little girl in this photo is learning from her grandmother that her voice _matters_ — and that her advocacy can make a difference.
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-gillibrand.GHJnp5&refcode=em230125-1-mat1&t=2&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8)
In a world full of people telling young girls to be quiet and wait their turn, seeing my grandmother be a fiery and outspoken advocate for women changed everything for me. She is who inspired me to be bold and raise my voice.
That’s the reason I ran for office: to be a voice for those who don’t have one and to take on the toughest fights in Washington and stand up for what’s right.
Today, we have lots of tough fights ahead in the Senate: for reproductive freedom, voting rights, climate action, affordable health care, national paid leave and access to child care. I will be fearless in the fight to get the job done — just like my grandmother taught me.
But I need _your_ help. With so much at stake, Democrats are hanging onto our Senate majority by a thread. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip two seats to retake control — and after New York Republicans secured historic victories across the state during the midterm elections, the GOP is targeting me for defeat.
**I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs. My fight is fueled by you and for you. But that means I can’t take on the GOP’s megadonor machine and keep this seat blue without your grassroots support.**
[**So please, will you donate $3 or more right now to help me defeat the GOP in New York, defend our narrow Democratic majority and continue fearlessly fighting for you in the Senate?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-gillibrand.GHJnp5&refcode=em230125-1-mat1&t=3&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution to Kirsten Gillibrand instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2574?c0=cb-em-gillibrand.wCdj5w&refcode=em230125-1-mat1&refcode2=2281.357359.7Tg5g8&t=4&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2575?c0=cb-em-gillibrand.TH-aMn&refcode=em230125-1-mat1&refcode2=2281.357359.7Tg5g8&t=5&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $25](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2568?c0=cb-em-gillibrand.0TdP6P&refcode=em230125-1-mat1&refcode2=2281.357359.7Tg5g8&t=6&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2569?c0=cb-em-gillibrand.3hIFUv&refcode=em230125-1-mat1&refcode2=2281.357359.7Tg5g8&t=7&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2570?c0=cb-em-gillibrand.f0I7zT&refcode=em230125-1-mat1&refcode2=2281.357359.7Tg5g8&t=8&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2573?c0=cb-em-gillibrand.JQTnL_&refcode=em230125-1-mat1&refcode2=2281.357359.7Tg5g8&t=9&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8)**
---
****
Together, I know there isn’t a single thing we can’t accomplish. Thank you for being by my side.
Kirsten Gillibrand

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=10&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=12&refcode2=2281_357359_7Tg5g8&akid=2281%2E357359%2E7Tg5g8) today to help us make history.

body:
all of our priorities could get swept under the rug

| | It’s been less than a month since the 118th, Republican-led Congress convened — and House Republicans are ALREADY attacking voting rights, immigration, and abortion.

We’re _urgently_ shaping our 2023 strategy to ensure that Democrats win BIG next year — _and House Republicans are stopped before they destroy everything!_

**So Peter, it’s _never_ been more important that we know where PA Democrats stand:**

| | **Time is running out for you to join the 6,701 Democrats that activated their 2023 DLCC membership!** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tL2Vm_fpYa78vmtI4v8IipV6DLZFck8ZFy0lFQ_W3uQz-wlrCxMrabeYKztGE0ojRVX1o2vJzbw5Z8UK3Pn2DHx0ubazFpx9D7MpHJxsnjWa1TBPXroeXHtEs7nq3-ckaTJ8TbXZPQv8fJBEcHWahWM6Z7SqRw5It7SswophGee9AoU9WttQJcAB4xP1FQm1G3xQi-BgCjPG8N630blsAIqT_kpr9zh1j0KXkzGIuAtAucQYMHyK25WGx-B_LMZPWx2dICEH2SjK_xZ_3x1J5PwL1Y85J7ZFbaZKbfP13jbN6DJ81wAUY2rjiHeueV0EbdJw-4nx8L2mm06KgazagyNuqAYPyg1-_fdraPidR5VWCbyfqS4lRyqtcvXnh83jbOEW5WMsoqBMdwHXyYoxFq5zMpzIV2f3wWvBo6XfOnNlh3ApkJ5c0i3BQ2hx2FVhs-XkaDS0zHsnotdv8NXv2jAEhYUgjYq_GfhsLTiwpnaZJLojN_Orl_mUO0t0KGnwR8yw6MelBgOa6H6lWUTkfrkTpoU3o96QWLyHLbnSl8MhI/3t5/QubdkQ5uSGO9bG3G-wH_Zw/h0/Die1hZW_WAZJ91U4WjXezxVydcbDxVyi-9aoC5O4-zA) We’ve seen a huge jump in the number of official 2023 members in January – but time is running out to claim your membership this month! **Here’s three ways your membership contribution will help elect state Democrats, nationwide: →**
1. **Your contribution will urgently help Democrats win in special elections** , like upcoming races in battlegrounds Pennsylvania and New Hampshire where the margins are so slim, special elections could determine who controls those chambers! In fact, state Democrats always have elections on the books, even when federal candidates don’t.
2. Supporting state Democrats _today_ will make a huge impact on our ability to win states like Virginia this fall. **Chipping in now, while it's early in the cycle, means your contribution has the ability to shape the strategy and scope of our fight to take back the Virginia House and defend the Virginia Senate – impact that just isn't possible when your support comes in later in the year.**
3. Because of the extremist Supreme Court, voting rights, abortion access, and so much more are up to state legislators. **Becoming a member today means your contribution will go towards electing pro-abortion rights, pro-voting Democrats.**

State legislative elections are far too often underfunded and overlooked, but the reality is that state Democrats are on the front lines making the critical decisions that affect your everyday life. But if we don’t have enough support, it’ll be Republicans who are making those decisions about your right to abortion access, the ballot box, and a safe planet. That’s why it’s so important for you to take the next step and activate your 2023 membership today. Remember: When Democrats win, they protect our democracy, abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, our climate, and so much more. When Republicans win, they do the exact opposite. [So, before the window closes on January membership cards – can you help state Democrats win big by becoming an official 2023 DLCC Member? clean_body: If you are still on the fence about joining our grassroots team, here are some reasons to invest in the DLCC today | | | | | Time is running out for you to join the 6,701 Democrats that activated their 2023 DLCC membership! We’ve seen a huge jump in the number of official 2023 members in January – but time is running out to claim your membership this month! Here’s three ways your membership contribution will help elect state Democrats, nationwide: → 1. Your contribution will urgently help Democrats win in special elections , like upcoming races in battlegrounds Pennsylvania and New Hampshire where the margins are so slim, special elections could determine who controls those chambers! In fact, state Democrats always have elections on the books, even when federal candidates don’t. 2. Supporting state Democrats today will make a huge impact on our ability to win states like Virginia this fall. Chipping in now, while it's early in the cycle, means your contribution has the ability to shape the strategy and scope of our fight to take back the Virginia House and defend the Virginia Senate – impact that just isn't possible when your support comes in later in the year. 3. Because of the extremist Supreme Court, voting rights, abortion access, and so much more are up to state legislators. Becoming a member today means your contribution will go towards electing pro-abortion rights, pro-voting Democrats. State legislative elections are far too often underfunded and overlooked, but the reality is that state Democrats are on the front lines making the critical decisions that affect your everyday life. But if we don’t have enough support, it’ll be Republicans who are making those decisions about your right to abortion access, the ballot box, and a safe planet. That’s why it’s so important for you to take the next step and activate your 2023 membership today. Remember: When Democrats win, they protect our democracy, abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, our climate, and so much more. When Republicans win, they do the exact opposite. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Don’t miss this opportunity! And thank you for all you do. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: There have been five gun massacres in California, Iowa, and Washington State in recent days, and Congress still does nothing to control firearms nationally.
body:
Heartbreaking. Cruel. Treasonous.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0cd56f4-2042-4bad-a6d3-474cc0350338/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Heartbreaking. Cruel. Treasonous. _Just a few descriptions of Republican policy and cruelty that enables mass gun death in America._ **_Firearms have now surpassed cars as the leading cause of death for our children._ **It is at the same time sickening and horrifying. _There were five gun massacres in California, Iowa and Washington State in recent days, leaving 24 dead and families destroyed. __States like California and Washington have done the right thing, passing strict laws, and they've greatly lowered their gun violence rates. __**But they can't stop guns from crossing state lines. We NEED a national solution.**_ [**_Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Giffords so we end this uniquely American tragedy, once and for all_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5fed7142-3f5d-4b06-83b3-9dc324156325/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66f5d759-4012-4fd4-b75c-491e837fa53c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Fred Guttenberg--a friend who lost his daughter in the Parkland massacre--put it perfectly during a recent appearance on Nicole Wallace's MSNBC show when discussing Republicans:_ **_" They talk right to life. My daughter had a right to life, people killed this week had a right to life. They talk freedom? You don't have freedom from the grave. Ok. My daughter doesn't have freedom from the grave."_** _None of us have this freedom. I knew Fred's sister before Fred's daughter was murdered. We will all know survivors of gun violence or become them ourselves if we don't stop this plague. NOW._ **_" Giffords," founded/run by former Rep. Gabby Giffords (shot through the head during a town hall in Tucson) and her husband, recently re-elected Sen. Mark Kelly, fights every day to end the sickening scourge of gun violence. __We know how to do it. They know how to do it. Every other high income democracy has done it. _** [**_Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Giffords so we end this uniquely American tragedy, once and for all._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a56a078-d79c-45de-95d0-72f41a3b1fe9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for caring for your country and community, Cliff
---

|

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/fiverecentshootings-giffords-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc35ac93f-6ca2-49a1-9d29-c97c12a205e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

A left-wing activist launched a campaign against Josh, no doubt backed by the enormous sums of coastal cash that the liberal elitists flood into far-left coffers around the nation.

The Democrat machine made retaking Missouri and our Great Nation a TOP PRIORITY, which means defending it is CRITICAL!! Josh is on the ballot, but we can't win this without YOU. Chip in today and help Josh HOLD THE LINE in Missouri!

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Secure our border!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
We have to DEMAND Mayorkas be held accountable
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=ffa50401b58f4ace95e6b838864eddae&_e=UV36mGLcQGVk6LuYHw6bYtccS6jnCJmGqLTWiUNsUmVj0rQ_IloIAB-D9doAdkcdzl86CiB0tFqjkbpPF3cmJPm6b9fsrwEgLNxSjxVjysKGtbY-045slKc1PYlX6AvQbGGm8l47ObuO4dvgMGITMZ3AiSbRYuWuWWrDeH1XCzF6cwUp2gYkpJ32e1TuOZsxtyb4Jfd5tHEbbUjVMIkSJ9CFn5cCYEwejARHvnf5qi3ST-k0HtoK7ecP9BtMBwhFoDP4QQdQkAmrbdwGMUU7bNi6XcO_NuPP9-KRpmNeU18cd_NrYTYb8IzoBg-JBsNv2TJjovXqjk90r09R-LfS4ndQ1TKiGXQ2DdAukx1wocQ%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Monthly encounters between U.S. Border Patrol Agents and migrants at our southern border remain at levels that have not been seen in more than **TWO DECADES!**
---
Yet, when the Secretary of Homeland Security, Alejandro Mayorkas, is questioned about the border he tells us, “ _our border is secure._ ”
---
It’s time that we held the people responsible for this crisis accountable and that starts with Mayorkas.
---
That’s why I need you to take my Official Mayorkas Impeachment Poll to let your voice be heard and help us **DEMAND** action.
---
[**Please take my official poll today to let me know if you think Mayorkas should be impeached >>**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=ffa50401b58f4ace95e6b838864eddae&_e=UV36mGLcQGVk6LuYHw6bYtccS6jnCJmGqLTWiUNsUmVj0rQ_IloIAB-D9doAdkcdzl86CiB0tFqjkbpPF3cmJPm6b9fsrwEgLNxSjxVjysKGtbY-045slKc1PYlX6AvQbGGm8l47ObuO4dvgMGITMZ3AiSbRYuWuWWrDeH1XCzF6cwUp2gYkpJ32e1TuOZsxtyb4Jfd5tHEbbUjVMIkSJ1zhcXacsF_7NKI8tf9MRsXAGD4gJ7UF3Q2uIE5A_Frt8Sptba4PVPCtpxwK4DjXv42ll9z7oBjFCWRoz3jgogbBpeULOLFjWIWHQ0khyrPLXQ6yIVcTBcvXWkS5fHLS8KAm68yt7EyHVF-M_B__vd4%3D)
---

[TAKE THE POLL](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=ffa50401b58f4ace95e6b838864eddae&_e=UV36mGLcQGVk6LuYHw6bYtccS6jnCJmGqLTWiUNsUmVj0rQ_IloIAB-D9doAdkcdzl86CiB0tFqjkbpPF3cmJPm6b9fsrwEgLNxSjxVjysKGtbY-045slKc1PYlX6AvQbGGm8l47ObuO4dvgMGITMZ3AiSbRYuWuWWrDeH1XCzF6cwUp2gYkpJ32e1TuOZsxtyb4Jfd5tHEbbUjVMIkSJ0qrNlyvyLuRiHNz6lKO-Unn8ioDHb4kg5rIa8WDn5_N6EsA3uGR13iSn8MCr4p2vCgvtbeaSevUrU7OgGZnIJPlBu4W61hBAhtd8s-t-6cFHWpxPx-zlgZ_EesUVxLaTgiUni8zLsUzAzIGQJE6mdk%3D)
---

At least 98 suspected terrorists crossed the border into the U.S. illegally in the last year, putting Americans’ safety at risk.
---
And fentanyl is coming across the border at a record rate – more than 379 million deadly doses were seized in 2022 – more than enough to kill every single American.
---
**If we continue down this path of open-border policies and ignorance from those in charge, the consequences will be even more catastrophic in this new year.**
---
We have to secure our southern border to stop the flood of illegal migrants and drugs from threatening the safety of our country and YOU.
---
_And by DEMANDING action against Mayorkas and the Biden Administration, we will be one step closer to a secured border._
---
[**So please, take my official poll today to let me know if you think Mayorkas should be impeached >>**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=ffa50401b58f4ace95e6b838864eddae&_e=UV36mGLcQGVk6LuYHw6bYtccS6jnCJmGqLTWiUNsUmVj0rQ_IloIAB-D9doAdkcdzl86CiB0tFqjkbpPF3cmJPm6b9fsrwEgLNxSjxVjysKGtbY-045slKc1PYlX6AvQbGGm8l47ObuO4dvgMGITMZ3AiSbRYuWuWWrDeH1XCzF6cwUp2gYkpJ32e1TuOZsxtyb4Jfd5tHEbbUjVMIkSJ6MeWP9Yimx3JvYDwlz9eQj2wi-lkBcqCQQSWU-82v1OQ4SyH6RcWwSkp7rtLu6YAtINRz_xSmXuenSUxbetEYRUI14Cq11W1RMatK4wQ59Crc9M4t3Cc_2j9kLr7cPcXvSgzhYFwO2YiPxG3cuE7n4%3D)
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=ffa50401b58f4ace95e6b838864eddae&_e=UV36mGLcQGVk6LuYHw6bYtccS6jnCJmGqLTWiUNsUmVj0rQ_IloIAB-D9doAdkcdzl86CiB0tFqjkbpPF3cmJPm6b9fsrwEgLNxSjxVjysKGtbY-045slKc1PYlX6AvQbGGm8l47ObuO4dvgMGITMZ3AiSbRYuWuWWrDeH1XCzF6cwUp2gYkpJ32e1TuOZsxtyb4Jfd5tHEbbUjVMIkSJ6PCaWfCWq86ZH7cwtRM7ufDTs4nFbDBQF60RzjozB3w_HIQRRfQETIcqhNmqDD6Y8tG9FNZdJKuOxJ04XaaGyuHqFETYWRFdGgNLxkkvyXkdxl8ETSg6QRjY_4SX1sizIXsQEv7fDiPY3vEoAfoX7E%3D)

| | _Who is the American Federation for Children? _ We’re an organization of parents, activists, and policy professionals all united under one mission: **bringing school choice to parents and students in every state. ** We believe EVERY parent deserves a choice, and EVERY child deserves better. **And 72% of Americans agree.** Yet, not every state offers even one alternative to traditional public school. **That’s not fair to students or parents.** Please submit your invaluable feedback and **[_complete the poll_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a713cc0363b6420ebca9b3299e941b98&_e=Sx8P4tZOtqHlDn4DPs2LFcRN4W8GgcIbXtEe_p30Gz0AgoobcQBj9lqB0kShFaKgoYEf_r67ZII5_prQJF9WV6tSCMVWq6xwwJ8ZN19T5AgN5oGR5jBaQ7HwFXIpQdwxJ94imFVnW2o-B2xMnd6uQWb_fVp2whfPHvTviq_yL2MNEmKHthSyV1rB6Nz_XVtyoTgRYnS_pecYNrFzd9_JmcN6ADMC4-7HqIcA7RayETqBM9kxv-DluEqw88A1LYDvHcuBFo8SF-vxIjND4lmGTEd5mKQVXMOXXjbyoN-eGN25BcOD4j3YlX8XwuxXVnZ48bigy0CiOcKXPhfgdu3YIu4Mr_2r6qH4aaOdCvTMZ_nIunQBoimqRU1No-rg99vf3Hanu33uVWwgHTFaiGtGp04PsX_Sj0u7V0YUecA55qiqH3UxyF-Z3glOLrJrN3ys) **before it closes at midnight tonight. | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: McCarthy’s latest attack

body:
| In the middle of the night, Kevin McCarthy removed Adam Schiff and me from the House Intelligence Committee.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1639%2E5257348%2EHRd4dm)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_swalwell._ZJ34J&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20230125_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1639%2E5257348%2EHRd4dm)
Derek,
It actually happened.
In the middle of the night, Kevin McCarthy removed Adam Schiff and me from the House Intelligence Committee.
Kevin McCarthy is obsessed with us. Why? _Because the two of us have worked tirelessly to bring the American people the truth about the January 6th attack on our democracy._
Kevin McCarthy has a personal vendetta against us and is using his new power to attempt to silence us. But Adam and I will **never** back down. **That’s why we're working to fight back against these attacks.[Can you split a donation between our campaigns today so we can continue telling the truth about McCarthy’s corrupt, anti-democracy party?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_swalwell._ZJ34J&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20230125_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1639%2E5257348%2EHRd4dm)**

---
McCarthy wants to replace my upstanding, hardworking colleagues and me with Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, and George Santos. _A triple threat trio of bigotry, violence, and corruption._ I mean, what could go wrong with these three on the House’s most influential committees?
**[Let’s show McCarthy we won’t give in to his bullying tactics like his Republican colleagues. If you’re with us, can you rush a contribution to be split between our campaigns?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=jan2023_abs_em_swalwell.S5XNmr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20230125_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1639%2E5257348%2EHRd4dm)**

body:
This is urgent, so we’ll keep it quick.

This is urgent, so we’ll keep it quick. **FIRST:**
For years, GOP gerrymandering in Pennsylvania helped Republicans win control of the state house – even when Democrats won a majority of the statewide vote.

**THEN:**
[**_With the support of this grassroots team_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57771213/389091897/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=20230125.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmM2EzMTBiLWVmOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tBoKOZq_rMvhCFBmqScW_hZxNCuEFzq6WOXSuZC6f9Q=), the NDRC helped defeat GOP gerrymandering efforts and secured fair maps in Pennsylvania and other states. And, _for the first time in over a decade_ , Pennsylvania Democrats won control of the state house!

**NOW:**

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8c767babb857479ea8112ce30eb394fa&_e=jOfohXDEV0XxuO0xrk_xb1mnsl44XDpOrnDM_w4NOGAEyCZKk0YAPXD89Vx7Cx6lozgoOo8aI1MWeb1DTcMuBdsU2nAr1Tu5VdN06hEoWRCvojkazvhD10RNuvw-uxxXGqZ7NILw9-OonKgGNOJdJFJhbXXw4bXQEIf9CL9yZzpT87Ax_DIhcW1qmBJrA9Y9Mw6_NQ0mdjAA-Ecexi2ELbw189QgI8B9xUfKmN3iKQSb4XcpCZm8QVSX7gYGysjX9ZPqqp2KCeabhYor2nbUBbd5rZu1zGAtzGOFoPSCY7Fk0IN2e_gYKPUQMC5Q5n1xIX_m7t71LPEEFwBRMExrZo1LNBawJbLj5SVdHHTI5m3l_N0FOpvmJVnCPTACk3TRR6Bu3hlg-KTCgtkFlIP-og%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family –– including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8c767babb857479ea8112ce30eb394fa&_e=jOfohXDEV0XxuO0xrk_xb1mnsl44XDpOrnDM_w4NOGAEyCZKk0YAPXD89Vx7Cx6lozgoOo8aI1MWeb1DTcMuBdsU2nAr1Tu5VdN06hEoWRCvojkazvhD10RNuvw-uxxXGqZ7NILw9-OonKgGNOJdJFJhbXXw4bXQEIf9CL9yZzpT87Ax_DIhcW1qmBJrA9Y9Mw6_NQ0mdjAA-Ecexi2ELbw189QgI8B9xUfKmN3iKQSb4XcpCZm8QVSX7gYGysjX0wGsrww9Zeophvf6Y2IGNNLuyqTuRl9B1blQ-UVtLPrntRjMd6dhPuHUOrYvxjBVHwcYByCFqCNSd4L1sk5bYwJVyJIE_XXfaXXnUOlgOhUAdC_W8BHaaTFfAc6_Yl-V7AAcW2rkwxm5o0ZesspWqA%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.” | | | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13. | | In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy... This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family –– including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?” This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country –– and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team AOC
subject: See you in 2024...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We filed for re-election.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230125-3828-header&t=1&akid=3828%2E2526796%2EWHCQ2D)
🎉 Alexandria just filed for re-election! 🎉
2024 will be a BIG year for elections, and Team AOC will be knocking doors and making calls to the residents of The Bronx and Queens to keep Alexandria fighting in Congress for a system that works for people like you and me — not special interests or corporate PAC’s!
[It’s important that we start off our fourth campaign cycle strong. Can you chip in $3 now to send a message to the opposition that NY-14 and people across the country want Alexandria back in Congress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230125.jKFf1s&refcode=em20230125-3828-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3828%2E2526796%2EWHCQ2D)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230125.jKFf1s&refcode=em20230125-3828-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3828%2E2526796%2EWHCQ2D)**
Alexandria is looking forward to running for her fourth term to fight for improved and expanded Medicare for All, guarantee affordable housing as a human right, and millions of good, union jobs to fight climate change with a Green New Deal.
A lot could happen between now and 2024, but one fundamental principle about our campaign remains constant: Alexandria’s seat in Congress is an opportunity to bring real change to the lives of working people.
As always, we thank you for your continued support!
In solidarity,
Team AOC
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230125.jKFf1s&refcode=em20230125-3828-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3828%2E2526796%2EWHCQ2D)

name: Alex Mooney
subject: The swamp doesn’t want you to see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mooney for Senate, Inc
body:
Look at what's in the omnibus that Manchin just voted for.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62248827:JPJ-ZdGlN:m:1:3367311000:559D882FA5DA0B4D241A637E2C3F9FA4:r)
---
Peter,
---
While our southern border remains undefended amidst a historic crisis, Joe Manchin voted for a $1.7 TRILLION omnibus bill that doesn't take any meaningful steps to secure our border.
---
_**But when you actually read the bill, it gets even worse: The legislation allocates _$370 MILLION_ in taxpayer dollars to Oman, Jordan, Egypt, Tunisia, and Lebanon for the express purpose of enhancing their border security!**_
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62248827:JPJ-ZdGlN:m:1:3367311000:559D882FA5DA0B4D241A637E2C3F9FA4:r)
---
Sending money to help other countries secure their borders while our own border is experiencing an unprecedented crisis is unconscionable. Talk about putting Americans last!
---
_I voted against this trainwreck of a bill that wastes your tax dollars while doing nothing substantial to end the crisis and secure our southern border._
---
But unfortunately, Joe Manchin sold out the American people yet again and enabled another round of Biden's reckless spending and his open-borders agenda.
---
**[Please make a contribution to help FIRE Manchin and elect a pro-Trump America First conservative as West Virginia's next Senator.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62248827:JPJ-ZdGlN:m:1:3367311000:559D882FA5DA0B4D241A637E2C3F9FA4:r)**
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62248829:JPJ-ZdGlN:m:1:3367311000:559D882FA5DA0B4D241A637E2C3F9FA4:r)

[CONTRIBUTE $75](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62248830:JPJ-ZdGlN:m:1:3367311000:559D882FA5DA0B4D241A637E2C3F9FA4:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62248831:JPJ-ZdGlN:m:1:3367311000:559D882FA5DA0B4D241A637E2C3F9FA4:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62248832:JPJ-ZdGlN:m:1:3367311000:559D882FA5DA0B4D241A637E2C3F9FA4:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62248827:JPJ-ZdGlN:m:1:3367311000:559D882FA5DA0B4D241A637E2C3F9FA4:r)
---

The consequences of the Manchin-enabled border crisis are staggering.
---
The U.S. Border Patrol are encountering an average of almost 200,000 illegal border crossers at the southern border every single month.
---
**More than FOUR MILLION illegal crossings have occurred since Biden took office.**
---
_In the first two years of the Biden Administration, there have already been more illegal border crossings than there were during the ENTIRE four years of the Trump Administration!_
---
To combat this crisis, we need to finish President Trump's border wall, reinstate his Remain-in-Mexico policy, and maintain Title 42.
---
Unfortunately, that's not going to be possible while Democrats like Manchin control the Senate and enable Biden's radical agenda.
---
But by defeating Manchin and taking control of West Virginia's Senate seat, conservatives can retake the Senate majority from Biden, secure our border, and put Americans FIRST.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62248827:JPJ-ZdGlN:m:1:3367311000:559D882FA5DA0B4D241A637E2C3F9FA4:r)
---
Peter, now that we're in the new year, support from grassroots conservatives like YOU is more important than ever.
---
**[So please, make a contribution to help FIRE Manchin and elect a pro-Trump America First conservative as West Virginia's next Senator. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62248827:JPJ-ZdGlN:m:1:3367311000:559D882FA5DA0B4D241A637E2C3F9FA4:r)**

Thank you,

name: Sign the Petition [Left Action]
subject: Sign the Petition: Tell Facebook reversing Trump's ban is a TERRIBLE idea
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [BREAKING: FB reverses Trump's ban. Tell them it's a terrible idea >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T873996a1-1aaf-47e8-bf26-0f56caa1b970/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf75cff4-4918-4de9-99b3-3bf0feef6f8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | After repeatedly violating Facebook's own rules, and using his account to incite violence and insurrection, Donald Trump was finally banned after the Capitol attack. [**But Facebook is now ending the ban, and **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d765423-7d57-4f2f-83a8-f3a46e95840b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[letting him back on](https://default.salsalabs.org/T394f6077-a53d-474a-a335-f4513c28c25e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[**, saying the threat to public safety has "sufficiently receded."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a4b4565-1892-4f8b-bdfc-a4a8cc5b1cd8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Are they kidding??? Trump is an ongoing threat to our democracy, and is stoking the fires of violence on a daily basis. Facebook has the right — and the responsibility — to keep the ban, and as a matter of public safety, it needs to do so.

body:
HELP US SEND JOE MANCHIN A MESSAGE: IT’S TIME TO RETIRE.
Peter - Talk about a man of the people!

Over the weekend, a shocking new report was released detailing the spending habits of West Virginia Senator Joe Manchin. **Manchin has been spending top dollar to dine out with friends and family from Special Interest Groups determined to keep him in the Senate.**

Joe Manchin has tried to cultivate a "man of the people" persona to aid him in his reelection campaigns from the very Republican state of West Virginia.

Up until now, it's worked.

**In 2018, Manchin won reelection to the Senate as a Democrat by 3 points - _a state President Trump won by more than 38 points two years later._**

Joe Manchin is the only statewide elected Democrat in West Virginia and the only Democrat who could plausibly hold onto this seat. His popularity stems from decades in West Virginia politics, including two successful campaigns for governor. But Washington has changed Joe Manchin ...

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9560aa5699fe48a7b10329c2881e7c53&_e=PvyP2CibW897r27Dv4ROqLbp85LwYN7JS6ApKXXlHzogLIwvRU9GiuASF6Eaftyazujgnj2UnluvC2mgyBecWM4EaIQsU3e3OUFZGskbKeG0ccDW6OvAvEwXUIR9Ph8ozTat18ZvwPOtulrqPTG_iKMKgSB-oyS3N6YAZU3lVLbJPhnWfnn4Ox3rZ5Y9hvgMd_swH0IsTZBXOwjT4t_eOJiA4bBjkd2XQatCUOSemX2zF-1Nt5mJYgsBfFuBMrg__HXA48_h2VJJCSr0vqGm-ZAaMhXsUn61j4NVQMJZfOAjODm0bTXmfqinUOowqmZFcClic8i33O_TynVoldLgq7fSXD23q1St7eAOiMoIe5CveShZYQPccrurFjdZSFmjex4YshR3h5XezJj-voZib-eU4aekU49e43CrCvDoVTV3wABuVUd0qPB-gkdoTZ3ExpVjVtWBZ-066neV4Iz-Hw%3D%3D)
These figures are shocking given the average annual income in West Virginia is just $26,187! What would the voters who have supported Manchin through the years have to say if they knew he was busy spending his time in Washington wining and dining government bureaucrats to the tune of $1 million??? **[Well, we're counting on you to help us get the word out.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9560aa5699fe48a7b10329c2881e7c53&_e=PvyP2CibW897r27Dv4ROqLbp85LwYN7JS6ApKXXlHzogLIwvRU9GiuASF6Eaftyazujgnj2UnluvC2mgyBecWM4EaIQsU3e3OUFZGskbKeG0ccDW6OvAvEwXUIR9Ph8ozTat18ZvwPOtulrqPTG_iKMKgSB-oyS3N6YAZU3lVLbJPhnWfnn4Ox3rZ5Y9hvgMd_swH0IsTZBXOwjT4t_eOJiA4bBjkd2XQatCUOSemX2zF-1Nt5mJYgsBfFuBMrg__HXA48_h2VJJCSr0vqGm-ZAaMhXsUn61j4NVQMJZfOA_jqNz-rlvMtC0RJM8eU5lmWBkC9Gk0nqqc0bFvWXZjA9FbB9ttpQAGKmuK898P4gw8w141ZqQUyLqu4xmF6EW8AsLpvsklXX8CuPndcaJMSMLH1AJXt_Gc_Xz5WUXK_10190DymchTOm2RMJ_1euoQ288J8U5QqEOHTW5RoUpHg%3D%3D)**

❌ | | $6,000 at an Italian restaurant on Capitol Hill
❌ | | $20,000 at a 5-star hotel in Aspen
❌ | | $15,000 at an exclusive country club in Houston, Texas

**We need your help to West Virginia voters to deliver a simple message about Senator Manchin:_"Does a man who spends $10,000 at a "tuxedo-clad" D.C. seafood hotspot represent YOU?_**

[** _HELP US SEND JOE MANCHIN A MESSAGE:_
IT'S TIME TO RETIRE. **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9560aa5699fe48a7b10329c2881e7c53&_e=PvyP2CibW897r27Dv4ROqLbp85LwYN7JS6ApKXXlHzogLIwvRU9GiuASF6Eaftyazujgnj2UnluvC2mgyBecWM4EaIQsU3e3OUFZGskbKeG0ccDW6OvAvEwXUIR9Ph8ozTat18ZvwPOtulrqPTG_iKMKgSB-oyS3N6YAZU3lVLbJPhnWfnn4Ox3rZ5Y9hvgMd_swH0IsTZBXOwjT4t_eOJiA4bBjkd2XQatCUOSemX2zF-1Nt5mJYgsBfFuBMrg__HXA48_h2VJJCSr0vqGm-ZAaMhXsUn61j4NVQMJZfOCXezvTM4rURKaaZX6TuQEM2dReXBMVOIdELSBURro0Rer02VYUoQDsphcPd3aRj_1Vj6RvGaMIBcXB2oio82AZ9GjhiBOcL0yRZEg46bzkuqI_-EnF-uzILaWLzk9JPSyajpibVkrDyN32wVZTb26PPD3PS4zLMVMtsU3NN7NLuw%3D%3D)
---

When politicians lose touch with where they came from and lose contact with the voters who elected them to positions of power, _**it's time to hang up the hat.**_

Peter, help us expose Joe Manchin for living the jet-set life while his constituents struggle to make ends meet. **[Sign our petition calling for Joe Manchin to retire ahead of the next Senate election.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9560aa5699fe48a7b10329c2881e7c53&_e=PvyP2CibW897r27Dv4ROqLbp85LwYN7JS6ApKXXlHzogLIwvRU9GiuASF6Eaftyazujgnj2UnluvC2mgyBecWM4EaIQsU3e3OUFZGskbKeG0ccDW6OvAvEwXUIR9Ph8ozTat18ZvwPOtulrqPTG_iKMKgSB-oyS3N6YAZU3lVLbJPhnWfnn4Ox3rZ5Y9hvgMd_swH0IsTZBXOwjT4t_eOJiA4bBjkd2XQatCUOSemX2zF-1Nt5mJYgsBfFuBMrg__HXA48_h2VJJCSr0vqGm-ZAaMhXsUn61j4NVQMJZfOCAiBTSQgFNu6MwvVcEmOLejq42UV09D8D0MozRUn42olH0ZgraFjAMtBRkLJRqRU5Juyu55P70MNWXruzGdLDTzSHJRbevHsu8JrttJATifnU6eL-ZMSmgIwabw_mVzkj6V3xzUCD1N04f6aU3lqgJ5mNFATXadEx4oSkD02qxdQ%3D%3D)**

NRSC Political Team

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: We shouldn’t be living in the past
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]
On January 22, 2023, Roe v. Wade marked what should have been its 50th anniversary.

From the day the Supreme Court stripped away a constitutional right from Americans last June, I’ve been adamant that we must do everything in our power to stop the MAGA extremist Republicans from placing one far-right ideology after another on the Court. I still stand by this belief.

We must continue fighting to enshrine Roe v. Wade into law because abortion rights are not just women’s rights, it’s a right for every single American seeking freedom and liberty. If you stand with us, sign your name today to urge Democratic House and Senate leaders to enshrine abortion rights into law. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIK9czKXSE-ivhppyBsavw2]
SIGN MY NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIK9czKXSE-ivhppyBsavw2]

The overturn of Roe v. Wade is a threat to our democracy and we must put our nation back into the correct path of progress. Our nation’s laws should reflect the voices of the people, and not the extremist politicians.

Thanks for taking action,

Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto] PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
Click here to unsubscribe. subject: We’re running out of time to save our children
body:
hr

They’re trying to indoctrinate your children.

https://secure.americafirstpolicy.com/america-first-parents-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230123_e000098-afpi_america-first-parents-av_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=

This Teacher Says Left Has Turned Public Schools Into ‘Indoctrination Centers’

They’re coming for your country.

https://secure.americafirstpolicy.com/america-first-parents-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230123_e000098-afpi_america-first-parents-av_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=

Report: Schools Are Teaching Kids To Hate America Under The Guise Of ‘Civics’

They’re determined to destroy your religion.

https://secure.americafirstpolicy.com/america-first-parents-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230123_e000098-afpi_america-first-parents-av_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=

Teacher says he will ‘summon Lucifer’ into the classroom.

And if we don’t stand up TODAY, they could transform America as we know it.

Friends, the radical Left has fully infiltrated our schools. Now, we’re running out of time to stop them before they indoctrinate an entire generation of Marxist, Anti-American foot soldiers to push their cause.

That’s why the team at the American First Policy Institute needs your help to fight back... (https://secure.americafirstpolicy.com/america-first-parents-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230123_e000098-afpi_america-first-parents-av_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

The radical Left started working toward this more than 40 years ago.

They flooded higher education with disciples of the radical left who wanted to fundamentally transform America and turn it into another failed socialist experiment.

Once they’d filled colleges and universities nationwide with leftist professors and administrators, it was only a matter of time before it trickled down all the way to the preschool level.

That’s why today, you can hardly turn on the news without hearing horror stories about school leaders and teachers encouraging students to come out as transgender or teaching them that America is an evil, fundamentally racist country.

The good news is that it’s NOT too late.

The America First Policy Institute has just released a POWERFUL new web-based tool to use in the fight against the leftist assault on our children.

Friends, today we’re honored to introduce to you the America First Parent Platform.

Here’s our plan to empower parents to take back control of their children’s education from radical leftist indoctrination:

1. The America First Parent Platform provides a robust selection of model policies for state legislatures to enact that will empower parents to take back their local school boards.

2. We created and are constantly updating the only NATIONWIDE database of school board members so that concerned parents, grandparents, guardians, and concerned citizens can easily find and contact the school board member(s) who dictate the policies that affect the children they love.

3. Our platform gives parents a way to report radical leftist curricula and indoctrination in their local schools!

Our team is working around the clock to ensure that we continue to expand the America First Parent Platform and ensure it reaches everyone who needs it...

But we can’t do that without your help... That’s why we hope that you’ll consider supporting the America First Parent Platform with a TAX DEDUCTIBLE gift of $15 or more today! (https://secure.americafirstpolicy.com/america-first-parents-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230123_e000098-afpi_america-first-parents-av_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

Friends, at every turn, the radical Left is trying to ensure that they keep the power they’ve worked so hard to acquire in our schools.

They’re dumping millions of dollars into local school board campaigns. They have the teachers’ unions on their side.

Their buddies in big tech are censoring and suppressing information that would shine transparency on their efforts.

And they’ll stop at NOTHING to put America LAST and corrupt the minds of our children.

PLEASE use this opportunity to get in your last-minute tax deductible donation and help save our country from left-wing indoctrination. (https://secure.americafirstpolicy.com/america-first-parents-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230123_e000098-afpi_america-first-parents-av_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

Sincerely,

America First Policy Institute

DONATE (https://secure.americafirstpolicy.com/america-first-parents-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230123_e000098-afpi_america-first-parents-av_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
| |

| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7a039b0c7b34141981d192c7f9989ad&_e=LaFm_DtyK_hjR_6jaI2IK0SFwZSNpK4CVAYPDyEzqfiBnOkili7AxrytSwSSbZ9oQUOWQ1k4PALA1KrIfOmiyY3SoFETZFqn5zfoHjU7ibBSJGWf_RG1G9rAvqqjVLNUGg9K5z_n2-VVBs3XVGhZywKxMvG4A2xIOpi_Coh42K0KCNsXbQIVdGrJx30cJ7x_c8yds-GQDlKvXUWHhkdbJyuPSDEx0ZdPpNlD3Xw3QjD3TsdZukewUAThCcbJPMbVz8dTKN2WoG3asjGhPlkKwFIu-z6z4QIFRJKExlEcyVuE6T9P3G1WV3iw54EaAI9vAmcW4vW6kLQ_K2xUIEYgMiTBjfEeBQ2LBci5cH7S6mXDT8nDh_wcL9x0ySeLHlv4gy_rUxgy1WpFLKvGujcwjg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7a039b0c7b34141981d192c7f9989ad&_e=LaFm_DtyK_hjR_6jaI2IK0SFwZSNpK4CVAYPDyEzqfiBnOkili7AxrytSwSSbZ9oQUOWQ1k4PALA1KrIfOmiyY3SoFETZFqn5zfoHjU7ibBSJGWf_RG1G9rAvqqjVLNUGg9K5z_n2-VVBs3XVGhZywKxMvG4A2xIOpi_Coh42K0KCNsXbQIVdGrJx30cJ7x_c8yds-GQDlKvXUWHhkdbJyuPSDEx0ZdPpNlD3Xw3QjD3TsdZukewUAThCcbJPMbVG8il6ADrMY7XABh9lXl7L7-rIpubDVE8eJ7ZgJh-qVyBEEZSaVFqLD0d79GAXtXE-80VVLusDhnE1qbofnX1JuVFHynfsak61lcr5SmXmFa4WwkVS1SBv4qUVQJhrLrKoUnKlQNJf250xTTgXZS6cw%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7a039b0c7b34141981d192c7f9989ad&_e=LaFm_DtyK_hjR_6jaI2IK0SFwZSNpK4CVAYPDyEzqfiBnOkili7AxrytSwSSbZ9oQUOWQ1k4PALA1KrIfOmiyY3SoFETZFqn5zfoHjU7ibBSJGWf_RG1G9rAvqqjVLNUGg9K5z_n2-VVBs3XVGhZywKxMvG4A2xIOpi_Coh42K0KCNsXbQIVdGrJx30cJ7x_c8yds-GQDlKvXUWHhkdbJyuPSDEx0ZdPpNlD3Xw3QjD3TsdZukewUAThCcbJPMbV9-2yVA4VGFST9Hvbd89ItleJ1Z4xBHx1tJK89C_y_fpgPGNncx0HeUUGsZt_jS0J4qLv_x0XnwxXBrSxD2XxdzOlqCTC9jkCPIkgNFk-XMM38k23mtFIeF1CzU8wXSpf8EeavWCX6dYeT-1fhJqLJg%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7a039b0c7b34141981d192c7f9989ad&_e=LaFm_DtyK_hjR_6jaI2IK0SFwZSNpK4CVAYPDyEzqfiBnOkili7AxrytSwSSbZ9oQUOWQ1k4PALA1KrIfOmiyY3SoFETZFqn5zfoHjU7ibBSJGWf_RG1G9rAvqqjVLNUGg9K5z_n2-VVBs3XVGhZywKxMvG4A2xIOpi_Coh42K0KCNsXbQIVdGrJx30cJ7x_c8yds-GQDlKvXUWHhkdbJyuPSDEx0ZdPpNlD3Xw3QjD3TsdZukewUAThCcbJPMbVw86diwc5IlVZGjHPK1HZCjZfbfH-kOXRUW8o0yFZRXuO9GcCyEPEG0VzrUzKM32wHqGolY6SnwDJ8ibPcPqQ9pWm2Tf_Eq0k9RixJTZWY2lmf3WdN5kf-qw64yRkhUFVyzRhyoWZadvaMUGI8fKkuQ%3D%3D) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7a039b0c7b34141981d192c7f9989ad&_e=LaFm_DtyK_hjR_6jaI2IK0SFwZSNpK4CVAYPDyEzqfiBnOkili7AxrytSwSSbZ9oQUOWQ1k4PALA1KrIfOmiyY3SoFETZFqn5zfoHjU7ibBSJGWf_RG1G9rAvqqjVLNUGg9K5z_n2-VVBs3XVGhZywKxMvG4A2xIOpi_Coh42K0KCNsXbQIVdGrJx30cJ7x_c8yds-GQDlKvXUWHhkdbJyuPSDEx0ZdPpNlD3Xw3QjD3TsdZukewUAThCcbJPMbVilwg1g5PubxeyVYvWtTVy-ho1HZ8IRJa3h6q_94Bj1nlmrQQUtiklKABZ4z2e5Ou1BwysuH4OL0DPzI500NzUB_k9Qo8E4KDrVjq8ciNAxFAdgcNDZ4c2BECtiLoWzKZLg5KV-dkNMCsAJsPNvmMzg%3D%3D)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7a039b0c7b34141981d192c7f9989ad&_e=LaFm_DtyK_hjR_6jaI2IK0SFwZSNpK4CVAYPDyEzqfiBnOkili7AxrytSwSSbZ9oQUOWQ1k4PALA1KrIfOmiyY3SoFETZFqn5zfoHjU7ibBSJGWf_RG1G9rAvqqjVLNUGg9K5z_n2-VVBs3XVGhZywKxMvG4A2xIOpi_Coh42K0KCNsXbQIVdGrJx30cJ7x_c8yds-GQDlKvXUWHhkdbJyuPSDEx0ZdPpNlD3Xw3QjD3TsdZukewUAThCcbJPMbVCPFM4v0qPaf_AnqhF3dY-iXcyfenqMN44-ECZufVLPgQ3Tw7r4P1mHQfH2jUU_olHlKvirSL3noPNPLZE-hJmi5sva4b5MOG3OrePg5V8dDH0xCHzL0X24WYLQLVBBgtYJmIexRWQT-xrCvM4yw0-A%3D%3D) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7a039b0c7b34141981d192c7f9989ad&_e=LaFm_DtyK_hjR_6jaI2IK0SFwZSNpK4CVAYPDyEzqfiBnOkili7AxrytSwSSbZ9oQUOWQ1k4PALA1KrIfOmiyY3SoFETZFqn5zfoHjU7ibBSJGWf_RG1G9rAvqqjVLNUGg9K5z_n2-VVBs3XVGhZywKxMvG4A2xIOpi_Coh42K0KCNsXbQIVdGrJx30cJ7x_c8yds-GQDlKvXUWHhkdbJyuPSDEx0ZdPpNlD3Xw3QjD3TsdZukewUAThCcbJPMbVoC8vskFA4kd3_aJVzSYxnZWQUJcwAkojnwd1LjXHOBtM0iM0kSir1pXE9QgSDtVSKZhcmA_CHGWLepkyUesF0XGHMkGWgHnhTFWGygZ9TqwZoue9wlLD1v4QfkO77t0B_azG0LuVTUc9vOIp-3LqvQ%3D%3D)

| | [**DONATE NOW**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7a039b0c7b34141981d192c7f9989ad&_e=LaFm_DtyK_hjR_6jaI2IK0SFwZSNpK4CVAYPDyEzqfiBnOkili7AxrytSwSSbZ9oQUOWQ1k4PALA1KrIfOmiyY3SoFETZFqn5zfoHjU7ibBSJGWf_RG1G9rAvqqjVLNUGg9K5z_n2-VVBs3XVGhZywKxMvG4A2xIOpi_Coh42K0KCNsXbQIVdGrJx30cJ7x_c8yds-GQDlKvXUWHhkdbJyuPSDEx0ZdPpNlD3Xw3QjD3TsdZukewUAThCcbJPMbVXMGId4JllFu5Fi0NeAVGkAfJDEc62UF1FPK9HyP7EWQJJnoJ4ZMjhF0dGYbPstAXZ6f790Ox9g_JqNOvBa1mVs_KPgMEySPkXpcx1F0rfeJSsgDAfXeHXpRCD-48Ugt1JHgRzwUxhSE9gZqdg42MKg%3D%3D)

The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 {\\optouturi} Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Grace Jo
subject: One story every high school student needs to hear
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bceba796a3a04b25a023673944e4eec4&_e=LISipmcJJt2apNcR3MBycKZH6tdhAaJkubfSaTC-ycS9CIeRBkpsyciGZnO986ywD13Udo43M0s9KgmOzzKOG-9LEkJRtNRQl-6PFSCKjXhGT-FYobFC4Oh0LsP3SHGvs7D0-dGZa6XnO1oWF8WIQaIBUEM7R7nxbD00N3uwvguV9CmHkZUlREDi9hYfqqUj5npf-8z5yAtbsnisKD0Hif14pK-0T1SzOuC3ZPH5ixB23G-iQwskN76tBljNc_e8v5LBt8JoZY2fH2R8snkrQA%3D%3D)
Hello Friend,

I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear.

I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.

Most Americans today don’t understand what socialism does to you — especially the younger generation.

High school students don’t know how it steals your humanity by starving your soul, mind, and stomach of all that freedom provides.

_**That’s why I want to tell my story to high school students across America. **_

**Young Voice’s Dissident Project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell their stories. **

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

[_**Friend, can you help sponsor a student for just $15, so they can hear my story—the story of a survivor? Click here to donate $15, $45, $90, or any amount >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bceba796a3a04b25a023673944e4eec4&_e=LISipmcJJt2apNcR3MBycKZH6tdhAaJkubfSaTC-ycS9CIeRBkpsyciGZnO986ywD13Udo43M0s9KgmOzzKOG-9LEkJRtNRQl-6PFSCKjXhGT-FYobFC4Oh0LsP3SHGvqKjBebz7yVGa9Ueph92xpkT3JdZREb0tqGuEX8e0bq8uYe2yizXEXkiGlYC3tefTLKlMnZI9kH7wPhfDiW64ULIoH_y4j04LgUIIidfJtFXs48PV4PoNbMTPxqWBmJoYb1BXeEPpAU1zaneUODt6cw%3D%3D)

**This is my story.**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bceba796a3a04b25a023673944e4eec4&_e=LISipmcJJt2apNcR3MBycKZH6tdhAaJkubfSaTC-ycS9CIeRBkpsyciGZnO986ywD13Udo43M0s9KgmOzzKOG-9LEkJRtNRQl-6PFSCKjXhGT-FYobFC4Oh0LsP3SHGvu-s3Ef8LMwZdQsqzIL6HRIdLzMvdzDnzP7-oaU0pXJOuXAQEx0FMARU7TPuJfBqCVQgPMtRFelTWbJ3KywficaNn_2C0G6niaa_0tn8uJyyn0BJgoTpxOUE2IfHfLpTJ4-nychcO3aSxeEUJMM6zFA%3D%3D)

During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world’s worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about one meal a week—a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight. We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his “crime” was that he left his country in search of food for his family.

That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped. It became the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again.

Some of my family escaped, but the regime murdered most of them.

This is just a small part of my story, Friend.

**Coming to America changed my life. **

That’s why I want to help preserve the freedom and prosperity in America by sharing my story and experiences with high school students across this wonderful country.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bceba796a3a04b25a023673944e4eec4&_e=LISipmcJJt2apNcR3MBycKZH6tdhAaJkubfSaTC-ycS9CIeRBkpsyciGZnO986ywD13Udo43M0s9KgmOzzKOG-9LEkJRtNRQl-6PFSCKjXhGT-FYobFC4Oh0LsP3SHGvqgPSbQcrNqYzi6lkNHVY6jLX7ioIqRiIfMbU8S0YfHQbw6w5vECm5AmZ1hpaEbncdKl5-XtOOXAFiNMNShsqFSDilCPQPNnJaRUL3ExncRaaToO5ysQz_9B59rhB4v-QpFrcV-lsTfCsAYcW9wxlvw%3D%3D)

That’s why I’m asking for your support, Friend. Can you help sponsor the Dissident Program so I can share my story?

Click any button to send your donation.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bceba796a3a04b25a023673944e4eec4&_e=LISipmcJJt2apNcR3MBycKZH6tdhAaJkubfSaTC-ycS9CIeRBkpsyciGZnO986ywD13Udo43M0s9KgmOzzKOG-9LEkJRtNRQl-6PFSCKjXgb-m3wZfyrlzbYi5Jtw4yAUPlZtNGnozw-GaGL5byJqo6b4vupdUa33OzFZsO_f2shcEZybiZ16ofAmD52OrSjU2W05OmLNgo7QIdCNpNGXxkbOvNJKlVZluQ_Cryrg7OY9QXX1Q2RfORKFniOc1fWsoKm8PqZ23FWlvwzrBl6ew76OYpvUmFjYsVgA9T4KR8%3D)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
_It’s Tammy Baldwin here. I wanted to make sure you heard that my friend Kirsten Gillibrand is running for reelection. Her message is below:_ I wanted to share this with you personally, Peter: **I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support today is so important.** The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too. But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign. **So that’s what I’m asking of you today, Peter. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.** **[Please, will you split $10 or any amount between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin’s to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57774911/389100919/329678299?refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230125_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTZjNjMxZC1mYjljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i1cKgBFQDV9JYIMEh8pgonPpELiXwMdk30sjGsmbJDI=)** I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic. But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a _permanent_ paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that. **The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.[Please, Peter, will you split $10 or any amount between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin’s to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57774912/389100920/329678299?refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230125_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTZjNjMxZC1mYjljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i1cKgBFQDV9JYIMEh8pgonPpELiXwMdk30sjGsmbJDI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kirsten Gillibrand and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57774913/389100921/329678299?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230125_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTZjNjMxZC1mYjljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i1cKgBFQDV9JYIMEh8pgonPpELiXwMdk30sjGsmbJDI=)

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Al Qaeda Plans Plane Attacks Using “New Techniques and Tactics” as Air Marshals Keep Getting Sent to Mexican Border
body:
While the nation’s Federal Air Marshals (FAM) are busy on the
Mexican border providing illegal immigrants with welfare checks,
transportation, and other basic services, Al Qaeda is planning attacks
in the U.S. involving planes, according to high-level Department of
Homeland Security (DHS) sources.

[alt_text]

[*****]
January 25, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61904&L=12663&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

While the nation’s Federal Air Marshals (FAM) are busy on the
Mexican border providing illegal immigrants with welfare checks,
transportation, and other basic services, Al Qaeda is planning attacks
in the U.S. involving planes, according to high-level Department of
Homeland Security (DHS) sources. Judicial Watch obtained from
government sources a copy of the new intelligence alert, which was
delivered on December 31, 2022, at 12:23:52 Greenwich Mean Time. The
caption of the widely circulated warning reads: “Al-Qaeda says
upcoming attacks on US, possibly involving planes, will use new
techniques and tactics.”

body:
HELP US SEND JOE MANCHIN A MESSAGE: IT’S TIME TO RETIRE.
Fellow American - Talk about a man of the people!

Over the weekend, a shocking new report was released detailing the spending habits of West Virginia Senator Joe Manchin. **Manchin has been spending top dollar to dine out with friends and family from Special Interest Groups determined to keep him in the Senate.**

Joe Manchin has tried to cultivate a "man of the people" persona to aid him in his reelection campaigns from the very Republican state of West Virginia.

Up until now, it's worked.

**In 2018, Manchin won reelection to the Senate as a Democrat by 3 points - _a state President Trump won by more than 38 points two years later._**

Joe Manchin is the only statewide elected Democrat in West Virginia and the only Democrat who could plausibly hold onto this seat. His popularity stems from decades in West Virginia politics, including two successful campaigns for governor. But Washington has changed Joe Manchin ...

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=72d362247f354c89a88b713957057a02&_e=y8KrkYZgBf03Ei6doD4T9eysyIljniI3NJ4M1FbRNZ15uJD8TuBEn_1q9fDON6Jwt37QIpOvvWgxzrH4-n-cjq8hW4HRiRB2j1j8JaoAG71JmPr_vtSDqFLUkY8JeyYi2YhP-N7jh4gFyJt_wSBnCs0nHPa5xmxsBzh9d9lSPIf3uKRfZTuISpHgS1S4kFFBaHg9bpmdS61dE3GZd-zyD3GXkyxWzDPiMx82ty28e5vlFFplMhxo5ZP8kvT_g9wzqHna-L-8QA6VDGUV_dMaY_RGSU-heQBIRExUF6i6Kpl1N-BM0_f-9DLOD3-arlCnXOkq4-4sSq0q-maRa0_TcYYbV2zzvJkGqdcrcdspoyQ883ChEG0HqnT81BAq8o38GoqFk3ILIBAX2_B0Wr6ppE4SY46F067kOTN5BkcRBNHGI5389EhfRB_Qx7xFxAUP)
These figures are shocking given the average annual income in West Virginia is just $26,187! What would the voters who have supported Manchin through the years have to say if they knew he was busy spending his time in Washington wining and dining government bureaucrats to the tune of $1 million??? **[Well, we're counting on you to help us get the word out.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=72d362247f354c89a88b713957057a02&_e=y8KrkYZgBf03Ei6doD4T9eysyIljniI3NJ4M1FbRNZ15uJD8TuBEn_1q9fDON6Jwt37QIpOvvWgxzrH4-n-cjq8hW4HRiRB2j1j8JaoAG71JmPr_vtSDqFLUkY8JeyYi2YhP-N7jh4gFyJt_wSBnCs0nHPa5xmxsBzh9d9lSPIf3uKRfZTuISpHgS1S4kFFBaHg9bpmdS61dE3GZd-zyD3GXkyxWzDPiMx82ty28e5vlFFplMhxo5ZP8kvT_g9wzqHna-L-8QA6VDGUV_dMaY4AV4vqQnE1r2KoR2TCNWbzTkMrmGe7XQoHerWUZB3luzvqe1GKjFKP-16XiQXnWZDN0cabrR3Kfv6r5kENzlogiA8cOXfW6l0fikIlZPcrU5abh7pSENXzI2C6iyN2eU_M2nh74LrTBL3QDr5LMZ0Tpil4Nyz8Gpj6l_cG1siNQ)**

| [** HELP US RETIRE JOE MANCHIN >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=72d362247f354c89a88b713957057a02&_e=y8KrkYZgBf03Ei6doD4T9eysyIljniI3NJ4M1FbRNZ15uJD8TuBEn_1q9fDON6Jwt37QIpOvvWgxzrH4-n-cjq8hW4HRiRB2j1j8JaoAG71JmPr_vtSDqFLUkY8JeyYi2YhP-N7jh4gFyJt_wSBnCs0nHPa5xmxsBzh9d9lSPIf3uKRfZTuISpHgS1S4kFFBaHg9bpmdS61dE3GZd-zyD3GXkyxWzDPiMx82ty28e5vlFFplMhxo5ZP8kvT_g9wzqHna-L-8QA6VDGUV_dMaY2kHAR6b9bptF1JJgLIxW5VvIR6_K0kI8Xw5FryKLmCJKZ13tNLtKF1OceuqGHLqVya3pe1s_gx0CTt4OAxMd93HquOHnAKBjWAxpe4UXg_ui1dM_mnu9v9665z3GMUP6eufefHIlS5cePOM4ole8CR14Rv9s9eblG3jNytwkrOI)
---

Residents of conservative West Virginia need to know that their United States Senator spent:

❌ | | $20,000 at an upmarket seafood restaurant
---|---|---
❌ | | $10,000 at the Capital Grill
❌ | | $7,000 at a DC French bistro
❌ | | $6,000 at an Italian restaurant on Capitol Hill
❌ | | $20,000 at a 5-star hotel in Aspen
❌ | | $15,000 at an exclusive country club in Houston, Texas

**We need your help to West Virginia voters to deliver a simple message about Senator Manchin:_"Does a man who spends $10,000 at a "tuxedo-clad" D.C. seafood hotspot represent YOU?_**

[** _HELP US SEND JOE MANCHIN A MESSAGE:_
IT'S TIME TO RETIRE. **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=72d362247f354c89a88b713957057a02&_e=y8KrkYZgBf03Ei6doD4T9eysyIljniI3NJ4M1FbRNZ15uJD8TuBEn_1q9fDON6Jwt37QIpOvvWgxzrH4-n-cjq8hW4HRiRB2j1j8JaoAG71JmPr_vtSDqFLUkY8JeyYi2YhP-N7jh4gFyJt_wSBnCs0nHPa5xmxsBzh9d9lSPIf3uKRfZTuISpHgS1S4kFFBaHg9bpmdS61dE3GZd-zyD3GXkyxWzDPiMx82ty28e5vlFFplMhxo5ZP8kvT_g9wzqHna-L-8QA6VDGUV_dMaY4K2G684z8cjSxobBK4MudqZAk62GdbDbDClKruEsllx7DEXE5mD2uz1DW0gcdS-Qj3tBKVVfBGSWRlLHyqidJapd7ImTTsiu65B1Jg6jA7bwaTUtBd8B5JY969QOz3UMUpjVkAlPZPzFfVyzztiZtWExCkvMPNI3GsyjpztCYA1)
---

When politicians lose touch with where they came from and lose contact with the voters who elected them to positions of power, _**it's time to hang up the hat.**_

Fellow American, help us expose Joe Manchin for living the jet-set life while his constituents struggle to make ends meet. **[Sign our petition calling for Joe Manchin to retire ahead of the next Senate election.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=72d362247f354c89a88b713957057a02&_e=y8KrkYZgBf03Ei6doD4T9eysyIljniI3NJ4M1FbRNZ15uJD8TuBEn_1q9fDON6Jwt37QIpOvvWgxzrH4-n-cjq8hW4HRiRB2j1j8JaoAG71JmPr_vtSDqFLUkY8JeyYi2YhP-N7jh4gFyJt_wSBnCs0nHPa5xmxsBzh9d9lSPIf3uKRfZTuISpHgS1S4kFFBaHg9bpmdS61dE3GZd-zyD3GXkyxWzDPiMx82ty28e5vlFFplMhxo5ZP8kvT_g9wzqHna-L-8QA6VDGUV_dMaY8zJa2W7PJvZYINJrO7BSIfmc8XuTrSsd2aBpV1JfCBy_1M0YDM3TatmzyBYp_Xw6_xk5pimyp_vxszpG_QF19EjdVsbOssjtBMagy47t2EBKZ9cFEMytcgteX3oUStCtDPVYPGcUsrxhvkk_fBFwbjVRl_zIdX1d0Z7mQaFcs-g)**

We're looking for 20,000 conservatives to add their name by the end of the week in a symbolic nod to the $20,000 that Manchin has spent dining at D.C.'s Capitol Grill restaurant.

Thank you,

NRSC Political Team

[** HELP US RETIRE JOE MANCHIN >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=72d362247f354c89a88b713957057a02&_e=y8KrkYZgBf03Ei6doD4T9eysyIljniI3NJ4M1FbRNZ15uJD8TuBEn_1q9fDON6Jwt37QIpOvvWgxzrH4-n-cjq8hW4HRiRB2j1j8JaoAG71JmPr_vtSDqFLUkY8JeyYi2YhP-N7jh4gFyJt_wSBnCs0nHPa5xmxsBzh9d9lSPIf3uKRfZTuISpHgS1S4kFFBaHg9bpmdS61dE3GZd-zyD3GXkyxWzDPiMx82ty28e5vlFFplMhxo5ZP8kvT_g9wzqHna-L-8QA6VDGUV_dMaY0nnBEHugI4B5GJmSrU-_vhEJvx1TiF7iAYF05p-ROqm50_6UYAuT1pncPLtuF8VXczQEOA3rKODco0mQWUJi8hr-0s__dR9TR5bIKRDhlq7D4zrqYklePU9IpY-yOOsHyt7s0RClF3NjxemC85lYdQ9Yab9Gz748XTDaeXNDpee)

clean_body: HELP US SEND JOE MANCHIN A MESSAGE: IT’S TIME TO RETIRE. Fellow American - Talk about a man of the people! Over the weekend, a shocking new report was released detailing the spending habits of West Virginia Senator Joe Manchin. Manchin has been spending top dollar to dine out with friends and family from Special Interest Groups determined to keep him in the Senate. Joe Manchin has tried to cultivate a "man of the people" persona to aid him in his reelection campaigns from the very Republican state of West Virginia. Up until now, it's worked. In 2018, Manchin won reelection to the Senate as a Democrat by 3 points - a state President Trump won by more than 38 points two years later. Joe Manchin is the only statewide elected Democrat in West Virginia and the only Democrat who could plausibly hold onto this seat. His popularity stems from decades in West Virginia politics, including two successful campaigns for governor. But Washington has changed Joe Manchin ... These figures are shocking given the average annual income in West Virginia is just $26,187! What would the voters who have supported Manchin through the years have to say if they knew he was busy spending his time in Washington wining and dining government bureaucrats to the tune of $1 million??? | Residents of conservative West Virginia need to know that their United States Senator spent: ❌ | | $20,000 at an upmarket seafood restaurant ---|---|--- ❌ | | $10,000 at the Capital Grill ❌ | | $7,000 at a DC French bistro ❌ | | $6,000 at an Italian restaurant on Capitol Hill ❌ | | $20,000 at a 5-star hotel in Aspen ❌ | | $15,000 at an exclusive country club in Houston, Texas We need your help to West Virginia voters to deliver a simple message about Senator Manchin:"Does a man who spends $10,000 at a "tuxedo-clad" D.C. seafood hotspot represent YOU? When politicians lose touch with where they came from and lose contact with the voters who elected them to positions of power, it's time to hang up the hat. Fellow American, help us expose Joe Manchin for living the jet-set life while his constituents struggle to make ends meet. We're looking for 20,000 conservatives to add their name by the end of the week in a symbolic nod to the $20,000 that Manchin has spent dining at D.C.'s Capitol Grill restaurant. Thank you, NRSC Political Team If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
taking on debt was the right choice
| | |
---
_Hi there – In the final days of 2022, I was getting calls from other Senators and top-level operatives asking whether we could really win in NH. Polls were tightening, pundits had our race as a toss-up, and the GOP was spending millions to defeat me.

Taking on debt was the right strategic choice for victory. Now, we have to retire it.

We’re coming up on our January deadline, and I need your help before then to chip away at it. Here’s the best link – I’m hoping I can count on you for $3 or more right now: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57775215/389101785/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2192-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODkwMzY5ZC1mYjljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kZ2wS0vFkNYdudqhb5RFgjJwjTgY6c7HcriUDAETa_w=)**

Maggie Hassan_

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
How do you think we’ll close the wage gap, end gun violence, and finally bring this country into the 21st century when it comes to paid leave? By electing more women who get it.
This is why we stand with Katie Porter.
She has been fighting for our progressive values since day one and working families need her voice in the U.S. Senate.
Today, we’re setting a goal to raise $10,000 from online contributions before the end of January to get back on track with our fundraising and keep growing our movement.
If everyone who is reading this email chips in, we have a good chance that we can hit our goal. Will you contribute $5, or anything you can, to help us reach our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
There is no such thing as off years in politics. Katie has what it takes to win, but this is not going to be an easy reace. Reaching voters in a large state like California requires serious funds. We want to start organizing our grassroots power and build up our resources now.
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace
