name: Adam Schiff
subject: Ugly news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39096?t=6&akid=6147%2E878179%2ESDMbqd) I’ve got some bad news:

In the dead of night, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party did yesterday what they’ve threatened for the last two years.

**They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.**

This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters.

Folks, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people. [Please, contribute $10 or whatever you can spare today to our campaign and Voter Protection Project to help me respond to Republicans’ baseless attacks on my ability to hold them accountable. This isn’t the end of my fight for truth, accountability, and our democracy. In fact, it’s only the start:](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39096?t=7&akid=6147%2E878179%2ESDMbqd) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39097?t=8&akid=6147%2E878179%2ESDMbqd)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39098?t=9&akid=6147%2E878179%2ESDMbqd)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39099?t=10&akid=6147%2E878179%2ESDMbqd)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39100?t=11&akid=6147%2E878179%2ESDMbqd)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39096?t=12&akid=6147%2E878179%2ESDMbqd)
I’ll have much more to say soon. But for now, thanks for standing with me — because it’s not just a personal attack on me. It’s an attack on accountability and effective oversight.

And it’s up to all of us to fight back.

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6147%2E878179%2ESDMbqd). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6147%2E878179%2ESDMbqd).**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Ugly news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57782924/389107132/-232658194?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230125_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmMzhjOGZiLTAzOWQtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NIIQHHrt-xZhkKMsLI9HMsVkqco1AKb8MMiG0W-IZLU=) I’ve got some bad news:

In the dead of night, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party did yesterday what they’ve threatened for the last two years.

**They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.**

This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters.

Peter, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people.

[**Please, contribute $10 or whatever you can spare today to our campaign and UniteDemocrats to help me respond to Republicans’ baseless attacks on my ability to hold them accountable. This isn’t the end of my fight for truth, accountability, and our democracy. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Ugly news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57784079/389108749/-725265959?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2226-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjYzE4MGIxLTA0OWQtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mrp5a2V15mF0sfQ-JDtdy9nMUSoBxdZFYyPg6xChpdQ=)

I’ve got some bad news:

In the dead of night, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party did yesterday what they’ve threatened for the last two years.
**They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.**

This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters.

Folks, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people.
[**Please, contribute $15 or whatever you can spare today to our campaign and American Bridge PAC to help me respond to Republicans’ baseless attacks on my ability to hold them accountable. This isn’t the end of my fight for truth, accountability and our democracy. In fact, it’s only the start:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57784080/389108750/-725265959?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2226-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjYzE4MGIxLTA0OWQtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mrp5a2V15mF0sfQ-JDtdy9nMUSoBxdZFYyPg6xChpdQ=)

| I’ve got some bad news: In the dead of night, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party did yesterday what they’ve threatened for the last two years. **They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.** This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters. Peter, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people. **[Please, contribute $10 or whatever you can spare today to our campaign and Eric Sorensen to help me respond to Republicans’ baseless attacks on my ability to hold them accountable. This isn’t the end of my fight for truth, accountability, and our democracy. clean_body: | I’ve got some bad news: In the dead of night, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party did yesterday what they’ve threatened for the last two years. They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years. This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters. Peter, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people. I’ll have much more to say soon. But for now, thanks for standing with me — because it’s not just a personal attack on me. It’s an attack on accountability and effective oversight. And it’s up to all of us to fight back. — Adam | | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL running for U.S. Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. body:
| MAGA Republicans can barely contain their delight — they’re already taking victory laps after removing Adam as the top Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1642%2E5257348%2EKwkYcW)
Derek —
MAGA Republicans can barely contain their delight — they’re already taking victory laps after removing Adam as the top Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee.
They’re having a fundraising bonanza, going on Fox News and every right-wing media outlet available, **all to concentrate the MAGA movement’s hatred on one person:**
Adam Schiff.
The Democrat who has stood in the breach. Who obtained the first bipartisan vote to remove a President in history. Who has faced down brutally false, personal, and negative attacks to protect our democracy. For _years._
For holding Donald Trump and his cronies accountable, Kevin McCarthy and the MAGA Republicans are making Adam pay the political price.
Because they’re afraid of Adam. And what he can do to hold them accountable.
**[Please, Derek, help us fight back and respond to these Republican attacks today by chipping in a $3 contribution or anything meaningful to you to Adam’s campaign today:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=jan2023_abs_em.S2MzIc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230125_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1642%2E5257348%2EKwkYcW)**

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: We’ve sent a lot of emails. Please give us a chance to explain why.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We know we’ve sent a lot of emails since Ruben launched his Senate campaign.
#

Peter -
Listen, we know we’ve sent a lot of emails since Ruben launched his Senate campaign. Probably more than you get from some family and friends. And we understand that it can be a lot. No doubt.
But please give us a chance to explain why we’ve sent this many emails, and what they mean to our campaign.
Here is the truth:
Ruben’s campaign is going to be funded primarily by lots of people making small donations. That’s how it’s been these first three days, and how it will be for the whole campaign.
And there is no greater source of those donations than emails we’ve been sending.
And there is literally no more important time for people to give than during this launch phase. Right now, we are at a financial disadvantage and every dollar is essential to help us build the foundation for a winning campaign.
So we hope you’ll consider these emails a small price to pay for a Senator who doesn’t have to beg hedge fund managers and pharmaceutical executives for money.
Now... with all that said, we hope you’ll consider chipping in today. Please:
[**Can you please make a contribution of any amount you can afford today? Become a Founding Donor and help us build a campaign that will defeat Kyrsten Sinema and put Ruben Gallego in the Senate.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan23.ZeANVi&refcode=em230125-2-30-vsp&t=1&akid=299%2E734936%2EptsVKA)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

I personally will not stop fighting until we reverse the Democrats’ broken policies. But I need to know if you’re on board, friend. [**_Will you help us reverse the Left’s failed agenda?_**](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=c3ddee2198524493a58dca8b506c2dcb&_e=2z-EXYJKGbmEqKuDuVJM1TQ97QXr7xWdeJxjoQ8eBwoMdM7GQDCvSIS2x6mz5_5kPOmvj9_s3PxyTkIdPA3S2vrd51AYYjRg3e0lpxc_5stpz2nY7TotL0N0ldu6rkjpUJGpV9I08wlaAHoW4PM73F21PJJxOld8j0GvlbxaKadSkYkSRO2mTMXtCw1uo5-1NkxmRd4DJ4AY6AMA2y-t_PzdL_VkT7X3UhNRgeWBo5AXP5JpVd3Z7UM5AmHNpdjaUxGXUGcVr2vVZzRGmdoU9r67OTepZ1qnMWuXuUvQzEdZxbZzWIqwZaLjYk_vAXbyLC33ElK_eyP3v3mwLUljNDeCeDXOls1uDEVAPOuoMBE9LY42fTD4xRhUhAlzvZZSd-DuvZpm4CHdYPv52levf86VUK9H7hQcshC6os7jzzm0nCVMt7yHken-0rSX-lpHVK-328giJ_a-ZUXTAidoHkWNMdg8V4dogUZ7JEz5cWrM8nnWuNH5m1iImwVJRXZSjsbqJe2CJd-hAM8SA2W28A%3D%3D)

clean_body: Elect strong Conservative leaders | Hi there, friend, If you haven't noticed, our country has become a laughing stock under the Democrats’ leadership, and it is time to REBUILD the country we know and love. | Now that we have a Republican majority in Congress, we can start restoring America’s greatness, but our work is just getting started. I personally will not stop fighting until we reverse the Democrats’ broken policies. But I need to know if you’re on board, friend. We need the support of strong patriots like you to hold Joe Biden and his administration accountable for their failures. We will no longer tolerate censorship and government overreach. YOU have the power to set America back on track and protect the future of our country. Help us rebuild America while we still can. Sincerely, Rep. Elise Stefanik Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2022 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

The decision has been crippling for our democracy ever since – allowing special interests and billionaires to buy unparalleled influence over everyday, working Americans.

In 2022 alone, billionaires spent RECORD sums of money trying to prop up election-denying, Trump-backed Republicans.

We need grassroots supporters like you to fight back and join us in calling for a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United.

clean_body: | | = | | Team - Over a decade ago, the Supreme Court handed down its ruling in Citizens United, paving the way for unlimited, anonymous money to be spent in our elections. The decision has been crippling for our democracy ever since – allowing special interests and billionaires to buy unparalleled influence over everyday, working Americans. In 2022 alone, billionaires spent RECORD sums of money trying to prop up election-denying, Trump-backed Republicans. We need grassroots supporters like you to fight back and join us in calling for a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United. | Team DASS | = Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. There are 27 Secretaries of State races this year. We're fighting to reelect 13 Democratic Secretaries of State, win in battleground states, and flip red seats blue. But we're relying on grassroots supporters to provide us with the resources we need to win nationwide. = =
